---
title: "CoralNet_CYCLE21_All_Plates"
author: "Nicole Pittoors"
date: "2025-08-04"
output: html_document
---

#--------------- Data Import -------------

# Set working directory, load libraries
# setwd("/Users/nicolepittoors/Documents/Bioinformatics/CoralNet/")
# Load Libraries
```{r}
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(viridis)
library(tibble)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(gridExtra)
library(ape)
library(cowplot)
```

# Import datasets
```{r}
# Import Counts
CN_counts <- read.csv("CoralNet_phylum_counts_recruited_only.csv", row.names = 1)

# Import proportions/percent cover
CN_pcover <- read.csv("CoralNet_phylum_proportions_recruited_only.csv", row.names = 1)

# Import metadata
CN_metadata <- read.csv("CoralNet_R_sample_metadata.csv", row.names=1)

# DIAGNOSTIC: Check what's in each dataset before processing
cat("=== DIAGNOSTIC INFORMATION ===\n")
cat("Original data dimensions:\n")
cat("CN_counts:", nrow(CN_counts), "x", ncol(CN_counts), "\n")
cat("CN_pcover:", nrow(CN_pcover), "x", ncol(CN_pcover), "\n") 
cat("CN_metadata:", nrow(CN_metadata), "x", ncol(CN_metadata), "\n\n")

# Show first few row names from each dataset
cat("First 10 row names in CN_counts:\n")
print(head(rownames(CN_counts), 10))
cat("\nFirst 10 row names in CN_metadata:\n") 
print(head(rownames(CN_metadata), 10))
cat("\nLast 10 row names in CN_metadata:\n")
print(tail(rownames(CN_metadata), 10))
cat("\Column Names of Count Table")
print(colnames(CN_counts))
cat("\Column Names of Proportions Table")
print(colnames(CN_pcover))

# Check for pattern in metadata row names
metadata_sample_ids <- rownames(CN_metadata)[!is.na(rownames(CN_metadata)) & rownames(CN_metadata) != ""]
cat("\nSample metadata row names (first 20):\n")
print(head(metadata_sample_ids, 20))
```

# Create ARMS_ID column in metadata
```{r}
CN_counts$ARMS_ID <- sub("_P\\d+[TB]_stitched_P\\d+[TB]", "", rownames(CN_counts))
CN_counts$ARMS_ID <- sub("_P\\d+[TB]", "", CN_counts$ARMS_ID)  # Handle simpler patterns too

CN_pcover$ARMS_ID <- sub("_P\\d+[TB]_stitched_P\\d+[TB]", "", rownames(CN_pcover))
CN_pcover$ARMS_ID <- sub("_P\\d+[TB]", "", CN_pcover$ARMS_ID)  # Handle simpler patterns too

# Extract ARMS_ID from metadata row names
CN_metadata$ARMS_ID <- sub("_P\\d+[TB]_stitched_P\\d+[TB]", "", rownames(CN_metadata))
CN_metadata$ARMS_ID <- sub("_P\\d+[TB]", "", CN_metadata$ARMS_ID)  # Handle simpler patterns too

# Remove rows with NA ARMS_ID from metadata
CN_metadata_clean <- CN_metadata[!is.na(CN_metadata$ARMS_ID) & CN_metadata$ARMS_ID != "", ]

cat("\nAfter cleaning:\n")
cat("CN_metadata_clean:", nrow(CN_metadata_clean), "x", ncol(CN_metadata_clean), "\n")
cat("Unique ARMS_IDs in metadata:", length(unique(CN_metadata_clean$ARMS_ID)), "\n")
cat("Unique ARMS_IDs in counts:", length(unique(CN_counts$ARMS_ID)), "\n")

# Check which ARMS_IDs are present
cat("\nARMS_IDs in metadata:", sort(unique(CN_metadata_clean$ARMS_ID))[1:10], "...\n")
cat("ARMS_IDs in counts:", sort(unique(CN_counts$ARMS_ID))[1:10], "...\n")

# Get first occurrence of each ARMS_ID for metadata
CN_metadata_combined <- CN_metadata_clean %>%
  arrange(ARMS_ID) %>%
  group_by(ARMS_ID) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Set row names
rownames(CN_metadata_combined) <- CN_metadata_combined$ARMS_ID
```

# Calculate mean proportions and count sums across plates for each ARMS_ID
```{r}
# Calculate mean proportions across plates for each ARMS_ID
CN_pcover_combined <- CN_pcover %>%
  select(-sitelocality, -ARMS_ID) %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  mutate(ARMS_ID = sub("_P\\d+[TB]_stitched_P\\d+[TB]", "", sample_id),
         ARMS_ID = sub("_P\\d+[TB]", "", ARMS_ID)) %>%
  group_by(ARMS_ID) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  column_to_rownames("ARMS_ID")

# Calculate sum counts across plates for each ARMS_ID  
CN_counts_combined <- CN_counts %>%
  select(-sitelocality, -ARMS_ID) %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  mutate(ARMS_ID = sub("_P\\d+[TB]_stitched_P\\d+[TB]", "", sample_id),
         ARMS_ID = sub("_P\\d+[TB]", "", ARMS_ID)) %>%
  group_by(ARMS_ID) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), sum), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  column_to_rownames("ARMS_ID")

# Find common ARMS_IDs between community data and metadata
common_arms <- intersect(rownames(CN_pcover_combined), rownames(CN_metadata_combined))
cat("\nCommon ARMS_IDs:", length(common_arms), "\n")
cat("Examples:", head(common_arms), "\n")

# Subset to common ARMS_IDs only
CN_pcover_combined <- CN_pcover_combined[common_arms, ]
CN_counts_combined <- CN_counts_combined[common_arms, ]
CN_metadata_final <- CN_metadata_combined[common_arms, ]

cat("\nFinal data dimensions:\n")
cat("Community data:", nrow(CN_pcover_combined), "x", ncol(CN_pcover_combined), "\n")
cat("Metadata:", nrow(CN_metadata_final), "x", ncol(CN_metadata_final), "\n")
```

# Test for removing biofilm, and focusing only on metazoans and Rhodophyta
```{r}
# Filter CoralNet data to focus on metazoans + Rhodophyta
# Remove biofilm and other non-metazoan groups
taxa_to_keep <- c("sitelocality", "Annelida", "Arthropoda", "Bryozoa", "Chordata", "Ciliophora", "Cnidaria", "Echinodermata", "Entoprocta", "Forminifera", "Hemichordata", "Hydrozoa", "Mollusca", "Other_mobile_fauna", "Porifera", "Rhodophyta", "Sediment", "Unkown")

# Check which of these columns actually exist in your data
available_taxa <- intersect(taxa_to_keep, names(CN_counts))
cat("\nTaxa columns found in data:", paste(available_taxa, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Filter the original counts data - keep all metadata columns plus selected taxa
metadata_cols <- c("sitelocality", "ARMS_ID")
available_metadata <- intersect(metadata_cols, names(CN_counts))

CN_counts_filtered <- CN_counts %>%
  select(all_of(c(available_metadata, available_taxa)))

# Display what was removed
removed_cols <- setdiff(names(CN_counts), metazoan_rhodophyta_cols)
cat("Removed columns:", paste(removed_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Kept columns:", paste(metazoan_rhodophyta_cols[3:length(metazoan_rhodophyta_cols)], collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Calculate new total counts per sample (excluding biofilm etc.)
CN_counts_filtered$total_counts <- rowSums(CN_counts_filtered[, 3:ncol(CN_counts_filtered)])

# Calculate new relative abundances
taxa_cols <- 3:(ncol(CN_counts_filtered)-1)  # Exclude metadata and total_counts columns
CN_pcover_filtered <- CN_counts_filtered
CN_pcover_filtered[, taxa_cols] <- CN_counts_filtered[, taxa_cols] / CN_counts_filtered$total_counts * 100

# Remove the total_counts column from relative abundance data
CN_pcover_filtered <- CN_pcover_filtered %>% select(-total_counts)

# Create live sessile recruits for alpha diversity analyses 
CN_live_recruits_counts <- CN_counts_combined_filtered %>%
  select(Annelida, Arthropoda, Bryozoa, Chordata, Ciliophora, Cnidaria, 
         Echinodermata, Entoprocta, Forminifera, Hemichordata, Hydrozoa, 
         Mollusca, Porifera, Rhodophyta)
#dim 36 x 14 (plates combined into ARMS)

# Display summary statistics
cat("\n=== SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Original dataset dimensions:", nrow(CN_counts), "x", ncol(CN_counts), "\n")
cat("Filtered dataset dimensions:", nrow(CN_counts_filtered), "x", ncol(CN_counts_filtered), "\n")
cat("Average total points per sample after filtering:", round(mean(CN_counts_filtered$total_counts), 1), "\n")
cat("Range of total points after filtering:", min(CN_counts_filtered$total_counts), "-", max(CN_counts_filtered$total_counts), "\n")

# Show most abundant taxa in filtered dataset
taxa_means <- colMeans(CN_pcover_filtered[, 3:ncol(CN_pcover_filtered)])
taxa_means_sorted <- sort(taxa_means, decreasing = TRUE)
cat("\nMost abundant taxa (mean % cover):\n")
print(round(taxa_means_sorted[taxa_means_sorted > 0], 2))

# ===== COMBINE ACROSS PLATES =====

# Calculate mean proportions across plates for each ARMS_ID (filtered data)
CN_pcover_combined_filtered <- CN_pcover_filtered %>%
  select(-sitelocality, -ARMS_ID) %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  mutate(ARMS_ID = sub("_P\\d+[TB]_stitched_P\\d+[TB]", "", sample_id),
         ARMS_ID = sub("_P\\d+[TB]", "", ARMS_ID)) %>%
  group_by(ARMS_ID) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  column_to_rownames("ARMS_ID")

# Calculate sum counts across plates for each ARMS_ID (filtered data)  
CN_counts_combined_filtered <- CN_counts_filtered %>%
  select(-sitelocality, -ARMS_ID, -total_counts) %>%  # Remove total_counts before combining
  rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  mutate(ARMS_ID = sub("_P\\d+[TB]_stitched_P\\d+[TB]", "", sample_id),
         ARMS_ID = sub("_P\\d+[TB]", "", ARMS_ID)) %>%
  group_by(ARMS_ID) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), sum), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  column_to_rownames("ARMS_ID")

# Recalculate total counts and relative abundances for combined data
CN_counts_combined_filtered$total_counts <- rowSums(CN_counts_combined_filtered)
CN_pcover_combined_filtered_recalc <- CN_counts_combined_filtered[, 1:(ncol(CN_counts_combined_filtered)-1)] / 
                                      CN_counts_combined_filtered$total_counts * 100

# Export combined counts of all plates within an ARMS unit, with Biofilm filtered out
write.csv(CN_counts_combined_filtered, "./CN_counts_combined_filtered.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(CN_pcover_combined_filtered_recalc, "./CN_counts_combined_filtered_recalc.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(CN_counts_filtered, "./CN_counts_filtered.csv", row.names = TRUE)

cat("\n=== COMBINED DATA SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Combined filtered data dimensions:", nrow(CN_counts_combined_filtered), "x", ncol(CN_counts_combined_filtered), "\n")
cat("Average total points per ARMS after combining and filtering:", 
    round(mean(CN_counts_combined_filtered$total_counts), 1), "\n")

# Show most abundant taxa in combined filtered dataset
taxa_means_combined <- colMeans(CN_pcover_combined_filtered_recalc)
taxa_means_combined_sorted <- sort(taxa_means_combined, decreasing = TRUE)
cat("\nMost abundant taxa in combined data (mean % cover):\n")
print(round(taxa_means_combined_sorted[taxa_means_combined_sorted > 0], 2))
```

# Data cleaning and matching, 4th root transformation
```{r data cleaning and matching}
# Clean community data (remove empty taxa/categories)
community_clean <- CN_pcover_combined_filtered_recalc[rowSums(CN_pcover_combined_filtered_recalc, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, ]
cat("Removed", nrow(CN_pcover_combined_filtered_recalc) - nrow(community_clean), "empty samples\n")

# Match samples between community and metadata
common_samples <- intersect(rownames(community_clean), rownames(CN_metadata_final))

if (length(common_samples) == 0) {
  # Try matching by column names if row matching fails
  common_samples <- intersect(colnames(community_clean), rownames(CN_metadata_final))
  if (length(common_samples) > 0) {
    community_matched <- community_clean[, common_samples]
    metadata_matched <- CN_metadata_final[common_samples, ]
    cat("Matched samples by column names\n")
  } else {
    cat("ERROR: No matching samples found between community and metadata\n")
    stop("Cannot proceed without matching samples")
  }
} else {
  community_matched <- community_clean[common_samples, ]
  metadata_matched <- CN_metadata_final[common_samples, ]
  cat("Matched samples by row names\n")
}

cat("Matched", length(common_samples), "samples between community and metadata\n")

# Remove samples with missing data in key variables
key_vars <- intersect(c("depth", "latitude", "longitude", "site2", "turbidity_std_rank"), colnames(metadata_matched))
complete_cases <- complete.cases(metadata_matched[, key_vars])
metadata_complete <- metadata_matched[complete_cases, ]

# Handle community data orientation based on current structure
if (nrow(community_matched) == nrow(metadata_complete)) {
  community_complete <- community_matched[complete_cases, ]
} else if (ncol(community_matched) == nrow(metadata_complete)) {
  community_complete <- community_matched[, complete_cases]
} else {
  community_complete <- community_matched[complete_cases, ]
}

cat("After removing incomplete cases:", nrow(community_complete), "samples with", ncol(community_complete), "taxa\n")

# Update matched data to final clean versions
community_matched_cn <- community_complete
metadata_matched_cn <- metadata_complete

# ===== 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMATION =====

# Apply 4th root transformation (standard for percentage cover data)
community_4th_root_cn <- community_matched^0.25

# Verify transformation
cat("Original data range:", round(min(community_matched, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "-", round(max(community_matched, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("4th root transformed range:", round(min(community_4th_root, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "-", round(max(community_4th_root, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")

# Check for any issues
if (any(is.na(community_4th_root))) {
  cat("WARNING: NAs introduced during transformation\n")
}

if (any(is.infinite(as.matrix(community_4th_root)))) {
  cat("WARNING: Infinite values introduced during transformation\n")
}

# Summary of final datasets
cat("Community data dimensions:", nrow(community_matched), "samples x", ncol(community_matched), "taxa\n")
cat("Metadata dimensions:", nrow(metadata_matched), "samples x", ncol(metadata_matched), "variables\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_matched), rownames(metadata_matched)), "\n")

# Show most abundant taxa in transformed data
taxa_means_transformed <- colMeans(community_4th_root)
taxa_means_transformed_sorted <- sort(taxa_means_transformed, decreasing = TRUE)
cat("\nMost abundant taxa after 4th root transformation (mean):\n")
print(round(taxa_means_transformed_sorted[taxa_means_transformed_sorted > 0], 3))

# Export final clean datasets for use in analyses
write.csv(community_matched_cn, "./community_matched_CN.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(community_4th_root_cn, "./community_4th_root_CN.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(metadata_matched_cn, "./metadata_matched_CN.csv", row.names = TRUE)
```

# Set color palette for sites
```{r site color map}
# Renamed sites for easier reading. Within deep sites, we had ARMS deployed within corals and then a triplicate 10-20m in a background area away from corals to see if there was a difference in community composition, and to also ensure we were capturing habitat variability within a site. There was not a significant difference so we will now call "coral" localities deep 1 and "background" deep2.  
cn_sites_colors <- c(
  "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E",
  "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
  "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30",
  "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
  "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E",
  "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
  "McGrail_deep" = "#015951",
  "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3",
  "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
  "Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077",
  "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599",
  "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599")
```

#-------------- ABUNDANCE PLOTS ---------------
# Define Color Map for Phyla
```{r phyla color map}
phylum_color_map_CN <- c(
  "Annelida" = "#60714E", 
  "Arthropoda" = "#3B8C6E",
  "Biofilm" = "#FEE14A",
  "Bryozoa" = "#5BBFB0",
  "Chordata" = "#408BA8",
  "Ciliophora" = "#015951",
  "Cnidaria" = "#594A9E",
  "Echinodermata" = "#A8B1D6",
  "Entoprocta" = "#812A5A",
  "Forminifera" = "#0D3D59",
  "Hydrozoa" = "#FEBC2C",
  "Mollusca" = "#F69B9C",
  "Other_mobile_fauna" = "grey20",
  "Rhodophyta" = "#F16363",
  "Sediment" = "#C47B51",
  "Hemichordata" = "#C74238",
  "Porifera" = "#F68C30",
  "Unknown" = "grey50"
)
```

# Abundance plot of mean % cover across all plates within an ARMS unit
```{r abundance plot with biofilm}
# Prepare data for plotting
abundance_plot_data <- CN_pcover_combined %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ARMS_ID = rownames(.),
         site2 = CN_metadata_final$site2) %>%  # Add site2 labels
  pivot_longer(cols = 1:ncol(CN_pcover_combined), 
               names_to = "phylum", 
               values_to = "Relative_Abundance") %>%
  mutate(Relative_Abundance = Relative_Abundance * 100)  # Convert to percentage

# Check the data structure
print(head(abundance_plot_data))
cat(sprintf("Number of samples: %d\n", length(unique(abundance_plot_data$ARMS_ID))))
cat(sprintf("Number of phyla: %d\n", length(unique(abundance_plot_data$phylum))))

# Create site2_ID manually with sequential numbering
CN_metadata_final$site2_ID <- paste0(sprintf("%02d", 1:nrow(CN_metadata_final)), "_", CN_metadata_final$site2)

# Fix the typo: rename "unkown" to "Unknown"
colnames(CN_pcover_combined)[colnames(CN_pcover_combined) == "Unkown"] <- "Unknown"

# Check
print(CN_metadata_final$site2_ID)

# Color map for CoralNet phyla
phylum_color_map_CN <- c(
  "Annelida" = "#60714E", 
  "Arthropoda" = "#3B8C6E",
  "Biofilm" = "grey75",
  "Bryozoa" = "#5BBFB0",
  "Chordata" = "#408BA8",
  "Ciliophora" = "#015951",
  "Cnidaria" = "#594A9E",
  "Echinodermata" = "#A8B1D6",
  "Entoprocta" = "#812A5A",
  "Forminifera" = "#0D3D59",
  "Hydrozoa" = "#FEBC2C",
  "Mollusca" = "#F69B9C",
  "Other_mobile_fauna" = "grey20",
  "Rhodophyta" = "#F16363",
  "Sediment" = "#c6a785",
  "Hemichordata" = "#C74238",
  "Porifera" = "#F68C30",
  "Unknown" = "grey40"
)

# Check which phyla are in data vs color map
phyla_in_data <- unique(abundance_plot_data$phylum)
phyla_in_colormap <- names(phylum_color_map_CN)

# Create abundance plot data for ALL 36 ARMS
abundance_plot_data_all <- CN_pcover_combined %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ARMS_ID = rownames(.),
         site2 = CN_metadata_final$site2,
         site2_ID = CN_metadata_final$site2_ID,
         turbidity_rank = CN_metadata_final$turbidity_std_rank) %>%  # Add turbidity for ordering
  pivot_longer(cols = 1:ncol(CN_pcover_combined), 
               names_to = "phylum", 
               values_to = "Relative_Abundance") %>%
  mutate(Relative_Abundance = Relative_Abundance * 100)  # Convert to percentage

# Order sites by turbidity (clear to turbid)
site_turbidity_order <- CN_metadata_final %>%
  arrange(turbidity_std_rank) %>%  # Clear water (low rank) to turbid (high rank)
  pull(site2_ID)

abundance_plot_data_ordered <- abundance_plot_data_all %>%
  mutate(site2_ID = factor(site2_ID, levels = site_turbidity_order))

# Create the abundance plot ordered by turbidity
p_abundance_turbidity <- ggplot(abundance_plot_data_ordered, 
                                aes(x = site2_ID, y = Relative_Abundance, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_color_map_CN, name = "Phylum", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
       x = "ARMS Unit (ordered by turbidity: clear → turbid)", 
       title = "CoralNet ARMS Recruitment Community Composition",
       subtitle = "All 36 ARMS samples ordered by increasing turbidity rank") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 12),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )

# Display the plot
print(p_abundance_turbidity)

# Save 
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_All_ARMS_Turbidity_Ordered.pdf"), 
       plot = p_abundance_turbidity, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

# Abundance plot without biofilm
```{r abundance plot without biofilm}
# First, ensure filtered data matches with metadata
# Check which ARMS_IDs are common between filtered data and metadata
common_arms_filtered <- intersect(rownames(CN_pcover_combined_filtered_recalc), 
                                 rownames(CN_metadata_final))
cat("Common ARMS_IDs between filtered data and metadata:", length(common_arms_filtered), "\n")

# Subset both datasets to common ARMS_IDs
CN_pcover_filtered_final <- CN_pcover_combined_filtered_recalc[common_arms_filtered, ]
CN_metadata_filtered_final <- CN_metadata_final[common_arms_filtered, ]

# ===== CREATE ABUNDANCE PLOT DATA FOR FILTERED TAXA =====
abundance_plot_data_filtered <- CN_pcover_filtered_final %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ARMS_ID = rownames(.),
         site2 = CN_metadata_filtered_final$site2,
         site2_ID = CN_metadata_filtered_final$site2_ID,
         turbidity_rank = CN_metadata_filtered_final$turbidity_std_rank) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 1:ncol(CN_pcover_filtered_final), 
               names_to = "phylum", 
               values_to = "Relative_Abundance") %>%
  filter(Relative_Abundance > 0)  # Remove zero abundances for cleaner plot

# ===== CREATE COLOR PALETTE FOR FILTERED TAXA =====
# Get unique taxa in your filtered data
unique_taxa_filtered <- unique(abundance_plot_data_filtered$phylum)
cat("Taxa in filtered dataset:", paste(unique_taxa_filtered, collapse = ", "), "\n")


# ===== ORDER SITES BY TURBIDITY =====
site_turbidity_order_filtered <- CN_metadata_filtered_final %>%
  arrange(turbidity_std_rank) %>%
  pull(site2_ID)

abundance_plot_data_ordered_filtered <- abundance_plot_data_filtered %>%
  mutate(site2_ID = factor(site2_ID, levels = site_turbidity_order_filtered))

# ===== CREATE THE ABUNDANCE PLOT =====
p_abundance_turbidity_filtered <- ggplot(abundance_plot_data_ordered_filtered, 
                                        aes(x = site2_ID, y = Relative_Abundance, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_color_map_CN, name = "Phylum", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
       x = "ARMS Unit (ordered by turbidity: clear → turbid)", 
       title = "CoralNet ARMS Metazoan + Rhodophyta Community Composition",
       subtitle = paste("Filtered data:", length(common_arms_filtered), "ARMS samples ordered by increasing turbidity rank")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 12),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )

# Display the plot
print(p_abundance_turbidity_filtered)

# Save 
ggsave(file.path("./CoralNet_All_ARMS_Turbidity_Ordered.pdf"), 
       plot = p_abundance_turbidity_filtered, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

# PLot relative abundance data by SITE - no biofilm
```{r abundance plot by site w/o biofilm}
# ===== AGGREGATE CORALNET DATA BY SITE =====

# Combine the filtered community data with metadata for aggregation
CN_data_with_metadata <- CN_pcover_filtered_final %>%
  rownames_to_column("ARMS_ID") %>%
  left_join(CN_metadata_filtered_final %>% 
            select(ARMS_ID, site, site2, turbidity_std_rank), 
            by = "ARMS_ID")

# Aggregate by site (you can choose 'site' or 'site2' based on your preference)
# Option 1: Aggregate by 'site2' (like "Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")
site_aggregated_CN <- CN_data_with_metadata %>%
  select(-ARMS_ID, -site) %>%  # Remove individual identifiers
  group_by(site2, turbidity_std_rank) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("turbidity"), mean, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(site2, turbidity_std_rank), 
               names_to = "phylum", 
               values_to = "Relative_Abundance") %>%
  filter(Relative_Abundance > 0)  # Remove zero abundances

# Order sites by turbidity (clear to turbid)
site_order_turbidity <- CN_data_with_metadata %>%
  select(site2, turbidity_std_rank) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(turbidity_std_rank) %>%
  pull(site2)

site_aggregated_CN$site2 <- factor(site_aggregated_CN$site2, levels = site_order_turbidity)

# Create the site-level plot for CoralNet data
p_site_CN <- ggplot(site_aggregated_CN, 
                   aes(x = site2, y = Relative_Abundance, fill = phylum)) +
   geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack",
           color = "black", size = 0.4, width = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_color_map_CN, name = "Phylum", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
       x = "Site", 
       title = "CoralNet Metazoan + Rhodophyta Community by Site") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 12, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 17, color = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 0, b = 5)),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "cm")
  )

print(p_site_CN)

# Save 
ggsave(file.path("./CoralNet_All_SITES_Turbidity_Ordered.pdf"), 
       plot = p_site_CN, width = 6.8, height = 10, dpi = 300)

```

#---------- Alpha Diversity Statistics
Calculate richness and evenness, create violin plot by site and then compare
richness and evenness across turbidity and depth values:
1. Calculate all diversity indices
2. Merge with metadata
3. Generate both violin plots and regression plots
4. Save results to CSV
5. Print summary statistics
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(vegan)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyr)
library(RColorBrewer)
```

# Calculate diversity indices and create boxplots, linear regressions
```{r calculate div indices and plots}
# 1. Calculate diversity indices from count data
# Calculate richness (number of taxa with > 0 counts)
numberOTUs <- rowSums(CN_live_recruits_counts > 0)

# Calculate total abundance per sample
totalAbundance <- rowSums(CN_live_recruits_counts)

# Calculate Shannon diversity (using vegan package)
Shannon <- diversity(CN_live_recruits_counts, index = "shannon", base = 2)

# Calculate Simpson diversity
Simpson <- diversity(CN_live_recruits_counts, index = "simpson")

# Calculate Pielou's evenness
Pielou <- Shannon / log(numberOTUs, base = 2)

# Replace NaN values in Pielou (when numberOTUs = 1)
Pielou[is.nan(Pielou)] <- 0

# Create diversity indices dataframe
div_indices_recruits <- data.frame(
  ARMS_ID = rownames(CN_live_recruits_counts),  # Use ARMS_ID to match metadata
  totalAbundance = totalAbundance,
  numberOTUs = numberOTUs,
  Shannon = Shannon,
  Simpson = Simpson,
  Pielou = Pielou
)

# 2. Merge with Metadata
# Merge diversity indices with metadata using ARMS_ID
metadata_recruits <- merge(div_indices_recruits, CN_metadata_filtered_final, by = "ARMS_ID")

# Check the merge
print(paste("Diversity data dimensions:", nrow(div_indices_recruits), "x", ncol(div_indices_recruits)))
print(paste("Metadata dimensions:", nrow(CN_metadata_filtered_final), "x", ncol(CN_metadata_filtered_final)))
print(paste("Merged data dimensions:", nrow(metadata_recruits), "x", ncol(metadata_recruits)))

# Display summary statistics
print("Summary of diversity indices:")
summary(metadata_recruits[, c("numberOTUs", "Shannon", "Simpson", "Pielou")])

# 3. Set up plotting order

# Check what site columns we have and their unique values
print("Available site columns:")
print(names(metadata_recruits)[grepl("site", names(metadata_recruits))])
print("Unique values in 'site':")
print(unique(metadata_recruits$site))
print("Unique values in 'site2':")
print(unique(metadata_recruits$site2))

# Use site2 for better grouping (has depth info)
unique_sites <- unique(metadata_recruits$site2)
n_sites <- length(unique_sites)

# Define site order (customize based on your preference)
ordered_sites <- c("Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2", "Alderdice_deep1", "Alderdice_deep2", 
                   "Alderdice_shallow", "McGrail_deep", "Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2", 
                   "Bright_shallow", "Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_shallow", "EFGB_deep")

# Check how many samples per site
print("Samples per site2:")
print(table(metadata_recruits$site2))

# 4. Custom Theme 

custom_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    # Remove gridlines
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    
    # Add thin black border
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
    
    # Increase text sizes and make all text black
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15, color = "black", face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold"),
    
    # Legend positioning
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# 5. Box Plots by Site (more robust than violin plots for small n)

# Create long format data for faceted box plot
div_long <- metadata_recruits %>%
  select(site2, numberOTUs, Pielou) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(numberOTUs, Pielou), 
               names_to = "Metric", 
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Metric = case_when(
    Metric == "numberOTUs" ~ "Taxonomic Richness",
    Metric == "Pielou" ~ "Pielou's Evenness"
  ))

# Create box plot (more appropriate for small sample sizes)
diversity_plot <- ggplot(div_long, aes(x = site2, y = Value)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = ordered_sites) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = site2), color = "black", alpha = 0.8, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = site2), size = 2, width = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cn_sites_colors, breaks = ordered_sites) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cn_sites_colors, breaks = ordered_sites) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(title = "Live Recruits: Alpha Diversity by Site", 
       y = "Value", x = "Site", fill = "Site", color = "Site") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = 'black', size = 12, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"  # Remove legend since colors match x-axis
  )

print(diversity_plot)

# 6. Linear Regression Statistics

# Richness vs Depth
rich_depth_model <- lm(numberOTUs ~ depth, data = metadata_recruits)
rich_depth_summary <- summary(rich_depth_model)
rich_depth_r2 <- sprintf("%.3f", rich_depth_summary$r.squared)
rich_depth_p <- rich_depth_summary$coefficients[2, 4]
rich_depth_p_text <- ifelse(rich_depth_p < 0.001, "p < 0.001", 
                           ifelse(rich_depth_p < 0.01, "p < 0.01",
                                 ifelse(rich_depth_p < 0.05, "p < 0.05", 
                                       paste("p =", sprintf("%.3f", rich_depth_p)))))

# Richness vs Turbidity
rich_turb_model <- lm(numberOTUs ~ turbidity_std_rank, data = metadata_recruits)
rich_turb_summary <- summary(rich_turb_model)
rich_turb_r2 <- sprintf("%.3f", rich_turb_summary$r.squared)
rich_turb_p <- rich_turb_summary$coefficients[2, 4]
rich_turb_p_text <- ifelse(rich_turb_p < 0.001, "p < 0.001", 
                          ifelse(rich_turb_p < 0.01, "p < 0.01",
                                ifelse(rich_turb_p < 0.05, "p < 0.05", 
                                      paste("p =", sprintf("%.3f", rich_turb_p)))))

# Evenness vs Depth
even_depth_model <- lm(Pielou ~ depth, data = metadata_recruits)
even_depth_summary <- summary(even_depth_model)
even_depth_r2 <- sprintf("%.3f", even_depth_summary$r.squared)
even_depth_p <- even_depth_summary$coefficients[2, 4]
even_depth_p_text <- ifelse(even_depth_p < 0.001, "p < 0.001", 
                           ifelse(even_depth_p < 0.01, "p < 0.01",
                                 ifelse(even_depth_p < 0.05, "p < 0.05", 
                                       paste("p =", sprintf("%.3f", even_depth_p)))))

# Evenness vs Turbidity
even_turb_model <- lm(Pielou ~ turbidity_std_rank, data = metadata_recruits)
even_turb_summary <- summary(even_turb_model)
even_turb_r2 <- sprintf("%.3f", even_turb_summary$r.squared)
even_turb_p <- even_turb_summary$coefficients[2, 4]
even_turb_p_text <- ifelse(even_turb_p < 0.001, "p < 0.001", 
                          ifelse(even_turb_p < 0.01, "p < 0.01",
                                ifelse(even_turb_p < 0.05, "p < 0.05", 
                                      paste("p =", sprintf("%.3f", even_turb_p)))))

# 7. Regression Plots
# Richness vs Depth
p1 <- ggplot(metadata_recruits, aes(x = depth, y = numberOTUs, color = site2)) +
  geom_point(size = 4.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black", size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cn_sites_colors) +
  labs(title = "Taxonomic Richness vs Depth",
       x = "Depth (m)", 
       y = "Taxonomic Richness",
       color = "Site") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("R² = ", rich_depth_r2, "\n", rich_depth_p_text),
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "black") +
   theme(legend.position = "none") +
  custom_theme

# Richness vs Turbidity
p2 <- ggplot(metadata_recruits, aes(x = turbidity_std_rank, y = numberOTUs, color = site2)) +
  geom_point(size = 4.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black", size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cn_sites_colors) +
  labs(title = "Taxonomic Richness vs Turbidity",
       x = "Turbidity (standardized rank)", 
       y = "Taxonomic Richness",
       color = "Site") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("R² = ", rich_turb_r2, "\n", rich_turb_p_text),
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "black") +
   theme(legend.position = "none") +
  custom_theme

# Evenness vs Depth
p3 <- ggplot(metadata_recruits, aes(x = depth, y = Pielou, color = site2)) +
  geom_point(size = 4.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black", size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cn_sites_colors) +
  labs(title = "Pielou's Evenness vs Depth",
       x = "Depth (m)", 
       y = "Pielou's Evenness",
       color = "Site") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("R² = ", even_depth_r2, "\n", even_depth_p_text),
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "black") +
   theme(legend.position = "none") +
  custom_theme

# Evenness vs Turbidity
p4 <- ggplot(metadata_recruits, aes(x = turbidity_std_rank, y = Pielou, color = site2)) +
  geom_point(size = 4.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black", size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cn_sites_colors) +
  labs(title = "Pielou's Evenness vs Turbidity",
       x = "Turbidity (standardized rank)", 
       y = "Pielou's Evenness",
       color = "Site") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("R² = ", even_turb_r2, "\n", even_turb_p_text),
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "black") +
   theme(legend.position = "none") +
  custom_theme

# Display all regression plots with shared legend
regression_grid <- (p1 + p2 + p3 + p4) + 
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(regression_grid)

# 8. Save Results
write.csv(metadata_recruits, "live_recruits_diversity_indices.csv", row.names = FALSE)
# Save box plot
ggsave("live_recruits_diversity_boxplots.pdf", plot = diversity_plot, 
       device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 14, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Save regression plots
ggsave("live_recruits_regression_plots.pdf", plot = regression_grid, 
       device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

```

# Spearman rank correlations (robust to non-normality)
```{r}
# Richness correlations
richness_depth_cor <- cor.test(metadata_recruits$numberOTUs, metadata_recruits$depth, method = "spearman")
richness_turb_cor <- cor.test(metadata_recruits$numberOTUs, metadata_recruits$turbidity_std_rank, method = "spearman")

cat("Richness vs Depth: rho =", round(richness_depth_cor$estimate, 3), ", p =", round(richness_depth_cor$p.value, 3), "\n")
cat("Richness vs Turbidity: rho =", round(richness_turb_cor$estimate, 3), ", p =", round(richness_turb_cor$p.value, 3), "\n")

# Evenness correlations  
evenness_depth_cor <- cor.test(metadata_recruits$Pielou, metadata_recruits$depth, method = "spearman")
evenness_turb_cor <- cor.test(metadata_recruits$Pielou, metadata_recruits$turbidity_std_rank, method = "spearman")

cat("Evenness vs Depth: rho =", round(evenness_depth_cor$estimate, 3), ", p =", round(evenness_depth_cor$p.value, 3), "\n")
cat("Evenness vs Turbidity: rho =", round(evenness_turb_cor$estimate, 3), ", p =", round(evenness_turb_cor$p.value, 3), "\n")
```

# Descriptive stats
```{r}
# Enhanced descriptive statistics
descriptive_stats <- metadata_recruits %>%
  group_by(site2) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    # Richness
    mean_richness = mean(numberOTUs),
    se_richness = sd(numberOTUs) / sqrt(n()),
    ci_lower_richness = mean_richness - 1.96 * se_richness,
    ci_upper_richness = mean_richness + 1.96 * se_richness,
    # Evenness  
    mean_evenness = mean(Pielou),
    se_evenness = sd(Pielou) / sqrt(n()),
    ci_lower_evenness = mean_evenness - 1.96 * se_evenness,
    ci_upper_evenness = mean_evenness + 1.96 * se_evenness,
    .groups = 'drop'
  )
```


#--------------- PERMANOVAs -------------------
# PERMANOVA Analysis: Testing Drivers of Community Structure
Permutational Multivariate Analysis of Variance (PERMANOVA) to identify the environmental and spatial factors that structure coral communities. The analysis applies a 4th root transformation to the community data (standard for percentage cover data) to reduce the influence of dominant taxa and uses Bray-Curtis dissimilarity to compare communities.

Tests Performed:
Assumption Testing
- PERMDISP: Tests whether different groups have similar multivariate dispersions (homogeneity of variance assumption)

Individual Effects
- Tests each environmental variable alone (depth, turbidity) 
- Tests each spatial variable alone (latitude, longitude)
- Identifies the strongest single drivers of community variation

Conditional Tests** (for ecological interpretation)
- Geography | Environment: How much spatial variation remains after accounting for measured environmental variables (indicates spatial autocorrelation, dispersal limitation, or unmeasured regional factors)
- Environment | Geography: How much environmental variation remains after accounting for spatial location (indicates direct environmental effects vs. spatial confounding)

Combined Models
- Environmental Baseline**: Combined effect of measured environmental variables
- Environmental + Spatial**: Full environmental and spatial model
- PP_mean tests: If available, tests primary productivity effects alone and in combination
- Site Effects: Tests discrete site identity (captures all unmeasured local factors)
- Full Model: Complete model including all measured variables

Interpretation:
- High R² values = strong driver of community structure
- Significant Geography | Environment = spatial autocorrelation (communities are similar based on location, not just environment)
- Significant Environment | Geography = direct environmental effects beyond spatial patterns
- High Site Effects = important unmeasured local factors (management, disturbance history, etc.)

```{r}
# ========================= CHECK DATA AND VARIABLES =========================
cat("Community data dimensions:", nrow(community_4th_root), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root), "taxa\n")
cat("Metadata dimensions:", nrow(metadata_matched), "samples x", ncol(metadata_matched), "variables\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root), rownames(metadata_matched)), "\n")

# Check available variables
required_vars <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank", "latitude", "longitude", "site2")
optional_vars <- c("PP_mean")
all_vars <- c(required_vars, optional_vars)

available_vars <- intersect(all_vars, colnames(metadata_matched))
missing_vars <- setdiff(required_vars, available_vars)

cat("Available variables:", paste(available_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  cat("Missing essential variables:", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  stop("Cannot proceed without essential variables")
}

# Check if PP_mean is available
has_pp_mean <- "PP_mean" %in% available_vars
cat("PP_mean available:", has_pp_mean, "\n")

#========================= PERMDISP TESTING (USING 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA) =========================
cat(paste(rep("-", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")

# Calculate distance matrix from 4th root transformed data (like old script)
dist_matrix <- vegdist(community_4th_root, method = "bray")

cat("Distance matrix calculated from", nrow(community_4th_root), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root), "taxa\n")

# Test site2 (main categorical variable)
permdisp_site <- betadisper(dist_matrix, metadata_matched$site2)
permdisp_test_site <- permutest(permdisp_site, permutations = 999)

f_val <- permdisp_test_site$tab$F[1]
p_val <- permdisp_test_site$tab$`Pr(>F)`[1]
assumption_met <- ifelse(p_val >= 0.05, "✓ PASSED", "⚠️ VIOLATED")

cat(sprintf("Site2 PERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val, p_val, assumption_met))

# Store PERMDISP results
permdisp_results <- data.frame(
  Variable = "site2",
  F_value = f_val,
  P_value = p_val,
  Assumption_Met = p_val >= 0.05,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

#========================= PERMANOVA ANALYSES =========================
# Helper function for running PERMANOVA tests 
run_permanova_test <- function(formula_str, test_name) {
  tryCatch({
    # Use distance matrix directly (like old script)
    result <- adonis2(
      as.formula(paste("dist_matrix ~", formula_str)),
      data = metadata_matched,
      permutations = 999,
      by = "terms"
    )
    
    # Calculate model R²
    result_df <- as.data.frame(result)
    model_r2 <- sum(result_df[!rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total"), "R2"], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Get p-value for first term
    first_p <- result_df[1, "Pr(>F)"]
    if (is.na(first_p)) first_p <- result_df[rownames(result_df) != "Residual" & rownames(result_df) != "Total", "Pr(>F)"][1]
    
    cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f\n", test_name, model_r2, first_p))
    
    return(list(result = result, r2 = model_r2))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("%-35s: ERROR - %s\n", test_name, e$message))
    return(list(result = NULL, r2 = NA))
  })
}

# Store results
permanova_results <- list()

#========================= INDIVIDUAL EFFECTS =========================

# Individual environmental effects
permanova_results$depth_alone <- run_permanova_test("depth", "Depth Alone")
permanova_results$turbidity_alone <- run_permanova_test("turbidity_std_rank", "Turbidity Alone")

# Individual geographic effects  
permanova_results$latitude_alone <- run_permanova_test("latitude", "Latitude Alone")
permanova_results$longitude_alone <- run_permanova_test("longitude", "Longitude Alone")

# Combined effects
permanova_results$geography_combined <- run_permanova_test("latitude + longitude", "Geographic Combined")
permanova_results$env_baseline <- run_permanova_test("depth + turbidity_std_rank", "Environmental Baseline")


# ========================= PP_MEAN TESTS =========================

if (has_pp_mean) {
  cat("\nRunning PP_mean analyses...\n")
  
  # PP_mean alone
  permanova_results$pp_alone <- run_permanova_test("PP_mean", "PP_mean Alone")
  
  # PP_mean after geography (conditional test)
  pp_after_geog <- adonis2(dist_matrix ~ latitude + longitude + PP_mean,
                          data = metadata_matched, permutations = 999, by = "terms")
  pp_after_geog_r2 <- pp_after_geog$R2[3]  # PP_mean is 3rd term
  pp_after_geog_p <- pp_after_geog$`Pr(>F)`[3]
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f\n", "PP_mean | Geography", pp_after_geog_r2, pp_after_geog_p))
  
  # Geography after PP_mean (conditional test)
  geog_after_pp <- adonis2(dist_matrix ~ PP_mean + latitude + longitude,
                          data = metadata_matched, permutations = 999, by = "terms")
  geog_after_pp_r2 <- sum(geog_after_pp$R2[2:3])  # lat + lon terms
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | PP_mean", geog_after_pp_r2))
  
  # Store conditional results
  permanova_results$pp_after_geography <- list(result = pp_after_geog, r2 = pp_after_geog_r2)
  permanova_results$geography_after_pp <- list(result = geog_after_pp, r2 = geog_after_pp_r2)
}

#========================= CONDITIONAL TESTS =========================


cat("\nRunning conditional tests...\n")

# Geography beyond environment (key test for spatial autocorrelation)
geography_after_env <- adonis2(dist_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude,
                              data = metadata_matched, permutations = 999, by = "terms")
# Geography R² is the sum of latitude + longitude terms (last two before Residual)
geog_after_env_r2 <- sum(geography_after_env$R2[3:4])  # lat + lon terms
geog_after_env_p <- geography_after_env$`Pr(>F)`[3]  # First geography term p-value
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", geog_after_env_r2, geog_after_env_p))

# Environment beyond geography
env_after_geog <- adonis2(dist_matrix ~ latitude + longitude + depth + turbidity_std_rank,
                         data = metadata_matched, permutations = 999, by = "terms")
env_after_geog_r2 <- sum(env_after_geog$R2[3:4])  # depth + turbidity terms
env_after_geog_p <- env_after_geog$`Pr(>F)`[3]  # First environment term p-value
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f\n", "Environment | Geography", env_after_geog_r2, env_after_geog_p))

# Store conditional results
permanova_results$geography_after_env <- list(result = geography_after_env, r2 = geog_after_env_r2)
permanova_results$env_after_geography <- list(result = env_after_geog, r2 = env_after_geog_r2)

#========================= COMBINED MODELS ============================

# Environmental + spatial combined
permanova_results$env_spatial <- run_permanova_test("depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude", 
                                                    "Environmental + Spatial")

# Site effects (for comparison)
permanova_results$site_alone <- run_permanova_test("site2", "Site Effects Alone")

# Environmental + site (standard ecological model)
permanova_results$env_site <- run_permanova_test("depth + turbidity_std_rank + site2", 
                                                 "Environmental + Site")

# Full model with PP_mean (if available)
if (has_pp_mean) {
  permanova_results$full_model <- run_permanova_test("depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude + PP_mean", 
                                                     "Full Model (Env + Spatial + PP)")
}


#========================= EXTRACT DETAILED STATISTICS =========================


cat("\nExtracting detailed statistics...\n")

# Function to extract detailed term-by-term results (matching old script)
extract_detailed_stats <- function(permanova_result, test_name) {
  if (!is.null(permanova_result$result)) {
    result_df <- as.data.frame(permanova_result$result)
    term_rows <- !rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total")
    
    if (sum(term_rows) > 0) {
      return(data.frame(
        Data_Type = "CoralNet",
        Analysis = test_name,
        Variable = rownames(result_df)[term_rows],
        df = result_df[term_rows, "Df"],
        SS = round(result_df[term_rows, "SumOfSqs"], 6),
        R2 = round(result_df[term_rows, "R2"], 6),
        F.Statistic = round(result_df[term_rows, "F"], 4),
        p.value = round(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"], 6),
        Significance = ifelse(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.001, "***",
                            ifelse(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.01, "**",
                            ifelse(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05, "*",
                            ifelse(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.1, ".", "")))),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
  return(NULL)
}

# Extract all detailed statistics
all_detailed_stats_list <- list(
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$depth_alone, "Depth Alone"),
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$turbidity_alone, "Turbidity Alone"),
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$latitude_alone, "Latitude Alone"),
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$longitude_alone, "Longitude Alone"),
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$env_baseline, "Environmental Baseline (D+T)"),
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$geography_combined, "Geographic Combined (Lat+Long)"),
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$env_spatial, "Environmental + Spatial"),
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$site_alone, "Site Effects Alone"),
  extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$env_site, "Environmental + Site")
)

# Add PP_mean results if available
if (has_pp_mean) {
  all_detailed_stats_list <- c(all_detailed_stats_list, list(
    extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$pp_alone, "PP_mean Alone"),
    extract_detailed_stats(permanova_results$full_model, "Full Model (Env + Spatial + PP)")
  ))
}

# Combine all detailed statistics
all_detailed_stats <- do.call(rbind, all_detailed_stats_list[!sapply(all_detailed_stats_list, is.null)])


#=========================  CREATE RESULTS SUMMARY =========================

summary_results <- data.frame(
  Test = character(),
  R2 = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add main results
test_names <- c("Depth Alone", "Turbidity Alone", "Latitude Alone", "Longitude Alone", 
                "Environmental Baseline", "Geographic Combined", 
                "Geography | Environment", "Environment | Geography",
                "Environmental + Spatial", "Site Effects Alone", "Environmental + Site")

r2_values <- c(
  permanova_results$depth_alone$r2,
  permanova_results$turbidity_alone$r2,
  permanova_results$latitude_alone$r2,
  permanova_results$longitude_alone$r2,
  permanova_results$env_baseline$r2,
  permanova_results$geography_combined$r2,
  geog_after_env_r2,
  env_after_geog_r2,
  permanova_results$env_spatial$r2,
  permanova_results$site_alone$r2,
  permanova_results$env_site$r2
)

# Add PP_mean results if available
if (has_pp_mean) {
  test_names <- c(test_names, "PP_mean Alone", "PP_mean | Geography", "Geography | PP_mean", 
                  "Full Model (Env + Spatial + PP)")
  r2_values <- c(r2_values, 
                 permanova_results$pp_alone$r2,
                 pp_after_geog_r2,
                 geog_after_pp_r2,
                 permanova_results$full_model$r2)
}

# Create summary dataframe
summary_results <- data.frame(
  Test = test_names,
  R2 = r2_values,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort by R² for easy interpretation (matching old script)
summary_results <- summary_results[order(summary_results$R2, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE), ]

#========================= SAVE RESULTS =========================

cat("\nSaving results...\n")

# Create output directory
output_dir <- "./CoralNet_Results"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Save detailed statistics (matching old script format)
write.csv(all_detailed_stats, 
          file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_PERMANOVA_detailed_statistics_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Save simplified version for spreadsheet (matching old script)
write.csv(all_detailed_stats[, c("Data_Type", "Analysis", "Variable", "df", "SS", "R2", "F.Statistic", "p.value", "Significance")], 
          file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_PERMANOVA_simplified_for_spreadsheet_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Save complete summary (matching old script format)
write.csv(summary_results, 
          file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_PERMANOVA_results_summary_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Save PERMDISP results (matching old script)
write.csv(permdisp_results, 
          file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_PERMDISP_assumption_testing_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)


#========================= RESULTS SUMMARY =========================

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("CORALNET PERMANOVA RESULTS SUMMARY (4th Root Transformed)\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat("\nTop Effects by R² Value:\n")
for (i in 1:min(nrow(summary_results), 10)) {
  if (!is.na(summary_results$R2[i])) {
    cat(sprintf("  %-40s: R² = %.3f\n", summary_results$Test[i], summary_results$R2[i]))
  }
}

cat("\nPERMDISP Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Site2: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val, p_val, assumption_met))

cat("\n✓ Analysis complete! Files saved:\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PERMANOVA_detailed_statistics_4thRoot.csv\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PERMANOVA_simplified_for_spreadsheet_4thRoot.csv\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PERMANOVA_results_summary_4thRoot.csv\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PERMDISP_assumption_testing_4thRoot.csv\n")
cat("\n✓ Use 'CoralNet_PERMANOVA_simplified_for_spreadsheet_4thRoot.csv' for copy-paste to spreadsheet\n")
```

===============================================
--------------- PERMANOVAs --------------------
===============================================
Permanova analyses concurrent with all other datasets
```{r}
# CoralNet PERMANOVA Analysis - Aligned with 2mm/Metabarcoding Framework
# =============================================================================
# Following the EXACT same structure as 2mm motile organism analysis:
# MARGINAL Tests (Individual Effects)
# CONDITIONAL Tests (Explicit Controls using model comparison)  
# SEQUENTIAL Tests (Order Matters)

#========================= PREPARE CORALNET DATA =========================

cat("=== PREPARING CORALNET DATA (ALIGNED FRAMEWORK) ===\n")

# Use existing 4th root transformed community data
community_4th_root_cn <- community_4th_root_cn  # Already transformed
metadata_cn <- CN_metadata_FINAL

# Match samples with metadata (assuming rownames need to be matched with SampleID)
if (!identical(rownames(community_4th_root_cn), rownames(metadata_cn))) {
  # If rownames don't match, try to match using SampleID
  common_samples <- intersect(rownames(community_4th_root_cn), metadata_cn$SampleID)
  community_4th_root_cn <- community_4th_root_cn[common_samples, ]
  metadata_cn <- metadata_cn[metadata_cn$SampleID %in% common_samples, ]
  rownames(metadata_cn) <- metadata_cn$SampleID
  metadata_cn <- metadata_cn[common_samples, ]
} else {
  # If they already match by rownames
  common_samples <- intersect(rownames(community_4th_root_cn), rownames(metadata_cn))
  community_4th_root_cn <- community_4th_root_cn[common_samples, ]
  metadata_cn <- metadata_cn[common_samples, ]
}

cat("Community data:", nrow(community_4th_root_cn), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root_cn), "taxa\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root_cn), rownames(metadata_cn)), "\n")

# Calculate distance matrix
dist_matrix_cn <- vegdist(community_4th_root_cn, method = "bray")

# Check available variables (aligned with 2mm focus)
required_vars_cn <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank", "latitude", "longitude", "site2")
optional_vars_cn <- c("PP_mean")
available_vars_cn <- intersect(c(required_vars_cn, optional_vars_cn), colnames(metadata_cn))
has_pp_mean_cn <- "PP_mean" %in% available_vars_cn

cat("Available variables:", paste(available_vars_cn, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("PP_mean available:", has_pp_mean_cn, "\n")

#========================= PERMDISP TESTING =========================

cat("\nTesting PERMDISP assumptions\n")
permdisp_site_cn <- betadisper(dist_matrix_cn, metadata_cn$site2)
permdisp_test_site_cn <- permutest(permdisp_site_cn, permutations = 999)
f_val_cn <- permdisp_test_site_cn$tab$F[1]
p_val_cn <- permdisp_test_site_cn$tab$`Pr(>F)`[1]
assumption_met_cn <- ifelse(p_val_cn >= 0.05, "PASSED", "VIOLATED")
cat(sprintf("Site2 PERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_cn, p_val_cn, assumption_met_cn))

# Store PERMDISP results for supplementary table
permdisp_results_cn <- data.frame(
  Data_Type = "CoralNet",
  Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
  Variable = "site2",
  F_value = f_val_cn,
  P_value = p_val_cn,
  Assumption_Met = p_val_cn >= 0.05,
  Status = assumption_met_cn,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

#========================= HELPER FUNCTION =========================

# Helper function following 2mm approach
run_permanova_cn <- function(formula_str, test_name) {
  tryCatch({
    result <- adonis2(
      as.formula(paste("dist_matrix_cn ~", formula_str)),
      data = metadata_cn,
      permutations = 999,
      by = "terms"
    )
    
    result_df <- as.data.frame(result)
    model_r2 <- sum(result_df[!rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total"), "R2"], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Extract detailed statistics for each term
    term_rows <- !rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total")
    
    if (sum(term_rows) > 0) {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Data_Type = "CoralNet",
        Fraction = "Benthic_Community", 
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = rownames(result_df)[term_rows],
        Df = result_df[term_rows, "Df"],
        SumOfSqs = round(result_df[term_rows, "SumOfSqs"], 6),
        R2 = round(result_df[term_rows, "R2"], 6),
        F_Statistic = round(result_df[term_rows, "F"], 4),
        P_value = round(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"], 6),
        Significance = ifelse(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.001, "***",
                            ifelse(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.01, "**",
                            ifelse(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05, "*",
                            ifelse(result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.1, ".", "")))),
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    } else {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Data_Type = "CoralNet",
        Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = NA,
        Df = NA,
        SumOfSqs = NA,
        R2 = NA,
        F_Statistic = NA,
        P_value = NA,
        Significance = "",
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    
    return(list(result = result, r2 = model_r2, detailed_stats = detailed_stats))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("%-35s: ERROR - %s\n", test_name, e$message))
    return(list(result = NULL, r2 = NA, detailed_stats = NULL))
  })
}

#========================= INITIALIZE RESULTS =========================

results_cn <- list()
detailed_stats_list_cn <- list()

cat("\nRunning PERMANOVA analyses following 2mm/metabarcoding framework...\n")

#========================= MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) =========================

cat("\n=== MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) ===\n")

# Individual environmental effects
results_cn$depth_alone <- run_permanova_cn("depth", "Depth Alone")
detailed_stats_list_cn[["depth_alone"]] <- results_cn$depth_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results_cn$depth_alone$r2))

results_cn$turbidity_alone <- run_permanova_cn("turbidity_std_rank", "Turbidity Alone")
detailed_stats_list_cn[["turbidity_alone"]] <- results_cn$turbidity_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Turbidity Alone", results_cn$turbidity_alone$r2))

# Individual geographic effects (following 2mm focus)
results_cn$latitude_alone <- run_permanova_cn("latitude", "Latitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list_cn[["latitude_alone"]] <- results_cn$latitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results_cn$latitude_alone$r2))

results_cn$longitude_alone <- run_permanova_cn("longitude", "Longitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list_cn[["longitude_alone"]] <- results_cn$longitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results_cn$longitude_alone$r2))

# PP_mean effect (if available)
if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  results_cn$pp_alone <- run_permanova_cn("PP_mean", "PP_mean Alone")
  detailed_stats_list_cn[["pp_alone"]] <- results_cn$pp_alone$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "PP_mean Alone", results_cn$pp_alone$r2))
}

# Site effect
results_cn$site_alone <- run_permanova_cn("site2", "Site Effects Alone")
detailed_stats_list_cn[["site_alone"]] <- results_cn$site_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results_cn$site_alone$r2))

#========================= CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) =========================

cat("\n=== CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) ===\n")
cat("Using model comparison method for true conditional variance partitioning\n")

if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  # 1. PP_mean | longitude (following 2mm framework)
  cat("Running conditional test: PP_mean | longitude\n")
  longitude_only_r2_cn <- results_cn$longitude_alone$r2
  pp_longitude_result_cn <- run_permanova_cn("longitude + PP_mean", "Longitude + PP_mean")
  pp_longitude_r2_cn <- pp_longitude_result_cn$r2
  pp_conditional_r2_cn <- pp_longitude_r2_cn - longitude_only_r2_cn
  
  results_cn$pp_after_longitude <- list(
    r2 = pp_conditional_r2_cn,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Data_Type = "CoralNet",
      Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
      Test_Name = "PP_mean | Longitude",
      Term = "PP_mean_conditional",
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = round(pp_conditional_r2_cn, 6),
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Significance = "",
      Model_R2 = round(pp_conditional_r2_cn, 6),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_cn[["pp_after_longitude"]] <- results_cn$pp_after_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "PP_mean | Longitude", pp_conditional_r2_cn))
  
  # 2. Longitude | PP_mean (following 2mm framework)
  cat("Running conditional test: longitude | PP_mean\n")
  pp_only_r2_cn <- results_cn$pp_alone$r2
  longitude_conditional_r2_cn <- pp_longitude_r2_cn - pp_only_r2_cn
  
  results_cn$longitude_after_pp <- list(
    r2 = longitude_conditional_r2_cn,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Data_Type = "CoralNet",
      Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
      Test_Name = "Longitude | PP_mean",
      Term = "longitude_conditional",
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = round(longitude_conditional_r2_cn, 6),
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Significance = "",
      Model_R2 = round(longitude_conditional_r2_cn, 6),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_cn[["longitude_after_pp"]] <- results_cn$longitude_after_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | PP_mean", longitude_conditional_r2_cn))
}

#========================= SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) =========================

cat("\n=== SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) ===\n")
cat("Following 2mm sequential model building\n")

# 1. depth + turbidity_std_rank - Sequential: depth first, then turbidity|depth
results_cn$env_baseline <- run_permanova_cn("depth + turbidity_std_rank", "Environmental Baseline (D+T)")
detailed_stats_list_cn[["env_baseline"]] <- results_cn$env_baseline$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline (D+T)", results_cn$env_baseline$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  # 2. depth + turbidity_std_rank + PP_mean - Sequential: env first, then PP|env
  results_cn$env_pp <- run_permanova_cn("depth + turbidity_std_rank + PP_mean", "Environmental + PP_mean")
  detailed_stats_list_cn[["env_pp"]] <- results_cn$env_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + PP_mean", results_cn$env_pp$r2))
}

# 3. depth + turbidity_std_rank + longitude - Sequential: env first, then longitude|env
results_cn$env_longitude <- run_permanova_cn("depth + turbidity_std_rank + longitude", "Environmental + Longitude")
detailed_stats_list_cn[["env_longitude"]] <- results_cn$env_longitude$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Longitude", results_cn$env_longitude$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  # 4. depth + turbidity_std_rank + PP_mean + longitude - Sequential: all variables in order
  results_cn$env_pp_longitude <- run_permanova_cn("depth + turbidity_std_rank + PP_mean + longitude", "Environmental + PP_mean + Longitude")
  detailed_stats_list_cn[["env_pp_longitude"]] <- results_cn$env_pp_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + PP_mean + Longitude", results_cn$env_pp_longitude$r2))
}

# 5. depth + turbidity_std_rank + site2 - Sequential: env first, then site|env
results_cn$env_site <- run_permanova_cn("depth + turbidity_std_rank + site2", "Environmental + Site")
detailed_stats_list_cn[["env_site"]] <- results_cn$env_site$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results_cn$env_site$r2))

#========================= ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS =========================

cat("\n=== ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS ===\n")

# Geography | Environment (using model comparison method)
cat("Running conditional test: geography | environment\n")
env_only_r2_cn <- results_cn$env_baseline$r2
env_spatial_result_cn <- run_permanova_cn("depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude", "Environmental + Spatial")
env_spatial_r2_cn <- env_spatial_result_cn$r2
spatial_conditional_r2_cn <- env_spatial_r2_cn - env_only_r2_cn

results_cn$geography_after_env <- list(
  r2 = spatial_conditional_r2_cn,
  detailed_stats = data.frame(
    Data_Type = "CoralNet",
    Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
    Test_Name = "Geography | Environment", 
    Term = "geography_conditional",
    Df = NA,
    SumOfSqs = NA,
    R2 = round(spatial_conditional_r2_cn, 6),
    F_Statistic = NA,
    P_value = NA,
    Significance = "",
    Model_R2 = round(spatial_conditional_r2_cn, 6),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
)
detailed_stats_list_cn[["geography_after_env"]] <- results_cn$geography_after_env$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", spatial_conditional_r2_cn))

# Store the environmental + spatial model
results_cn$env_spatial <- env_spatial_result_cn
detailed_stats_list_cn[["env_spatial"]] <- results_cn$env_spatial$detailed_stats

# Full model
if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  results_cn$full_model <- run_permanova_cn("depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude + PP_mean", "Full Model")
  detailed_stats_list_cn[["full_model"]] <- results_cn$full_model$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results_cn$full_model$r2))
  
  # Site | All Measured Variables (following 2mm approach)
  cat("Running conditional test: site | all variables\n")
  full_model_r2_cn <- results_cn$full_model$r2
  site_all_result_cn <- run_permanova_cn("depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude + PP_mean + site2", "Site + All Variables")
  site_all_r2_cn <- site_all_result_cn$r2
  site_conditional_r2_cn <- site_all_r2_cn - full_model_r2_cn
  
  results_cn$site_after_all <- list(
    r2 = site_conditional_r2_cn,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Data_Type = "CoralNet",
      Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
      Test_Name = "Site | All Measured Variables",
      Term = "site_conditional", 
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = round(site_conditional_r2_cn, 6),
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Significance = "",
      Model_R2 = round(site_conditional_r2_cn, 6),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_cn[["site_after_all"]] <- results_cn$site_after_all$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Measured Variables", site_conditional_r2_cn))
}

#========================= COMPILE RESULTS =========================

cat("\n=== COMPILING ALIGNED RESULTS ===\n")

# Combine all detailed statistics
all_detailed_stats_cn <- do.call(rbind, detailed_stats_list_cn[!sapply(detailed_stats_list_cn, is.null)])

# Create summary matching 2mm format
test_names_cn <- c()
r2_values_cn <- c()

# Add marginal tests
test_names_cn <- c(test_names_cn, "Depth Alone", "Turbidity Alone", "Latitude Alone", "Longitude Alone", "Site Effects Alone")
r2_values_cn <- c(r2_values_cn, results_cn$depth_alone$r2, results_cn$turbidity_alone$r2, results_cn$latitude_alone$r2, results_cn$longitude_alone$r2, results_cn$site_alone$r2)

if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  test_names_cn <- c(test_names_cn, "PP_mean Alone", "PP_mean | Longitude", "Longitude | PP_mean")
  r2_values_cn <- c(r2_values_cn, results_cn$pp_alone$r2, results_cn$pp_after_longitude$r2, results_cn$longitude_after_pp$r2)
}

# Add sequential tests
test_names_cn <- c(test_names_cn, "Environmental Baseline", "Environmental + Site", "Geography | Environment")
r2_values_cn <- c(r2_values_cn, results_cn$env_baseline$r2, results_cn$env_site$r2, results_cn$geography_after_env$r2)

if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  test_names_cn <- c(test_names_cn, "Environmental + PP_mean", "Full Model", "Site | All Measured Variables")
  r2_values_cn <- c(r2_values_cn, results_cn$env_pp$r2, results_cn$full_model$r2, results_cn$site_after_all$r2)
}

summary_results_cn <- data.frame(
  Test = test_names_cn,
  R2 = r2_values_cn,
  Data_Type = "CoralNet",
  Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort by R² for interpretation
summary_results_cn <- summary_results_cn[order(summary_results_cn$R2, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE), ]

#========================= SAVE RESULTS =========================

# Create output directory
output_dir_cn <- ""
if (!dir.exists(output_dir_cn)) {
  dir.create(output_dir_cn, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Save results with aligned naming
write.csv(all_detailed_stats_cn, 
          file.path(output_dir_cn, "CoralNet_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_detailed_statistics.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(summary_results_cn, 
          file.path(output_dir_cn, "CoralNet_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(permdisp_results_cn, 
          file.path(output_dir_cn, "CoralNet_PERMDISP_ALIGNED_results.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

#========================= CREATE SUPPLEMENTARY TABLES =========================

# Table a) PERMDISP assumption testing
suppl_table_permdisp_cn <- data.frame(
  Data_Type = "CoralNet",
  Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
  Variable = "site2",
  F_value = round(f_val_cn, 3),
  P_value = round(p_val_cn, 3),
  Status = assumption_met_cn,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Table b) Individual variable effects (marginal tests only)
marginal_tests_cn <- all_detailed_stats_cn[all_detailed_stats_cn$Test_Name %in% c(
  "Depth Alone", "Turbidity Alone", "Latitude Alone", "Longitude Alone", "PP_mean Alone"
), ]
suppl_table_individual_cn <- marginal_tests_cn[, c("Data_Type", "Fraction", "Term", "Df", "SumOfSqs", "R2", "F_Statistic", "P_value", "Significance")]

# Table c) Conditional variance partitioning
conditional_tests_cn <- all_detailed_stats_cn[grepl("\\|", all_detailed_stats_cn$Test_Name), ]
suppl_table_conditional_cn <- conditional_tests_cn[, c("Data_Type", "Fraction", "Test_Name", "R2", "P_value")]
names(suppl_table_conditional_cn)[names(suppl_table_conditional_cn) == "Test_Name"] <- "Conditional_Test"

# Table d) Term-by-term results for multi-variable models
multivariable_tests_cn2 <- all_detailed_stats_cn[all_detailed_stats_cn$Test_Name %in% c(
  "Environmental Baseline (D+T)", "Environmental + PP_mean", "Environmental + Longitude", 
  "Environmental + PP_mean + Longitude", "Environmental + Site", "Environmental + Spatial", "Full Model"
), ]
suppl_table_terms_cn <- multivariable_tests_cn[, c("Data_Type", "Fraction", "Test_Name", "Term", "Df", "SumOfSqs", "R2", "F_Statistic", "P_value", "Significance")]

# Table e) Model comparison
model_comparison_cn <- data.frame(
  Data_Type = "CoralNet",
  Fraction = "Benthic_Community",
  Model = c("Environmental Baseline", "Environmental + Site", "Environmental + Spatial", 
           if(has_pp_mean_cn) "Full Model" else NULL),
  Model_R2 = c(results_cn$env_baseline$r2, results_cn$env_site$r2, results_cn$env_spatial$r2,
              if(has_pp_mean_cn) results_cn$full_model$r2 else NULL),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Save supplementary tables
write.csv(suppl_table_permdisp_cn, 
          file.path(output_dir_cn, "SupplementaryTable_PERMDISP_CoralNet.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(suppl_table_individual_cn, 
          file.path(output_dir_cn, "SupplementaryTable_Individual_Effects_CoralNet.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(suppl_table_conditional_cn, 
          file.path(output_dir_cn, "SupplementaryTable_Conditional_Partitioning_CoralNet.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(suppl_table_terms_cn, 
          file.path(output_dir_cn, "SupplementaryTable_Term_by_Term_CoralNet.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(model_comparison_cn, 
          file.path(output_dir_cn, "SupplementaryTable_Model_Comparison_CoralNet.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

#========================= RESULTS SUMMARY =========================

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("CORALNET PERMANOVA RESULTS - ALIGNED WITH 2MM/METABARCODING FRAMEWORK\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat("\nMARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results_cn$depth_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Turbidity Alone", results_cn$turbidity_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results_cn$latitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results_cn$longitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results_cn$site_alone$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "PP_mean Alone", results_cn$pp_alone$r2))
  
  cat("\nCONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls):\n")
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "PP_mean | Longitude", results_cn$pp_after_longitude$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | PP_mean", results_cn$longitude_after_pp$r2))
}

cat("\nSEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline", results_cn$env_baseline$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results_cn$env_site$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", results_cn$geography_after_env$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_cn) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + PP_mean", results_cn$env_pp$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results_cn$full_model$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Variables", results_cn$site_after_all$r2))
}

cat(sprintf("\nPERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_cn, p_val_cn, assumption_met_cn))

cat("\n✓ Analysis complete! Files saved in:", output_dir_cn, "\n")
cat("✓ Main results:\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_detailed_statistics.csv\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_summary.csv\n") 
cat("  - CoralNet_PERMDISP_ALIGNED_results.csv\n")
cat("\n✓ Supplementary tables for manuscript:\n")
cat("  - SupplementaryTable_PERMDISP_CoralNet.csv\n")
cat("  - SupplementaryTable_Individual_Effects_CoralNet.csv\n")
cat("  - SupplementaryTable_Conditional_Partitioning_CoralNet.csv\n")
cat("  - SupplementaryTable_Term_by_Term_CoralNet.csv\n")
cat("  - SupplementaryTable_Model_Comparison_CoralNet.csv\n")

cat("\nTOP 5 DRIVERS BY R² VALUE:\n")
top_5_cn <- head(summary_results_cn[!is.na(summary_results_cn$R2), ], 5)
for (i in 1:nrow(top_5_cn)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %d. %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", i, top_5_cn$Test[i], top_5_cn$R2[i]))
}
```

```{r}
CN_R2 <- c(
    results_cn$env_baseline$r2,
    ifelse(exists("geo_combined", where=results_cn), results_cn$geo_combined$r2, NA),
    results_cn$env_spatial$r2,
    ifelse(has_pp_mean_cn, results_cn$full_model$r2, NA),
    results_cn$site_alone$r2,
    results_cn$env_site$r2
  )
```


# VARIANCE PARTITIONING
Not really necessary, need to be re-run with 4th root transformed data
PURPOSE: Variance partitioning quantifies how much community variation is 
explained by pure geographic effects, pure environmental effects, and shared 
(confounded) effects. This is the definitive test for disentangling spatial 
and environmental processes in community ecology.
```{r}
# Variance partitioning using vegan's varpart
varpart_result <- varpart(bray_dist, 
                          as.data.frame(env_vars_clean[, geo_vars]),  # Geography
                          as.data.frame(scale(env_data_no_geo)))      # Environment
  
print(varpart_result)
  
# Extract variance components
pure_geo <- varpart_result$part$indfract$Adj.R.squared[1]
pure_env <- varpart_result$part$indfract$Adj.R.squared[2]
shared <- varpart_result$part$indfract$Adj.R.squared[3]
residual <- 1 - pure_geo - pure_env - shared

cat(sprintf("\nVARIANCE COMPONENTS:\n"))
cat(sprintf("Pure Geographic: %.3f (%.1f%%)\n", pure_geo, pure_geo*100))
cat(sprintf("Pure Environmental: %.3f (%.1f%%)\n", pure_env, pure_env*100))
cat(sprintf("Shared (Confounded): %.3f (%.1f%%)\n", shared, shared*100))
cat(sprintf("Unexplained: %.3f (%.1f%%)\n", residual, residual*100))

# Create variance partitioning plot
plot(varpart_result, digits = 3, 
     Xnames = c("Geography", "Environment"),
     main = "Variance Partitioning: Geography vs Environment")

# Export variance partitioning results
varpart_df <- data.frame(
  Component = c("Pure_Geographic", "Pure_Environmental", "Shared", "Residual"),
  Description = c("Geography | Environment", "Environment | Geography", 
                 "Shared Variance", "Unexplained Variance"),
  R_squared = c(varpart_result$part$indfract$R.squared[1:3], residual),
  Adj_R_squared = c(pure_geo, pure_env, shared, residual),
  Percent_of_Total = c(pure_geo*100, pure_env*100, shared*100, residual*100),
  Interpretation = c(
    "Spatial processes independent of measured environment",
    "Environmental processes independent of geography", 
    "Geographic and environmental effects are confounded",
    "Variation not explained by geography or environment"
  )
)

write.csv(varpart_df, 
          file.path(output_dir, "Table_S7_Variance_Partitioning.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Ecological interpretation
cat(sprintf("\nECOLOGICAL INTERPRETATION:\n"))
if(pure_geo > 0.1) {
  cat("- Strong pure geographic effects suggest dispersal limitation or spatial autocorrelation\n")
} else if(pure_geo > 0.05) {
  cat("- Moderate geographic effects may indicate weak dispersal limitation\n") 
} else {
  cat("- Minimal pure geographic effects suggest environmental determinism\n")
}

if(shared > 0.1) {
  cat("- High shared variance indicates environmental gradients are spatially structured\n")
} else {
  cat("- Low shared variance suggests independent spatial and environmental processes\n")
}
```

===============================================================================
------ FINAL Mantel, partial mantel, and MRM consistent with 2mm and 18S ------
===============================================================================
Testing distance-decay relationships and environmental vs spatial effects
Using marmap least-cost geographic distances consistent with motile fauna analyses

Three Key Tests:
1. **Simple Mantel**: Geographic distance vs Community dissimilarity
   - Tests basic distance-decay relationship using least-cost paths
   - Positive correlation = communities become more different with distance
