2. **Environmental Mantel**: Environmental distance vs Community dissimilarity
   - Tests environmental filtering by depth-turbidity gradients
   - Should be strongly positive if nepheloid layer drives assembly

3. **Partial Mantel**: Geographic vs Community | Environmental 
   - Tests spatial autocorrelation beyond environmental effects
   - Non-significant = environmental filtering explains all patterns

Analysis Workflow:
1. **Data Preparation**: 4th root transformed community data with matched environmental metadata

2. **Environmental Variable Setup**: 
   - Integrates depth and turbidity_std_rank (temp_mean excluded due to depth correlation)
   - Standardizes variables for distance calculations
   - Checks for multicollinearity between predictors

3. **Distance Matrix Calculations**:
   - Community dissimilarity: Bray-Curtis from 4th root transformed data
   - Geographic distances: **marmap least-cost paths** accounting for bathymetric barriers
   - Environmental distances: Euclidean from standardized variables
   - Log1p transformation: Applied to handle zeros and improve linearity

4. **Statistical Tests**:
   - Simple Mantel tests: Geographic and environmental effects independently
   - Partial Mantel tests: Controlling for confounding between geography and environment
   - Multiple Regression on Distance Matrices (MRM): Simultaneous analysis of both predictors

5. **Visualization Suite**: 
   - Environmental filtering scatter plot
   - Geographic distance-decay scatter plot
   - MRM effect size comparison
   - Comprehensive summary of all tests

6. **Outputs**:
   - Mantel/Partial Mantel/MRM results as CSV files
   - Distance matrices saved as .Rdata and .csv
   - Combined 4-panel PDF figure
   - Formatted for direct comparison with motile 2mm fauna results
   
```{r}
# Load required packages
library(vegan)    # for mantel tests
library(ecodist)  # for MRM (multiple regression on distance matrices)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(marmap)   # for geographic distances

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("CORALNET MANTEL AND MRM ANALYSIS\n")
cat("Using 4th root transformed community data\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")

# ------------ DATA PREPARATION (using existing CoralNet objects) ------------

cat("\n=== CORALNET DATA PREPARATION ===\n")

# Use existing 4th root transformed community data and metadata
cat("Using existing CoralNet objects:\n")
cat("Community data:", nrow(community_4th_root_cn), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root_cn), "taxa\n")
cat("Metadata:", nrow(CN_metadata_FINAL), "samples x", ncol(CN_metadata_FINAL), "variables\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root_cn), rownames(CN_metadata_FINAL)), "\n")

# ------------ ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLES SETUP -----------

cat("\n=== ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLES SETUP ===\n")

# Select available environmental variables (excluding temp_mean due to correlation with depth)
env_vars_available_cn <- intersect(c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank"), 
                                  colnames(CN_metadata_FINAL))

env_vars_mantel_cn <- CN_metadata_FINAL %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(env_vars_available_cn)) %>%
  # Remove any samples with NA values
  na.omit()

cat("Environmental variables included:", ncol(env_vars_mantel_cn), "\n")
cat("Variables:", paste(colnames(env_vars_mantel_cn), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Samples with complete environmental data:", nrow(env_vars_mantel_cn), "\n")

# Match community and metadata to complete environmental data
env_samples_cn <- rownames(env_vars_mantel_cn)
community_complete_cn <- community_4th_root_cn[env_samples_cn, ]
metadata_complete_cn <- CN_metadata_FINAL[env_samples_cn, ]

cat("Final dataset dimensions:", nrow(community_complete_cn), "samples x", ncol(community_complete_cn), "taxa\n")

# Check correlations between environmental variables
env_cor_cn <- cor(env_vars_mantel_cn)
cat("\n=== ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE CORRELATIONS ===\n")
print(round(env_cor_cn, 3))

# Flag high correlations
high_cor_pairs_cn <- which(abs(env_cor_cn) > 0.7 & env_cor_cn != 1, arr.ind = TRUE)
if (nrow(high_cor_pairs_cn) > 0) {
  cat("High correlations detected between some variables\n")
  for (i in 1:nrow(high_cor_pairs_cn)) {
    var1 <- rownames(env_cor_cn)[high_cor_pairs_cn[i,1]]
    var2 <- colnames(env_cor_cn)[high_cor_pairs_cn[i,2]]
    cat(sprintf("  %s vs %s: r = %.3f\n", var1, var2, env_cor_cn[high_cor_pairs_cn[i,1], high_cor_pairs_cn[i,2]]))
  }
} else {
  cat("All correlations below 0.7\n")
}

# Standardize environmental variables for distance calculations
env_scaled_cn <- scale(env_vars_mantel_cn)
cat("Environmental variables standardized\n")

# ------------ DISTANCE MATRIX CALCULATIONS ------------

cat("\n=== DISTANCE MATRIX CALCULATIONS ===\n")

# 1. Community dissimilarity matrix (Bray-Curtis from 4th root transformed data)
community_dist_cn <- vegdist(community_complete_cn, method = "bray")
cat("Community distance matrix calculated (Bray-Curtis from 4th root data)\n")

# 2. Geographic distance matrix using marmap (consistent with motile approach)
cat("Calculating geographic distances using marmap least-cost approach...\n")

# Check for missing geographic coordinates
if (any(is.na(metadata_complete_cn[, c("latitude", "longitude")]))) {
  cat("Missing geographic coordinates detected\n")
  complete_geo_cn <- complete.cases(metadata_complete_cn[, c("latitude", "longitude")])
  metadata_complete_cn <- metadata_complete_cn[complete_geo_cn, ]
  env_scaled_cn <- env_scaled_cn[complete_geo_cn, ]
  community_complete_cn <- community_complete_cn[complete_geo_cn, ]
  community_dist_cn <- vegdist(community_complete_cn, method = "bray")
  cat("Updated sample size:", nrow(community_complete_cn), "\n")
}

# Create coordinate sites dataframe for CoralNet data
coord_sites_cn <- metadata_complete_cn[, c("longitude", "latitude")]
coord_sites_cn$depth <- metadata_complete_cn$depth

cat("Coordinate sites for CoralNet:\n")
cat("Samples:", nrow(coord_sites_cn), "\n")
cat("Longitude range:", round(range(coord_sites_cn$longitude), 3), "\n")
cat("Latitude range:", round(range(coord_sites_cn$latitude), 3), "\n")

# Load bathymetric data (same region as other analyses)
cat("Loading NOAA bathymetric data...\n")
bathydata_cn <- getNOAA.bathy(lon1 = -95, lon2 = -90, lat1 = 27, lat2 = 30, resolution = 0.2)

# Create transition matrix based on bathymetric data, constrained by minimum depth
cat("Creating transition matrix...\n")
t_cn <- trans.mat(bathydata_cn, min.depth = -0.1)

# Prepare site coordinates for least-cost distance calculation
xy_sites_cn <- as.data.frame(coord_sites_cn[, c("longitude", "latitude")])

# Calculate least-cost distance matrix in kilometers
cat("Calculating least-cost distances...\n")
leastDist.km_cn <- lc.dist(t_cn, xy_sites_cn, res = "dist")

# Convert to standard distance object for further analysis
geographic_dist_cn <- leastDist.km_cn

# Calculate minimum observed distance
min_dist_cn <- min(leastDist.km_cn)
cat("Geographic distance matrix calculated using marmap least-cost approach\n")
cat("Minimum distance between sites:", round(min_dist_cn, 2), "km\n")

# Save the distance matrix for later use
geoVenv_CN <- "/Users/nicolepittoors/Documents/Documents - biscaya/Bioinformatics/CoralNet/geoVenv_CN_noPP"

save(leastDist.km_cn, file = file.path(geoVenv_CN, 'leastDist.km_cn.Rdata'))

# Convert to matrix and dataframe for export
leastDist.km_cn_matrix <- as.matrix(leastDist.km_cn)
leastDist.km_cn_df <- as.data.frame(leastDist.km_cn_matrix)
write.csv(leastDist.km_cn_df, file = file.path(geoVenv_CN, "leastDist_km_cn.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

cat("Geographic distance data saved as leastDist.km_cn.Rdata and leastDist_km_cn.csv\n")

# 3. Environmental distance matrix (Euclidean distance from scaled variables)
environmental_dist_cn <- dist(env_scaled_cn, method = "euclidean")
cat("Environmental distance matrix calculated\n")


# ------------ LOG TRANSFORMATION OF DISTANCE MATRICES ------------
cat("\n=== LOG TRANSFORMATION OF DISTANCE MATRICES ===\n")

# Check for zero distances (which would cause issues with log transformation)
zero_geo_cn <- sum(geographic_dist_cn == 0)
zero_env_cn <- sum(environmental_dist_cn == 0)

cat("Zero distances detected:\n")
cat("  Geographic:", zero_geo_cn, "\n")
cat("  Environmental:", zero_env_cn, "\n")

# Use log1p transformation (log(1+x)) to handle zeros
log_geographic_dist_cn <- as.dist(log1p(as.matrix(geographic_dist_cn)))
log_environmental_dist_cn <- as.dist(log1p(as.matrix(environmental_dist_cn)))

cat("✓ Log-transformed distance matrices created using log1p\n")

# Summary of all distance matrices
cat("\nDistance matrix summary:\n")
cat("- Community dissimilarity (Bray-Curtis): range", round(range(community_dist_cn), 3), "\n")
cat("- Geographic distance: range", round(range(geographic_dist_cn), 3), "\n") 
cat("- Environmental distance: range", round(range(environmental_dist_cn), 3), "\n")
cat("- Log geographic distance: range", round(range(log_geographic_dist_cn), 3), "\n")
cat("- Log environmental distance: range", round(range(log_environmental_dist_cn), 3), "\n")

# Save community distance matrix
community_dist_cn_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(community_dist_cn))
write.csv(community_dist_cn_df, file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Community_Distance_Matrix.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
save(community_dist_cn, file = file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Community_Distance_Matrix.Rdata"))

# Save environmental distance matrix  
environmental_dist_cn_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(environmental_dist_cn))
write.csv(environmental_dist_cn_df, file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Environmental_Distance_Matrix.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
save(environmental_dist_cn, file = file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Environmental_Distance_Matrix.Rdata"))

# Save log-transformed environmental distance matrix
log_environmental_dist_cn_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(log_environmental_dist_cn))
write.csv(log_environmental_dist_cn_df, file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Log_Environmental_Distance_Matrix.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
save(log_environmental_dist_cn, file = file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Log_Environmental_Distance_Matrix.Rdata"))

# Save log-transformed geographic distance matrix  
log_geographic_dist_cn_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(log_geographic_dist_cn))
write.csv(log_geographic_dist_cn_df, file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Log_Geographic_Distance_Matrix.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
save(log_geographic_dist_cn, file = file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Log_Geographic_Distance_Matrix.Rdata"))

# ------------------- MANTEL TESTS-----------------

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("MANTEL TESTS FOR CORALNET SESSILE COMMUNITIES\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")

# 1. Environmental Mantel Test
cat("\n1. ENVIRONMENTAL MANTEL TEST\n")
cat("Community dissimilarity ~ Log(Environmental distance)\n")

mantel_env_cn <- vegan::mantel(community_dist_cn, log_environmental_dist_cn, 
                              method = "pearson", permutations = 9999)

cat("Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Mantel statistic (r): %.3f\n", mantel_env_cn$statistic))
cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.3f\n", mantel_env_cn$signif))

if (mantel_env_cn$signif < 0.05) {
  cat("  SIGNIFICANT environmental-community relationship\n")
} else {
  cat("  NO significant environmental-community relationship\n")
}

# 2. Geographic Mantel Test (Distance-Decay)
cat("\n2. GEOGRAPHIC MANTEL TEST (Distance-Decay)\n")
cat("Community dissimilarity ~ Log(Geographic distance)\n")

mantel_geo_cn <- vegan::mantel(community_dist_cn, log_geographic_dist_cn, 
                              method = "pearson", permutations = 9999)

cat("Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Mantel statistic (r): %.3f\n", mantel_geo_cn$statistic))
cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.3f\n", mantel_geo_cn$signif))

if (mantel_geo_cn$signif < 0.05) {
  if (mantel_geo_cn$statistic > 0) {
    cat("  SIGNIFICANT POSITIVE distance-decay: Community similarity decreases with distance\n")
  } else {
    cat("  SIGNIFICANT NEGATIVE relationship: Community similarity increases with distance\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("  NO significant distance-decay relationship\n")
}

# ------------ PARTIAL MANTEL TESTS ------------

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("PARTIAL MANTEL TESTS FOR CORALNET SESSILE COMMUNITIES\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")

# 1. Partial Mantel: Environment controlling for Geography
cat("\n1. PARTIAL MANTEL TEST: ENVIRONMENT | GEOGRAPHY\n")
cat("Community dissimilarity ~ Log(Environmental distance) | Log(Geographic distance)\n")

partial_mantel_env_geo_cn <- vegan::mantel.partial(community_dist_cn, log_environmental_dist_cn, log_geographic_dist_cn,
                                                   method = "pearson", permutations = 9999)

cat("Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Partial Mantel statistic (r): %.3f\n", partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$statistic))
cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.3f\n", partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif))

if (partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif < 0.05) {
  cat("  SIGNIFICANT environmental effects beyond geography\n")
  cat("  Environmental filtering operates independently of spatial processes\n")
} else {
  cat("  NO environmental effects beyond geography\n")
  cat("  Environmental patterns may be confounded with spatial structure\n")
}

# 2. Partial Mantel: Geography controlling for Environment
cat("\n2. PARTIAL MANTEL TEST: GEOGRAPHY | ENVIRONMENT\n")
cat("Community dissimilarity ~ Log(Geographic distance) | Log(Environmental distance)\n")

partial_mantel_geo_env_cn <- vegan::mantel.partial(community_dist_cn, log_geographic_dist_cn, log_environmental_dist_cn,
                                                   method = "pearson", permutations = 9999)

cat("Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Partial Mantel statistic (r): %.3f\n", partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$statistic))
cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.3f\n", partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif))

if (partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif < 0.05) {
  if (partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$statistic > 0) {
    cat("  SIGNIFICANT residual distance-decay: Geography matters beyond environment\n")
    cat("  Suggests dispersal limitation or unmeasured spatial processes\n")
  } else {
    cat("  SIGNIFICANT negative residual relationship\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("  NO residual distance-decay after controlling for environment\n")
  cat("  Geographic patterns fully explained by environmental gradients\n")
  cat("  Supports environmental filtering over dispersal limitation\n")
}

# ------------ MULTIPLE REGRESSION ON DISTANCE MATRICES (MRM) ------------

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("MULTIPLE REGRESSION ON DISTANCE MATRICES (MRM)\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")

# Prepare data for MRM
# Convert distance matrices to vectors
bc_dist_vec_cn <- as.vector(community_dist_cn)
env_dist_vec_cn <- as.vector(log_environmental_dist_cn)
geo_dist_vec_cn <- as.vector(log_geographic_dist_cn)

# Create matched dataframe
mrm_data_cn <- data.frame(
  bc_dist = bc_dist_vec_cn,
  log_env_dist = env_dist_vec_cn,
  log_geo_dist = geo_dist_vec_cn
)

cat("MRM data prepared: ", nrow(mrm_data_cn), " pairwise comparisons\n")

# Run MRM analysis
cat("Running MRM with environmental and geographic predictors...\n")
mrm_result_cn <- ecodist::MRM(mrm_data_cn$bc_dist ~ mrm_data_cn$log_env_dist + mrm_data_cn$log_geo_dist, 
                             nperm = 9999)

# Display MRM results
cat("\n=== MRM RESULTS FOR CORALNET SESSILE COMMUNITIES ===\n")
print(mrm_result_cn)

# Extract key results
env_coef_cn <- mrm_result_cn$coef[2,1]
geo_coef_cn <- mrm_result_cn$coef[3,1]
env_p_cn <- mrm_result_cn$coef[2,2]
geo_p_cn <- mrm_result_cn$coef[3,2]
model_r2_cn <- mrm_result_cn$r.squared[1]
model_p_cn <- mrm_result_cn$r.squared[2]

cat("\nKey Findings:\n")
cat(sprintf("Model R²: %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", model_r2_cn, model_p_cn))
cat(sprintf("Environmental coefficient: %.3f (p = %.3f) %s\n", 
            env_coef_cn, env_p_cn, ifelse(env_p_cn < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
cat(sprintf("Geographic coefficient: %.3f (p = %.3f) %s\n", 
            geo_coef_cn, geo_p_cn, ifelse(geo_p_cn < 0.05, "*", "ns")))

# ------------ EXTRACT RESULTS FOR EXPORT ------------

cat("\n=== EXTRACTING RESULTS FOR EXPORT ===\n")

# Mantel results
mantel_results_cn <- data.frame(
  Dataset = c("CoralNet_Sessile", "CoralNet_Sessile"),
  Distance_Type = c("Environmental", "Geographic"),
  Mantel_r = c(mantel_env_cn$statistic, mantel_geo_cn$statistic),
  P_value = c(mantel_env_cn$signif, mantel_geo_cn$signif),
  Significance = c(
    ifelse(mantel_env_cn$signif < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(mantel_env_cn$signif < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(mantel_env_cn$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
    ifelse(mantel_geo_cn$signif < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(mantel_geo_cn$signif < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(mantel_geo_cn$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Partial Mantel results
partial_mantel_results_cn <- data.frame(
  Dataset = c("CoralNet_Sessile", "CoralNet_Sessile"),
  Test_Variable = c("Environmental_controlling_Geographic", "Geographic_controlling_Environmental"),
  Partial_Mantel_r = c(partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$statistic, partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$statistic),
  P_value = c(partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif, partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif),
  Significance = c(
    ifelse(partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
    ifelse(partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# MRM results
mrm_results_cn <- data.frame(
  Dataset = c("CoralNet_Sessile", "CoralNet_Sessile"),
  Variable = c("Environmental_Distance", "Geographic_Distance"),
  Beta_Coefficient = c(env_coef_cn, geo_coef_cn),
  P_value = c(env_p_cn, geo_p_cn),
  Model_R2 = c(model_r2_cn, model_r2_cn),
  Model_P_value = c(model_p_cn, model_p_cn),
  Significance = c(
    ifelse(env_p_cn < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(env_p_cn < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(env_p_cn < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
    ifelse(geo_p_cn < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(geo_p_cn < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(geo_p_cn < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Export results
write.csv(mantel_results_cn, file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Mantel_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(partial_mantel_results_cn, file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Partial_Mantel_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(mrm_results_cn, file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_MRM_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

cat("Results exported to CoralNet_Results directory\n")

# ------------ CREATE VISUALIZATIONS ------------

cat("\n=== CREATING VISUALIZATIONS ===\n")

# Prepare visualization data
viz_data_cn <- data.frame(
  BC_Distance = bc_dist_vec_cn,
  Env_Distance = env_dist_vec_cn,
  Geo_Distance = geo_dist_vec_cn,
  Dataset = "CoralNet Sessile"
)

# 1. Environmental effects plot
p1_cn <- ggplot(viz_data_cn, aes(x = Env_Distance, y = BC_Distance)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "#3B8C6E") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#3B8C6E", fill = "#3B8C6E") +
  labs(x = "Environmental Distance (log-transformed)",
       y = "Community Dissimilarity (Bray-Curtis)",
       title = "CoralNet Sessile: Environmental Filtering",
       subtitle = paste0("Mantel r = ", round(mantel_env_cn$statistic, 3), 
                        ", p = ", round(mantel_env_cn$signif, 3))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10))

# 2. Geographic effects plot
p2_cn <- ggplot(viz_data_cn, aes(x = Geo_Distance, y = BC_Distance)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "#3B8C6E") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#3B8C6E", fill = "#3B8C6E") +
  labs(x = "Geographic Distance (log-transformed km)",
       y = "Community Dissimilarity (Bray-Curtis)",
       title = "CoralNet Sessile: Dispersal Limitation", 
       subtitle = paste0("Mantel r = ", round(mantel_geo_cn$statistic, 3),
                        ", p = ", round(mantel_geo_cn$signif, 3))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10))

# 3. MRM coefficients plot
effect_sizes_cn <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("Environmental", "Geographic"),
  Coefficient = c(env_coef_cn, geo_coef_cn),
  P_value = c(env_p_cn, geo_p_cn),
  Significance = c(
    ifelse(env_p_cn < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(env_p_cn < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(env_p_cn < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
    ifelse(geo_p_cn < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(geo_p_cn < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(geo_p_cn < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  )
)

p3_cn <- ggplot(effect_sizes_cn, aes(x = Variable, y = Coefficient, fill = Variable)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Significance), 
            vjust = ifelse(effect_sizes_cn$Coefficient >= 0, -0.5, 1.2), 
            size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = "Distance Type",
       y = "Standardized Coefficient (β)",
       title = "CoralNet Sessile: MRM Effect Sizes",
       subtitle = paste0("Model R² = ", round(model_r2_cn, 3), ", p = ", round(model_p_cn, 3))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Environmental" = "#408BA8", "Geographic" = "#812A5A")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.7)

# 4. Summary comparison plot
summary_data_cn <- data.frame(
  Test = c("Environmental\nMantel", "Geographic\nMantel", "Partial Env\n(|Geography)", "Partial Geo\n(|Environment)"),
  Correlation = c(mantel_env_cn$statistic, mantel_geo_cn$statistic,
                  partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$statistic, partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$statistic),
  P_value = c(mantel_env_cn$signif, mantel_geo_cn$signif,
              partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif, partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif),
  Significant = factor(c(mantel_env_cn$signif < 0.05, mantel_geo_cn$signif < 0.05,
                        partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif < 0.05, partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif < 0.05))
)

p4_cn <- ggplot(summary_data_cn, aes(x = reorder(Test, abs(Correlation)), y = Correlation, fill = Significant)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("p=", round(P_value, 3))), 
            hjust = ifelse(summary_data_cn$Correlation >= 0, -0.1, 1.1), 
            size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Analysis Type",
       y = "Correlation Coefficient",
       title = "CoralNet Sessile: Analysis Summary",
       fill = "Significant\n(p < 0.05)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#408BA8", "FALSE" = "grey70"))

# Combine plots
combined_plot_cn <- grid.arrange(p1_cn, p2_cn, p3_cn, p4_cn, 
                                layout_matrix = rbind(c(1,2), c(3,4)))

# Save plots
ggsave(file.path(geoVenv_CN, "CoralNet_Distance_Relationships.pdf"), combined_plot_cn, 
       width = 16, height = 11, dpi = 300)

cat("Visualizations saved to CoralNet_Results directory\n")

# ------------ FINAL SUMMARY ------------

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("CORALNET MANTEL/MRM ANALYSIS SUMMARY\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat("Sample size:", nrow(community_complete_cn), "samples\n")
cat("Taxa analyzed:", ncol(community_complete_cn), "\n")
cat("Environmental variables:", ncol(env_vars_mantel_cn), "\n")
cat("Pairwise comparisons:", nrow(mrm_data_cn), "\n\n")

cat("Key Findings:\n")
cat(sprintf("Environmental Mantel r = %.3f (p = %.3f) %s\n", 
            mantel_env_cn$statistic, mantel_env_cn$signif,
            ifelse(mantel_env_cn$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
cat(sprintf("Geographic Mantel r = %.3f (p = %.3f) %s\n", 
            mantel_geo_cn$statistic, mantel_geo_cn$signif,
            ifelse(mantel_geo_cn$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
cat(sprintf("Partial Environmental r = %.3f (p = %.3f) %s\n", 
            partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$statistic, partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif,
            ifelse(partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
cat(sprintf("Partial Geographic r = %.3f (p = %.3f) %s\n", 
            partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$statistic, partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif,
            ifelse(partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
cat(sprintf("MRM Model R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", model_r2_cn, model_p_cn))

cat("\nInterpretation for CoralNet sessile communities:\n")
if (partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif < partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif) {
  cat("Environmental filtering appears stronger than dispersal limitation\n")
} else if (partial_mantel_geo_env_cn$signif < partial_mantel_env_geo_cn$signif) {
  cat("Dispersal limitation appears stronger than environmental filtering\n")
} else {
  cat("Environmental filtering and dispersal limitation show similar patterns\n")
}

cat("\nFiles exported:\n")
cat("CoralNet_Mantel_Results.csv\n")
cat("CoralNet_Partial_Mantel_Results.csv\n")
cat("CoralNet_MRM_Results.csv\n")
cat("CoralNet_Distance_Relationships.pdf\n")
cat("leastDist.km_cn.Rdata\n")
cat("leastDist_km_cn.csv\n")

cat("\nAnalysis complete - ready for comparison with motile 2mm results\n")
```


#--------------- NMDS Bray-Curtis of Proportions --------------

# NMDS Bray-Curtis by SITE LOCALITY using proportions
```{r}
# Calculate Bray-Curtis dissimilarity
bray_dist <- vegdist(CN_pcover_combined, method = "bray")

# NMDS ordination
set.seed(123)  # For reproducibility
nmds_bray <- metaMDS(CN_pcover_combined, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 1000)

# Check stress value
print(paste("NMDS Stress:", round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)))

# Extract NMDS scores
nmds_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds_bray, display = "sites"))
nmds_scores$sitelocality <- CN_metadata_final$site2
nmds_scores$ARMS_ID <- rownames(nmds_scores)

# Set the correct order for sitelocality, west to east
available_sites <- unique(nmds_scores$sitelocality)
site_order <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_shallow", "EFGB_deep",
                "Bright_shallow","Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_shallow", "Alderdice_deep1", 
                "Alderdice_deep2","Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

# Filter to only available sites
ordered_sites <- site_order[site_order %in% available_sites]
nmds_scores$sitelocality <- factor(nmds_scores$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites)

# Function to calculate convex hull
find_hull <- function(df) df[chull(df$NMDS1, df$NMDS2), ]

# Calculate convex hulls for each site
hulls <- nmds_scores %>% 
  group_by(sitelocality) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

# Create the site-based NMDS plot
p_site <- ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = sitelocality, fill = sitelocality), 
               alpha = 0.4,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Set color scheme
  scale_fill_manual(values = cn_sites_colors) +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: Bray-Curtis NMDS", 
       fill = "Site Locality") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 2)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_site)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_Bray_sites.pdf", plot = p_site, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```


# NMDS Bray-Curtis colored by DEPTH
```{r}
nmds_scores_depth <- nmds_scores
nmds_scores_depth$depth <- CN_metadata_final$depth

# Calculate hulls for depth
hulls_depth <- nmds_scores_depth %>% 
  group_by(depth) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

p_depth <- ggplot(nmds_scores_depth, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_depth, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = depth, fill = depth), 
               alpha = 0.3,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = depth), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Color scale
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (m)", direction = -1) +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: NMDS by Depth", 
       fill = "Depth (m)") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (m)", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_depth)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_bray_depth.pdf", plot = p_depth, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```


# NMDS Bray-Curtis colored by TURBIDITY
```{r}
nmds_scores_turb <- nmds_scores
nmds_scores_turb$turbidity_std_rank <- CN_metadata_final$turbidity_std_rank

# Calculate hulls for turbidity
hulls_turb <- nmds_scores_turb %>% 
  group_by(turbidity_std_rank) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

p_turb <- ggplot(nmds_scores_turb, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_turb, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = turbidity_std_rank, fill = turbidity_std_rank), 
               alpha = 0.3,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = turbidity_std_rank), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Color scale
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "Turbidity Rank") +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: NMDS by Turbidity", 
       fill = "Turbidity Rank") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Turbidity Rank", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_turb)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_turbidity.pdf", plot = p_turb, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Plot site, temp, and turbidity NMDS plots all in one figure
```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# Create plots with legends at bottom for the combined figure
p_site_bottom <- p_site + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_temp_bottom <- p_temp + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_turb_bottom <- p_turb + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Combine plots with patchwork - legends will be included automatically
combined_plot <- p_site_bottom | p_temp_bottom | p_turb_bottom

# Add overall title and panel labels
combined_plot <- combined_plot +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: Bray-Curtis NMDS",
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_plot)

# Save the combined plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_Bray_combined.pdf", plot = combined_plot, 
       width = 15, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# ----------------- NMDS based on Jaccard's distance (presence/absence)---------------
# For comparison with presence/absence eDNA data

# Convert to presence/absence (0/1)
```{r}
# Make sure we're using the correctly combined data
CN_pa <- CN_counts_combined
CN_pa[CN_pa > 0] <- 1

# Check dimensions and alignment
cat("CN_pa dimensions:", nrow(CN_pa), "x", ncol(CN_pa), "\n")
cat("CN_metadata_final dimensions:", nrow(CN_metadata_final), "x", ncol(CN_metadata_final), "\n")
cat("Row names match:", all(rownames(CN_pa) == rownames(CN_metadata_final)), "\n")

# Show sample of row names to verify alignment
cat("\nFirst 5 rownames CN_pa:", head(rownames(CN_pa), 5), "\n")
cat("First 5 rownames metadata:", head(rownames(CN_metadata_final), 5), "\n")
```

# Calculate Hulls Function
```{r}
# Function to find convex hull points
find_hull <- function(df) {
  # Remove any rows with NA values in NMDS coordinates
  df_clean <- df[complete.cases(df[, c("NMDS1", "NMDS2")]), ]
  
  # Need at least 3 points to form a hull
  if (nrow(df_clean) < 3) {
    return(data.frame(NMDS1 = numeric(0), NMDS2 = numeric(0)))
  }
  
  # Find convex hull
  hull_indices <- chull(df_clean$NMDS1, df_clean$NMDS2)
  
  # Return hull points
  return(df_clean[hull_indices, ])
}
```


# Panel A: Jaccard NMDS by SITE
```{r}
# Calculate hulls for each site
hulls_site <- nmds_scores_pa %>% 
  filter(!is.na(sitelocality)) %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.)) %>%
  ungroup()

p_jaccard_site_clean <- ggplot(nmds_scores_pa %>% filter(!is.na(sitelocality)), 
                               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  # Add hulls first (behind points)
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_site, aes(fill = sitelocality), 
               alpha = 0.3, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # Add points with larger size and black outline for clarity
  geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 6, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 1.0) + 
  
  # Use the same color scheme
  scale_fill_manual(values = cn_sites_colors) +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Presence/Absence: Jaccard NMDS", 
       x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2",
       fill = "Site") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 3, override.aes = list(size = 4))) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores_pa$NMDS1, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.8, 
           y = min(nmds_scores_pa$NMDS2, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_jaccard$stress, 3)), size = 5)

print(p_jaccard_site_clean)
```

# Panel B: By DEPTH
```{r}
nmds_scores_pa_depth <- nmds_scores_pa
nmds_scores_pa_depth$depth <- CN_metadata_final$depth
# Calculate hulls for depth
hulls_depth_pa <- nmds_scores_depth %>% 
  group_by(depth) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

# Add temperature variable to NMDS scores
nmds_scores_pa$depth <- CN_metadata_final$depth[match(rownames(nmds_scores_pa), rownames(CN_metadata_final))]

p_jaccard_depth_clean <- ggplot(nmds_scores_pa %>% filter(!is.na(sitelocality)), 
                               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_depth_pa, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = depth, fill = depth), 
               alpha = 0.5,  
               color = NA)+
  # Add points colored by temperature
  geom_point(aes(fill = depth), size = 6, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 1.0) + 
  
  # Temperature color scale (same as Bray-Curtis)
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (meters)", direction = -1) +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: NMDS by Depth", 
       x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Mean Temperature (°C)", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores_pa$NMDS1, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.8, 
           y = min(nmds_scores_pa$NMDS2, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_jaccard$stress, 3)), size = 5)

print(p_jaccard_depth_clean)
```
```{r}
# Create broader depth categories
nmds_scores_depth_clean <- nmds_scores %>%
  mutate(
    depth = CN_metadata_final$depth[match(rownames(.), rownames(CN_metadata_final))],
    depth_zone = case_when(
      depth <= 60 ~ "Shallow (≤60m)",
      depth <= 75 ~ "Medium (60-75m)", 
      TRUE ~ "Deep (>75m)"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(depth))

# Check sample sizes
depth_zone_counts <- nmds_scores_depth_clean %>% count(depth_zone)
cat("Depth zone sample sizes:\n")
print(depth_zone_counts)

# Calculate hulls for depth zones
hulls_depth_zones <- nmds_scores_depth_clean %>% 
  group_by(depth_zone) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Plot with cleaner depth zones
p_depth_zones <- ggplot(nmds_scores_depth_clean, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls with distinct colors
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_depth_zones, 
               aes(fill = depth_zone), alpha = 0.4, color = "white", size = 0.5) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  # Add points colored by continuous depth but with zone shapes
  geom_point(aes(color = depth, shape = depth_zone), size = 5, stroke = 1.2) + 
  # Separate scales for hull fill and point color
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Shallow (≤60m)" = "#2166ac", 
                               "Medium (60-75m)" = "#762a83", 
                               "Deep (>75m)" = "#1b7837"),
                    name = "Depth Zone") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (m)", direction = -1) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Shallow (≤60m)" = 21, 
                                "Medium (60-75m)" = 22, 
                                "Deep (>75m)" = 23),
                     name = "Depth Zone") +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet NMDS: Cleaner Depth Zones", 
       x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(title = "Depth Zone", order = 1, override.aes = list(alpha = 0.7)),
    color = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (m)", order = 2, barwidth = 10, barheight = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Depth Zone", order = 3)
  ) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores_depth_clean$NMDS1) * 0.8, 
           y = min(nmds_scores_depth_clean$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 5)

print(p_depth_zones)

```

# Panel C: By TURBIDITY
```{r}
# Add turbidity variable to NMDS scores
nmds_scores_pa$turbidity_std_rank <- CN_metadata_final$turbidity_std_rank[match(rownames(nmds_scores_pa), rownames(CN_metadata_final))]

p_jaccard_turb_clean <- ggplot(nmds_scores_pa %>% filter(!is.na(sitelocality)), 
                               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add points colored by turbidity
  geom_point(aes(fill = turbidity_std_rank), size = 6, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 1.0) + 
  
  # Turbidity color scale (same as Bray-Curtis)
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "Turbidity Rank") +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: NMDS by Turbidity", 
       x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Mean Turbidity Rank", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores_pa$NMDS1, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.8, 
           y = min(nmds_scores_pa$NMDS2, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_jaccard$stress, 3)), size = 5)

print(p_jaccard_turb_clean)
```

# Create three-panel combined figure
```{r}
# Remove individual titles for combined plot
p_jaccard_site_panel <- p_jaccard_site_clean + labs(title = NULL)
p_jaccard_depth_panel <- p_jaccard_depth_clean + labs(title = NULL)
p_jaccard_turb_panel <- p_jaccard_turb_clean + labs(title = NULL)

# Combine plots
combined_jaccard_final <- p_jaccard_site_panel | p_jaccard_depth_panel | p_jaccard_turb_panel

# Add overall title and panel labels
combined_jaccard_final <- combined_jaccard_final +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "CoralNet Presence/Absence: Jaccard NMDS",
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_jaccard_final)

# Save the final combined plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_Jaccard_Combined.pdf", plot = combined_jaccard_final, 
       width = 17, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```


# Diagnostic: Compare with Bray-Curtis results
```{r}
# Compare stress values and patterns
cat("Bray-Curtis NMDS stress:", round(nmds_bray$stress, 3), "\n")
cat("Jaccard NMDS stress:", round(nmds_jaccard$stress, 3), "\n")

# Test if the data transformation worked correctly
cat("\nPresence/Absence conversion check:\n")
cat("Original count range:", range(CN_counts_combined, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("PA conversion range:", range(CN_pa, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Proportion of non-zero values in PA:", mean(CN_pa > 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

# Check if sites are properly separated
pa_dist <- vegdist(CN_pa, method = "jaccard", binary = TRUE)
bray_dist <- vegdist(CN_pcover_combined, method = "bray")

cat("Average Jaccard distance:", mean(pa_dist), "\n")
cat("Average Bray-Curtis distance:", mean(bray_dist), "\n")
```

# NMDS with 4th root transformed data
```{r}
# ------------ NMDS ANALYSIS WITH 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA ------------
# Updated to use 4th root transformed community data and include PP_mean

# ------------ NMDS ORDINATION WITH 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA ------------

# Calculate Bray-Curtis dissimilarity from 4th root transformed data
bray_dist <- vegdist(community_4th_root, method = "bray")

# NMDS ordination
set.seed(123)  # For reproducibility
nmds_bray <- metaMDS(community_4th_root, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 1000)

# Check stress value
print(paste("NMDS Stress:", round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)))

# Extract NMDS scores
nmds_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds_bray, display = "sites"))
nmds_scores$sitelocality <- metadata_matched$site2
nmds_scores$ARMS_ID <- rownames(nmds_scores)

# Set the correct order for sitelocality, west to east
available_sites <- unique(nmds_scores$sitelocality)
site_order <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_shallow", "EFGB_deep",
                "Bright_shallow","Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_shallow", "Alderdice_deep1", 
                "Alderdice_deep2","Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

# Filter to only available sites
ordered_sites <- site_order[site_order %in% available_sites]
nmds_scores$sitelocality <- factor(nmds_scores$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites)

# Function to calculate convex hull
find_hull <- function(df) df[chull(df$NMDS1, df$NMDS2), ]

# Calculate convex hulls for each site
hulls <- nmds_scores %>% 
  group_by(sitelocality) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))



# NMDS Bray-Curtis by SITE LOCALITY using 4th root transformed data
p_site <- ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = sitelocality, fill = sitelocality), 
               alpha = 0.4,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Set color scheme
  scale_fill_manual(values = cn_sites_colors) +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: Bray-Curtis NMDS (4th Root)", 
       fill = "Site Locality") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 2)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_site)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_Bray_sites_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_site, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# ------------ NMDS Bray-Curtis colored by TEMPERATURE (if available) ------------

if("temp_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_matched)) {
  # Create temperature plot
  nmds_scores_temp <- nmds_scores
  nmds_scores_temp$temp_mean <- metadata_matched$temp_mean

  # Calculate hulls for temperature
  hulls_temp <- nmds_scores_temp %>% 
    group_by(temp_mean) %>% 
    do(find_hull(.))

  p_temp <- ggplot(nmds_scores_temp, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
    # Add hulls
    geom_polygon(data = hulls_temp, 
                 aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = temp_mean, fill = temp_mean), 
                 alpha = 0.3,  
                 color = NA) +
    # Add reference lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    # Add points
    geom_point(aes(fill = temp_mean), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
    # Color scale
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Mean Temperature (°C)") +
    # Labels and theme
    labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: NMDS by Temperature (4th Root)", 
         fill = "Mean Temperature (°C)") +
    theme_light() + 
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
          axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Mean Temperature (°C)", 
                                 title.position = "top", 
                                 barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
    annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
             label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

  print(p_temp)

  # Save plot
  ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_Bray_temperature_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_temp, 
         width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
} else {
  cat("Temperature data not available - skipping temperature plot\n")
  p_temp <- NULL
}

# ------------ NMDS Bray-Curtis colored by DEPTH ------------

nmds_scores_depth <- nmds_scores
nmds_scores_depth$depth <- metadata_matched$depth

# Calculate hulls for depth
hulls_depth <- nmds_scores_depth %>% 
  group_by(depth) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

p_depth <- ggplot(nmds_scores_depth, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_depth, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = depth, fill = depth), 
               alpha = 0.4,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = depth), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Color scale
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (m)", direction = -1) +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: NMDS by Depth (4th Root)", 
       fill = "Depth (m)") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (m)", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_depth)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_bray_depth_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_depth, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# ------------ NMDS Bray-Curtis colored by TURBIDITY ------------

nmds_scores_turb <- nmds_scores
nmds_scores_turb$turbidity_std_rank <- metadata_matched$turbidity_std_rank

# Calculate hulls for turbidity
hulls_turb <- nmds_scores_turb %>% 
  group_by(turbidity_std_rank) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

p_turb <- ggplot(nmds_scores_turb, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_turb, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = turbidity_std_rank, fill = turbidity_std_rank), 
               alpha = 0.3,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = turbidity_std_rank), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Color scale
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "Turbidity Rank") +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: NMDS by Turbidity (4th Root)", 
       fill = "Turbidity Rank") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Turbidity Rank", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_turb)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_turbidity_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_turb, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# ------------ NMDS Bray-Curtis colored by PP_MEAN (if available) ------------

if("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_matched)) {
  nmds_scores_pp <- nmds_scores
  nmds_scores_pp$PP_mean <- metadata_matched$PP_mean

  # Calculate hulls for PP_mean
  hulls_pp <- nmds_scores_pp %>% 
    group_by(PP_mean) %>% 
    do(find_hull(.))

  p_pp <- ggplot(nmds_scores_pp, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
    # Add hulls
    geom_polygon(data = hulls_pp, 
                 aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = PP_mean, fill = PP_mean), 
                 alpha = 0.3,  
                 color = NA) +
    # Add reference lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    # Add points
    geom_point(aes(fill = PP_mean), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
    # Color scale
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "Primary Productivity") +
    # Labels and theme
    labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: NMDS by Primary Productivity (4th Root)", 
         fill = "Primary Productivity") +
    theme_light() + 
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
          axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Primary Productivity", 
                                 title.position = "top", 
                                 barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
    annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
             label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

  print(p_pp)

  # Save plot
  ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_PP_mean_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_pp, 
         width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
} else {
  cat("PP_mean data not available - skipping primary productivity plot\n")
  p_pp <- NULL
}

# ------------ COMBINED PLOT ------------

# Create plots with legends at bottom for the combined figure
p_site_bottom <- p_site + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_depth_bottom <- p_depth + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_turb_bottom <- p_turb + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Create base combination with required plots
#if(!is.null(p_temp) && !is.null(p_pp)) {
  # All plots available - create 2x3 layout
#  p_temp_bottom <- p_temp + labs(title = NULL) + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
#  p_pp_bottom <- p_pp + labs(title = NULL) + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
#  combined_plot <- (p_site_bottom | p_depth_bottom | p_turb_bottom) / 
#                   (p_temp_bottom | p_pp_bottom | plot_spacer())
  
#} else if(!is.null(p_temp)) {
  # Temperature available but not PP_mean
#  p_temp_bottom <- p_temp + labs(title = NULL) + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
#  combined_plot <- p_site_bottom | p_depth_bottom | p_turb_bottom | p_temp_bottom
  
#} else if(!is.null(p_pp)) {
  # PP_mean available but not temperature
#  p_pp_bottom <- p_pp + labs(title = NULL) + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
#  combined_plot <- p_site_bottom | p_depth_bottom | p_turb_bottom | p_pp_bottom
  
#} else {
  # Only basic plots
  combined_plot <- p_site_bottom | p_depth_bottom | p_turb_bottom
#}

# Add overall title and panel labels
combined_plot <- combined_plot +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: Bray-Curtis NMDS (4th Root Transformed)",
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_plot)

# Save the combined plot
ggsave("CoralNet_NMDS_Bray_combined_4thRoot.pdf", plot = combined_plot, 
       width = 17, height = 7.5, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

#--------------- PCoAs 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED BRAY's DISTANCE-----------------
```{r}
# ------------ PCoA ANALYSIS WITH 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA ------------
# Updated to use 4th root transformed community data and include PP_mean

library(ape)      # for pcoa function
library(vegan)    # for envfit
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)

# ------------ CALCULATE PCoA USING 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA ------------

# Calculate Bray-Curtis distance from 4th root transformed data
bray_dist <- vegdist(community_4th_root, method = "bray")

# Run PCoA
pcoa_result <- pcoa(bray_dist)

# Extract PCoA scores
pcoa_scores <- as.data.frame(pcoa_result$vectors[, 1:2])
colnames(pcoa_scores) <- c("PCoA1", "PCoA2")

# Add metadata
pcoa_scores$site2 <- metadata_matched$site2
pcoa_scores$ARMS_ID <- rownames(pcoa_scores)
pcoa_scores$depth <- metadata_matched$depth
pcoa_scores$turbidity_std_rank <- metadata_matched$turbidity_std_rank

# Add PP_mean if available
if("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_matched)) {
  pcoa_scores$PP_mean <- metadata_matched$PP_mean
  cat("PP_mean added to PCoA scores\n")
} else {
  cat(" PP_mean not found in metadata\n")
}

# Add temperature if available
if("temp_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_matched)) {
  pcoa_scores$temp_mean <- metadata_matched$temp_mean
  cat("temp_mean added to PCoA scores\n")
} else {
  cat("temp_mean not found in metadata\n")
}

# Apply the same site ordering as NMDS (west to east)
available_sites <- unique(pcoa_scores$site2)
site_order <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_shallow", "EFGB_deep", 
                "Bright_shallow","Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_shallow", "Alderdice_deep1", 
                "Alderdice_deep2", "Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

# Filter to only available sites
ordered_sites <- site_order[site_order %in% available_sites]
pcoa_scores$site2 <- factor(pcoa_scores$site2, levels = ordered_sites)

# Calculate variance explained by each axis
pcoa_var_explained <- pcoa_result$values$Relative_eig * 100
axis1_var_pcoa <- round(pcoa_var_explained[1], 1)
axis2_var_pcoa <- round(pcoa_var_explained[2], 1)

cat("=== PCoA RESULTS (4th Root Transformed Data) ===\n")
cat("PCoA1 explains:", axis1_var_pcoa, "% of variance\n")
cat("PCoA2 explains:", axis2_var_pcoa, "% of variance\n")
cat("Total explained by first 2 axes:", round(axis1_var_pcoa + axis2_var_pcoa, 1), "%\n")


# ------------ PANEL A: PCoA BY SITE ------------
p_pcoa_site <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = site2), size = 8, shape = 21, alpha = 0.9) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = cn_sites_colors) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: PCoA Bray-Curtis (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)"),
       fill = "Site") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 3, override.aes = list(size = 4)))

print(p_pcoa_site)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Sites_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_site, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# ------------ PANEL B: PCoA BY DEPTH ------------

p_pcoa_depth <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = depth), size = 8, shape = 21, alpha = 0.9) + 
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (meters)", direction = -1) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: PCoA by Depth (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)")) +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (meters)", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))

print(p_pcoa_depth)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Depth_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_depth, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# ------------ PANEL C: PCoA BY TURBIDITY ------------

p_pcoa_turb <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = turbidity_std_rank), size = 8, alpha = 0.9) + 
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "Turbidity Rank") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: PCoA by Turbidity (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)")) +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Turbidity Rank", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))

print(p_pcoa_turb)

# Save plot
ggsave("CoralNet_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Turbidity_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_turb, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)


# ------------ PANEL E: PCoA BY PP_MEAN ------------

#if("PP_mean" %in% colnames(pcoa_scores)) {
#  p_pcoa_pp <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
#    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
#    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
#    geom_point(aes(fill = PP_mean), size = 8, shape = 21, alpha = 0.9) + 
#    # PP_mean color scale
#    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "Primary Productivity") +
#    coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
#    labs(title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: PCoA by Primary Productivity (4th Root)", 
#         x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
#         y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)")) +
#    theme_light() + 
#    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
#        legend.position = "bottom",
#        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
#        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
#        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
#        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
#        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
#        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
#        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
#    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Primary Productivity", 
#                                 title.position = "top", 
#                                 barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))
  
#  print(p_pcoa_pp)
  
  # Save plot
#  ggsave("CoralNet_PCoA_BrayCurtis_PP_mean_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_pp, 
#         width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
#} else {
#  p_pcoa_pp <- NULL
#}

# ------------ CREATE COMBINED PLOT ------------

# Remove individual titles for combined plot
p_pcoa_site_panel <- p_pcoa_site + labs(title = NULL)
p_pcoa_depth_panel <- p_pcoa_depth + labs(title = NULL)
p_pcoa_turb_panel <- p_pcoa_turb + labs(title = NULL)

# Create base combination with required plots
#if(!is.null(p_pcoa_temp) && !is.null(p_pcoa_pp)) {
  # All plots available - create 2x3 layout
#  p_pcoa_temp_panel <- p_pcoa_temp + labs(title = NULL)
#  p_pcoa_pp_panel <- p_pcoa_pp + labs(title = NULL)
  
 # combined_pcoa_final <- (p_pcoa_site_panel | p_pcoa_depth_panel | p_pcoa_turb_panel) / 
                         (p_pcoa_temp_panel | p_pcoa_pp_panel | plot_spacer())
  
#} else if(!is.null(p_pcoa_temp)) {
  # Temperature available but not PP_mean
#  p_pcoa_temp_panel <- p_pcoa_temp + labs(title = NULL)
#  combined_pcoa_final <- p_pcoa_site_panel | p_pcoa_depth_panel | p_pcoa_turb_panel | p_pcoa_temp_panel
  
#} else if(!is.null(p_pcoa_pp)) {
  # PP_mean available but not temperature
#  p_pcoa_pp_panel <- p_pcoa_pp + labs(title = NULL)
#  combined_pcoa_final <- p_pcoa_site_panel | p_pcoa_depth_panel | p_pcoa_turb_panel | p_pcoa_pp_panel
  
#} else {
  # Only basic plots
  combined_pcoa_final <- p_pcoa_site_panel | p_pcoa_depth_panel | p_pcoa_turb_panel
#}

# Add overall title and panel labels
combined_pcoa_final <- combined_pcoa_final +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "CoralNet Recruited Organisms: PCoA Bray-Curtis (4th Root Transformed)",
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_pcoa_final)

# Save the combined plot
ggsave("CoralNet_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Combined_4thRoot.pdf", plot = combined_pcoa_final, 
       width = 18, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# ------------ ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATION ANALYSIS ------------

cat("\n=== PCoA ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATION ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Extract PCoA scores (first 4 axes for comprehensive analysis)
pcoa_scores_all <- as.data.frame(pcoa_result$vectors[, 1:4])
colnames(pcoa_scores_all) <- paste0("PCoA", 1:4)

# Calculate variance explained for all axes
pcoa_var_all <- round(pcoa_result$values$Relative_eig * 100, 2)
names(pcoa_var_all) <- paste0("PCoA", 1:length(pcoa_var_all))

for(i in 1:min(4, length(pcoa_var_all))) {
  cat(paste0("PCoA", i, ": ", pcoa_var_all[i], "%\n"))
}
cat("Cumulative (first 4 axes):", sum(pcoa_var_all[1:4]), "%\n\n")

# Prepare environmental variables for fitting
env_vars_for_fit <- metadata_matched %>%
  select(depth, turbidity_std_rank, latitude, longitude) %>%
  # Add PP_mean if available
  {if("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_matched)) 
    bind_cols(., select(metadata_matched, PP_mean)) else .}

# Test environmental correlations with PCoA axes
cat("Environmental fitting to PCoA axes...\n")
envfit_all <- envfit(pcoa_scores_all[, 1:2], env_vars_for_fit, permutations = 999)
print(envfit_all)

# Extract results for reporting
envfit_results <- data.frame(
  Variable = rownames(envfit_all$vectors$arrows),
  PCoA1_correlation = envfit_all$vectors$arrows[, 1],
  PCoA2_correlation = envfit_all$vectors$arrows[, 2],
  R_squared = envfit_all$vectors$r,
  p_value = envfit_all$vectors$pvals,
  Significance = ifelse(envfit_all$vectors$pvals < 0.001, "***",
                       ifelse(envfit_all$vectors$pvals < 0.01, "**",
                       ifelse(envfit_all$vectors$pvals < 0.05, "*", ""))),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(envfit_results)

# ------------ INDIVIDUAL VARIABLE CORRELATIONS WITH ALL PCoA AXES ------------

cat("\nCalculating individual correlations with PCoA axes...\n")

# Calculate correlations between each environmental variable and PCoA axes
individual_correlations <- data.frame()

for(var_name in colnames(env_vars_for_fit)) {
  env_var <- env_vars_for_fit[[var_name]]
  
  for(axis in 1:4) {
    pcoa_axis <- pcoa_scores_all[[paste0("PCoA", axis)]]
    
    # Calculate correlation
    cor_result <- cor.test(env_var, pcoa_axis, method = "spearman")
    
    individual_correlations <- rbind(individual_correlations, data.frame(
      Environmental_Variable = var_name,
      PCoA_Axis = paste0("PCoA", axis),
      Correlation = cor_result$estimate,
      p_value = cor_result$p.value,
      Significance = case_when(
        cor_result$p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        cor_result$p.value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
        cor_result$p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        cor_result$p.value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}

# Create wide format for easier interpretation
individual_correlations_wide <- individual_correlations %>%
  select(-p_value, -Significance) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = PCoA_Axis, values_from = Correlation) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(PCoA1)))

print(individual_correlations_wide)

# ------------ ENVIRONMENTAL VECTORS OVERLAY ON PCoA PLOT ------------

cat("\nCreating PCoA plot with environmental vectors...\n")

# Create plot with significant environmental vectors
sig_vectors <- envfit_results[envfit_results$p_value < 0.05, ]

if(nrow(sig_vectors) > 0) {
  # Calculate scaling for vectors
  plot_range <- max(abs(range(pcoa_scores$PCoA1, pcoa_scores$PCoA2)))
  vector_scale <- plot_range * 0.8
  
  p_pcoa_envfit <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
    # Add reference lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.5) +
    
    # Add points
    geom_point(aes(fill = site2), size = 5, shape = 21, 
               color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
    
    # Color scheme
    scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors) +
    
    # Add environmental vectors
    geom_segment(data = sig_vectors,
                 aes(x = 0, y = 0, 
                     xend = PCoA1_correlation * vector_scale, 
                     yend = PCoA2_correlation * vector_scale),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")), 
                 color = "#C74238", size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
    # Add vector labels
    geom_text(data = sig_vectors,
              aes(x = PCoA1_correlation * vector_scale * 1.15, 
                  y = PCoA2_correlation * vector_scale * 1.15, 
                  label = paste0(Variable, "\n(R²=", round(R_squared, 2), ")")),
              color = "#C74238", size = 3, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
    # Labels and theme
    labs(title = "PCoA with Environmental Vectors (4th Root Transformed)", 
         x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
         y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)"),
         fill = "Site") +
    theme_light() + 
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
          axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 14)) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 3, override.aes = list(size = 3)))
  
  print(p_pcoa_envfit)
  
  ggsave("CoralNet_PCoA_with_EnvVectors_4thRoot.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_envfit, 
         width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  
} else {
  cat("No significant environmental vectors found\n")
  p_pcoa_envfit <- NULL
}

# ------------ SAVE RESULTS ------------

cat("\nSaving PCoA results...\n")

# Create output directory
output_dir <- "./CoralNet_Results"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Export envfit results
write.csv(envfit_results, 
          file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_PCoA_envfit_results_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Export individual correlations
write.csv(individual_correlations, 
          file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_PCoA_individual_correlations_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Export PCoA variance explained
pcoa_variance <- data.frame(
  Axis = paste0("PCoA", 1:4),
  Variance_Explained = pcoa_var_all[1:4],
  Cumulative_Variance = cumsum(pcoa_var_all[1:4])
)
write.csv(pcoa_variance, 
          file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_PCoA_variance_explained_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Export PCoA scores with metadata
pcoa_scores_export <- pcoa_scores
write.csv(pcoa_scores_export, 
          file.path(output_dir, "CoralNet_PCoA_scores_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = TRUE)

cat("Results saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("Files saved:\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PCoA_envfit_results_4thRoot.csv\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PCoA_individual_correlations_4thRoot.csv\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PCoA_variance_explained_4thRoot.csv\n")
cat("  - CoralNet_PCoA_scores_4thRoot.csv\n")

# ------------ SUMMARY ------------

cat("\n=== PCoA ANALYSIS SUMMARY (4th Root Transformed) ===\n")
cat("PCoA ordination completed\n")
cat("Variance explained by first 2 axes:", round(axis1_var_pcoa + axis2_var_pcoa, 1), "%\n")
cat("Number of sites:", nrow(pcoa_scores), "\n")
cat("Number of taxa:", ncol(community_4th_root), "\n")
cat("Environmental variables tested:", ncol(env_vars_for_fit), "\n")

if(nrow(sig_vectors) > 0) {
  cat("Significant environmental vectors:", nrow(sig_vectors), "\n")
  cat("Variables:", paste(sig_vectors$Variable, collapse = ", "), "\n")
} else {
  cat(" No significant environmental vectors found\n")
}

n_plots_created <- 3 + (!is.null(p_pcoa_temp)) + (!is.null(p_pcoa_pp)) + (!is.null(p_pcoa_envfit))
cat("Plots created:", n_plots_created, "\n")

cat("\nPCoA analysis with 4th root transformed data completed successfully\n")
```


#---------------- dbRDAs -----------------
Core Hypothesis Tests:
Environmental Model (Depth + Turbidity):
Tests nepheloid layer effects on recruits

Spatial Model (Latitude + Longitude): R² = 0.299
What it does: Tests for geographic/dispersal effects independent of environment
Why important: Controls for spatial autocorrelation vs. true environmental effects

Individual Driver Tests:
Turbidity Alone
What it does: Isolates turbidity as primary nepheloid layer proxy
Why important: Identifies specific mechanism (suspended particles, light attenuation)

Depth Alone:
What it does: Tests depth effects independent of turbidity
Why important: Separates depth-dependent processes from water column properties

Mechanistic Tests:
Turbidity | Depth (Conditional):
What it does: Tests turbidity effects after removing depth influence
Why important: Shows if turbidity has independent effects beyond depth correlation

Spatial | Environmental (Conditional): R² = 0.184
What it does: Tests remaining spatial effects after environmental control
Why important: Distinguishes true spatial autocorrelation from environmental gradients
Result: Significant residual - suggests dispersal limitation or unmeasured factors

Comparative Tests:
Combined Model:
What it does: Maximum explanatory power combining all factors
Why important: Shows total explained variation and factor interactions

Site Effects:
What it does: Tests maximum possible site-level differentiation
Why important: Benchmark for local environmental filtering strength

```{r}
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(cowplot)
# Create output directory
dir.create("CN_dbRDA_Results")
```


```{r dbRDA data setup}
# ============== SETUP DATA - CHECK ALIGNMENT FIRST =================

# Assuming you have already loaded:
# - community_4th_root: phyla abundance/percentage data (samples x phyla)
# - metadata_matched: environmental and spatial metadata

cat("Checking data alignment...\n")
cat("Community data dimensions:", dim(community_4th_root), "\n")
cat("Metadata dimensions:", dim(metadata_matched), "\n")

# Quick alignment check
community_samples <- rownames(community_4th_root)
metadata_samples <- rownames(metadata_matched)

# Check if samples are identical and in same order
samples_identical <- identical(community_samples, metadata_samples)
samples_same_set <- setequal(community_samples, metadata_samples)

cat("Sample names identical and in same order:", samples_identical, "\n")
cat("Sample sets are the same (order may differ):", samples_same_set, "\n")

if (samples_identical) {
  # Data is perfectly aligned - use original objects
  cat("Data is perfectly aligned! Using original objects directly.\n")
  community_final <- community_4th_root
  metadata_final <- metadata_matched
  
} else if (samples_same_set) {
  # Same samples but different order - just reorder
  cat("Same samples, reordering to match...\n")
  metadata_final <- metadata_matched[community_samples, ]
  community_final <- community_4th_root
  
} else {
  # Need full alignment
  cat("Data needs alignment. Finding common samples...\n")
  common_samples <- intersect(community_samples, metadata_samples)
  cat("Common samples:", length(common_samples), "out of", 
      length(community_samples), "community and", length(metadata_samples), "metadata samples\n")
  
  if (length(common_samples) == 0) {
    stop("ERROR: No common samples found between community and metadata!")
  }
  
  # Align datasets
  community_final <- community_4th_root[common_samples, ]
  metadata_final <- metadata_matched[common_samples, ]
  
  # Remove any empty samples or taxa
  community_final <- community_final[rowSums(community_final) > 0, ]
  community_final <- community_final[, colSums(community_final) > 0]
  
  # Final alignment after removing empty samples
  final_samples <- rownames(community_final)
  metadata_final <- metadata_final[final_samples, ]
}

cat("Final dataset dimensions:\n")
cat("  Community:", dim(community_final), "\n")
cat("  Metadata:", dim(metadata_final), "\n")
```
