```{r dbRDA data setup}
cat("  Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_final), rownames(metadata_final)), "\n")
```


```{r dbRDA function}
# ============== dbRDA ANALYSIS FUNCTION FOR CoralNet DATA ================

run_recruitment_dbrda <- function(community_data, metadata, dataset_name = "Recruitment_Phyla") {
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("ANALYZING:", dataset_name, "\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  # Create Bray-Curtis dissimilarity matrix
  distance_matrix <- vegdist(community_data, method = "bray")
  
  cat("Samples in analysis:", nrow(community_data), "\n")
  cat("Taxa in analysis:", ncol(community_data), "\n")
  
  # Check for required variables
  required_vars <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank", "latitude", "longitude")
  missing_vars <- required_vars[!required_vars %in% colnames(metadata)]
  if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Missing variables:", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Initialize results storage
  analyses <- list()
  
  # ============== CORE ENVIRONMENTAL TESTS ==================
  
  cat("\nRunning core environmental tests...\n")
  
  # Individual environmental drivers
  try({
    analyses[["depth_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Depth alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  try({
    analyses[["turbidity_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ turbidity_std_rank, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Turbidity alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  # Combined environmental model (main hypothesis)
  try({
    analyses[["environmental"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Environmental model (depth + turbidity) complete\n")
  })
  
  # ============ SPATIAL COMPARISON TESTS ==============
  
  cat("\nRunning spatial comparison tests...\n")
  
  # Spatial model
  try({
    analyses[["spatial"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude + longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Spatial model (lat + lon) complete\n")
  })
  
  # Combined environmental + spatial model
  try({
    analyses[["env_spatial_combined"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Combined environmental + spatial model complete\n")
  })
  
  # ================ CONDITIONAL TESTS ==================
  
  cat("\nRunning conditional tests...\n")
  
  # Turbidity beyond depth
  try({
    analyses[["turbidity_after_depth"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ turbidity_std_rank + Condition(depth), data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Turbidity | depth conditional test complete\n")
  })
  
  # Geography beyond environment (key test for spatial autocorrelation)
  try({
    analyses[["spatial_after_env"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude + longitude + Condition(depth + turbidity_std_rank), data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Spatial | environmental conditional test complete\n")
  })
  
  # ============= OPTIONAL: SITE EFFECTS (if site2 or site variable exists) ===============
  
  if ("site2" %in% colnames(metadata)) {
    try({
      analyses[["site_only"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ sitelocality, data = metadata)
      cat("✓ Site-only model complete\n")
    })
  } else if ("site" %in% colnames(metadata)) {
    try({
      analyses[["site_only"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ site, data = metadata)
      cat("✓ Site-only model complete\n")
    })
  }
  
  # ================= EXTRACT RESULTS =================
  
  cat("\nExtracting results...\n")
  
  # Initialize results dataframe
  results <- data.frame(
    Dataset = dataset_name,
    Analysis = names(analyses),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Extract statistics for each analysis
  for (i in 1:length(analyses)) {
    model <- analyses[[i]]
    analysis_name <- names(analyses)[i]
    
    try({
      # Test significance
      test_result <- anova(model, permutations = 999)
      
      # Get R²
      r2_result <- RsquareAdj(model)
      
      # Store results
      results$R2[i] <- round(r2_result$r.squared, 4)
      results$Adj_R2[i] <- round(r2_result$adj.r.squared, 4)
      results$F_statistic[i] <- round(test_result$F[1], 2)
      results$p_value[i] <- test_result$`Pr(>F)`[1]
      
      cat(sprintf("  %-25s: R² = %.3f, F = %.2f, p = %.3f\n", 
                  analysis_name, r2_result$r.squared, test_result$F[1], test_result$`Pr(>F)`[1]))
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Format p-values
  results$p_formatted <- ifelse(results$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", 
                               sprintf("%.3f", results$p_value))
  
  # Add significance stars
  results$significance <- case_when(
    results$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
    results$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
    results$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
    results$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
    TRUE ~ ""
  )
  
  return(list(results = results, models = analyses, metadata = metadata, community = community_data))
}

# ================== RUN ANALYSIS ===================

cat("\n\nRunning dbRDA analysis on recruitment phyla data...\n")

recruitment_analysis <- run_recruitment_dbrda(
  community_data = community_final,
  metadata = metadata_final,
  dataset_name = "Recruitment_Phyla"
)

# Extract results
if (!is.null(recruitment_analysis)) {
  recruitment_results <- recruitment_analysis$results
  recruitment_models <- recruitment_analysis$models
  
  # Display results
  cat("\n\nRECRUITMENT PHYLA dbRDA RESULTS\n")
  cat("==============================\n")
  print(recruitment_results)
  
} else {
  stop("Analysis failed - check data structure and variable names")
}

# ================= RESULTS INTERPRETATION ===============

cat("\n\nRESULTS INTERPRETATION\n")
cat("======================\n")

if (exists("recruitment_results")) {
  
  # 1. Environmental vs Spatial comparison
  env_spatial_comparison <- recruitment_results %>%
    filter(Analysis %in% c("environmental", "spatial")) %>%
    select(Analysis, R2, p_value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Analysis, values_from = c(R2, p_value)) %>%
    mutate(
      Environmental_stronger = R2_environmental > R2_spatial,
      Effect_difference = abs(R2_environmental - R2_spatial),
      Interpretation = case_when(
        R2_environmental > R2_spatial & p_value_environmental < 0.05 ~ "Environmental > Spatial",
        R2_spatial > R2_environmental & p_value_spatial < 0.05 ~ "Spatial > Environmental", 
        TRUE ~ "Similar effects"
      )
    )
  
  cat("\n1. ENVIRONMENTAL vs SPATIAL EFFECTS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("Environmental R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", 
              env_spatial_comparison$R2_environmental, env_spatial_comparison$p_value_environmental))
  cat(sprintf("Spatial R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", 
              env_spatial_comparison$R2_spatial, env_spatial_comparison$p_value_spatial))
  cat("Winner:", env_spatial_comparison$Interpretation, "\n")
  
  # 2. Individual environmental drivers
  individual_env <- recruitment_results %>%
    filter(Analysis %in% c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone")) %>%
    select(Analysis, R2, p_value) %>%
    arrange(desc(R2))
  
  cat("\n2. INDIVIDUAL ENVIRONMENTAL DRIVERS:\n")
  print(individual_env)
  
  # 3. Conditional tests
  conditional_results <- recruitment_results %>%
    filter(Analysis %in% c("turbidity_after_depth", "spatial_after_env")) %>%
    select(Analysis, R2, p_value, significance)
  
  cat("\n3. CONDITIONAL TESTS (Mechanistic insights):\n")
  print(conditional_results)
  
  # 4. Spatial autocorrelation assessment
  spatial_beyond_env <- recruitment_results %>%
    filter(Analysis == "spatial_after_env") %>%
    pull(R2)
  
  if (length(spatial_beyond_env) > 0) {
    cat("\n4. SPATIAL AUTOCORRELATION ASSESSMENT:\n")
    cat(sprintf("Spatial effects beyond environment: R² = %.3f\n", spatial_beyond_env))
    if (spatial_beyond_env < 0.05) {
      cat("→ Geography likely reflects environmental gradients (nepheloid layer hypothesis supported)\n")
    } else {
      cat("→ True spatial autocorrelation detected\n")
    }
  }
}
```


```{r create biplots}
# ================ CREATE BIPLOTS ===============

# Simplified function to create biplots for recruitment data
create_recruitment_biplot <- function(model, model_name, metadata) {
  
  cat("Creating biplot for:", model_name, "\n")
  
  # Extract site scores
  site_scores <- scores(model, display = "sites")
  
  # Handle single vs multiple axes
  if (is.vector(site_scores)) {
    site_df <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores,
      dbRDA2 = 0,
      sample = names(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else if (ncol(site_scores) == 1) {
    site_df <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores[, 1],
      dbRDA2 = 0,
      sample = rownames(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    site_df <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores[, 1],
      dbRDA2 = site_scores[, 2],
      sample = rownames(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Add metadata manually (avoiding tidyverse dependencies)
  metadata_df <- data.frame(
    sample = rownames(metadata),
    depth = metadata$depth,
    site_group = metadata$site2,  # Use site2 directly
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Merge manually
  site_df$depth <- metadata_df$depth[match(site_df$sample, metadata_df$sample)]
  site_df$site_group <- metadata_df$site_group[match(site_df$sample, metadata_df$sample)]
  
  # Extract environmental vectors
  env_df <- NULL
  try({
    env_scores <- scores(model, display = "bp")
    if (!is.null(env_scores) && length(env_scores) > 0) {
      if (is.vector(env_scores)) {
        env_df <- data.frame(
          variable = names(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores,
          dbRDA2 = 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      } else if (ncol(site_scores) == 1) {
        env_df <- data.frame(
          variable = rownames(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores[, 1],
          dbRDA2 = 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      } else {
        env_df <- data.frame(
          variable = rownames(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores[, 1],
          dbRDA2 = if(ncol(env_scores) > 1) env_scores[, 2] else 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }
      
      # Clean variable names for plotting (without stringr dependency)
      env_df$variable_clean <- env_df$variable
      env_df$variable_clean[env_df$variable == "depth"] <- "Depth"
      env_df$variable_clean[env_df$variable == "turbidity_std_rank"] <- "Turbidity"
      env_df$variable_clean[env_df$variable == "latitude"] <- "Latitude"
      env_df$variable_clean[env_df$variable == "longitude"] <- "Longitude"
      env_df$variable_clean[env_df$variable == "temp_mean"] <- "Temperature"
    }
  }, silent = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate variance explained
  eigenvals <- eigenvals(model)
  if (length(eigenvals) >= 2) {
    axis1_var <- round((eigenvals[1] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
    axis2_var <- round((eigenvals[2] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
  } else {
    axis1_var <- round((eigenvals[1] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
    axis2_var <- 0
  }
  
  # Calculate total R²
  r2_total <- round(RsquareAdj(model)$r.squared, 3)
  
  # Use existing color palette
  colors <- cn_sites_colors
  n_sites <- length(colors)
  
  cat("Number of unique sites:", n_sites, "\n")
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(site_df, aes(x = dbRDA1, y = dbRDA2)) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = site_group), size = 6, shape = 21, alpha = 0.9, stroke = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors, name = "Site") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
    labs(
      x = paste0("dbRDA1 (", axis1_var, "%)"),
      y = paste0("dbRDA2 (", axis2_var, "%)"),
      title = paste("dbRDA:", model_name),
      subtitle = paste0("R² = ", r2_total)
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      legend.title = element_text(size=20, color = "black"),
      legend.text = element_text(size=18, color = "black"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 22,color = "black", face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5)
    )
  
  # Add environmental vectors if available
  if (!is.null(env_df) && nrow(env_df) > 0) {
    cat("Adding", nrow(env_df), "environmental vectors\n")
    # Scale arrows appropriately
    arrow_scale <- max(abs(c(site_df$dbRDA1, site_df$dbRDA2)), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.7
    
    p <- p +
      geom_segment(data = env_df, 
                   aes(x = 0, y = 0, 
                       xend = dbRDA1 * arrow_scale, 
                       yend = dbRDA2 * arrow_scale),
                   arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")), 
                   color = "#E31A1C", linewidth = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      geom_text(data = env_df,
                aes(x = dbRDA1 * arrow_scale * 1.15, 
                    y = dbRDA2 * arrow_scale * 1.15, 
                    label = variable_clean),
                color = "#E31A1C", size = 6, fontface = "bold", 
                inherit.aes = FALSE)
  } else {
    cat("No environmental vectors found\n")
  }
  
  cat("Plot creation complete for:", model_name, "\n")
  return(p)
}

# Create plots for key models with error handling
plot_list <- list()

if (exists("recruitment_models")) {
  
  cat("Creating plots for", length(recruitment_models), "models...\n")
  
  # Environmental model (main hypothesis)
  if ("environmental" %in% names(recruitment_models)) {
    cat("Creating environmental model plot...\n")
    try({
      plot_list[["environmental"]] <- create_recruitment_biplot(
        recruitment_models[["environmental"]], 
        "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
        metadata_final
      )
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Spatial model (comparison)
  if ("spatial" %in% names(recruitment_models)) {
    cat("Creating spatial model plot...\n")
    try({
      plot_list[["spatial"]] <- create_recruitment_biplot(
        recruitment_models[["spatial"]], 
        "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)",
        metadata_final
      )
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Combined model
  if ("env_spatial_combined" %in% names(recruitment_models)) {
    cat("Creating combined model plot...\n")
    try({
      plot_list[["combined"]] <- create_recruitment_biplot(
        recruitment_models[["env_spatial_combined"]], 
        "Combined (Environmental + Spatial)",
        metadata_final
      )
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Individual drivers
  if ("depth_alone" %in% names(recruitment_models)) {
    cat("Creating depth-only model plot...\n")
    try({
      plot_list[["depth_alone"]] <- create_recruitment_biplot(
        recruitment_models[["depth_alone"]], 
        "Depth Only",
        metadata_final
      )
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
  
  if ("turbidity_alone" %in% names(recruitment_models)) {
    cat("Creating turbidity-only model plot...\n")
    try({
      plot_list[["turbidity_alone"]] <- create_recruitment_biplot(
        recruitment_models[["turbidity_alone"]], 
        "Turbidity Only", 
        metadata_final
      )
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
  
  cat("Successfully created", length(plot_list), "plots\n")
} else { 
  cat("No recruitment_models object found!\n")
}
```


```{r save dbrda results and biplots}
# ================= SAVE RESULTS AND PLOTS ===============

cat("\n\nSaving results and plots...\n")

# Create output directory
output_dir <- "./CN_dbRDA2"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  cat("Created output directory:", output_dir, "\n")
} else {
  cat("Using existing output directory:", output_dir, "\n")
}

# Save results table
if (exists("recruitment_results")) {
  results_file <- file.path(output_dir, "recruitment_phyla_dbRDA_results.csv")
  write.csv(recruitment_results, results_file, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Results saved to:", results_file, "\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠ No recruitment_results to save\n")
}

# Save interpretation summary
if (exists("env_spatial_comparison")) {
  interpretation_summary <- data.frame(
    Test = c("Environmental_vs_Spatial", "Leading_Environmental_Driver", "Spatial_Autocorrelation"),
    Result = c(
      env_spatial_comparison$Interpretation,
      individual_env$Analysis[1],
      ifelse(spatial_beyond_env < 0.05, "Environmental_proxy", "True_spatial_effect")
    ),
    R_squared = c(
      max(env_spatial_comparison$R2_environmental, env_spatial_comparison$R2_spatial),
      individual_env$R2[1],
      spatial_beyond_env
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  interp_file <- file.path(output_dir, "recruitment_dbRDA_interpretation.csv")
  write.csv(interpretation_summary, interp_file, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Interpretation summary saved to:", interp_file, "\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠ No interpretation summary to save\n")
}

# Save individual plots
if (length(plot_list) > 0) {
  cat("Saving", length(plot_list), "individual plots...\n")
  for (plot_name in names(plot_list)) {
    plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("recruitment_", plot_name, "_dbRDA.pdf"))
    try({
      ggsave(
        filename = plot_file, 
        plot = plot_list[[plot_name]], 
        width = 10, height = 8, 
        dpi = 300
      )
      cat("✓ Saved:", plot_name, "plot\n")
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
} else {
  cat("⚠ No plots to save\n")
}

# Create multi-panel figure
if (length(plot_list) >= 3) {
  cat("Creating multi-panel figures...\n")
  
  # Main comparison panel (Environmental vs Spatial vs Combined)
  main_plots <- plot_list[c("environmental", "spatial", "combined")]
  if (length(main_plots) == 3) {
  
    # Create temporary plots WITH legend for extracting legend
    temp_plot_with_legend <- main_plots[[1]] + theme(legend.position = "right")
  
    # Extract legend
    legend <- cowplot::get_legend(temp_plot_with_legend)
  
    # Create panel with plots (already have legend.position = "none")
    plot_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = main_plots, ncol = 3)
  
    # Combine plots with shared legend
    main_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_panel, legend, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(3, 0.4))
  
    # Add title
    main_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(
      cowplot::ggdraw() + cowplot::draw_label("Recruitment Phyla dbRDA: Environmental vs Spatial Drivers", 
                                            fontface = "bold", size = 16),
      main_panel,
      ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.1, 1)
    )
      
    main_file <- file.path(output_dir, "recruitment_main_comparison_dbRDA.pdf")
    ggsave(main_file, plot = main_panel, width = 18, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    cat("✓ Main comparison panel saved to:", main_file, "\n")
  } else {
    cat("⚠ Not enough plots for main comparison panel (need 3, have", length(main_plots), ")\n")
  }
  
  # Individual drivers panel
  individual_plots <- plot_list[c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone")]
  individual_plots <- individual_plots[!sapply(individual_plots, is.null)]  # Remove any NULL plots
  
  if (length(individual_plots) == 2) {
    cat("Creating individual drivers panel with 2 plots...\n")
    try({
      individual_panel <- do.call(grid.arrange, c(
        individual_plots,
        list(ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
             top = textGrob("Individual Environmental Drivers", 
                           gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold")))
      ))
      
      individual_file <- file.path(output_dir, "recruitment_individual_drivers_dbRDA.pdf")
      ggsave(individual_file, plot = individual_panel, width = 16, height = 6, dpi = 300)
      cat("✓ Individual drivers panel saved to:", individual_file, "\n")
    }, silent = FALSE)
  } else {
    cat("⚠ Not enough plots for individual drivers panel (need 2, have", length(individual_plots), ")\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("⚠ Not enough plots for multi-panel figures (need 3+, have", length(plot_list), ")\n")
}

# ================ FINAL SUMMARY ===============

cat("\n\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("RECRUITMENT PHYLA dbRDA ANALYSIS COMPLETE\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")

if (exists("recruitment_results")) {
  cat("\nKEY FINDINGS:\n")
  
  # Environmental vs spatial
  env_r2 <- recruitment_results$R2[recruitment_results$Analysis == "environmental"]
  spatial_r2 <- recruitment_results$R2[recruitment_results$Analysis == "spatial"]
  env_p <- recruitment_results$p_value[recruitment_results$Analysis == "environmental"]
  spatial_p <- recruitment_results$p_value[recruitment_results$Analysis == "spatial"]
  
  cat(sprintf("1. Environmental effects: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", 
              env_r2, env_p, recruitment_results$significance[recruitment_results$Analysis == "environmental"]))
  cat(sprintf("2. Spatial effects: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", 
              spatial_r2, spatial_p, recruitment_results$significance[recruitment_results$Analysis == "spatial"]))
  
  if (env_r2 > spatial_r2) {
    cat("→ Environmental factors dominate recruitment community structure\n")
  } else {
    cat("→ Spatial factors dominate recruitment community structure\n")
  }
  
  # Best individual driver
  best_individual <- individual_env$Analysis[1]
  best_r2 <- individual_env$R2[1]
  cat(sprintf("3. Strongest individual driver: %s (R² = %.3f)\n", 
              gsub("_alone", "", best_individual), best_r2))
  
  # Spatial autocorrelation
  if (length(spatial_beyond_env) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("4. Spatial autocorrelation beyond environment: R² = %.3f\n", spatial_beyond_env))
    if (spatial_beyond_env < 0.05) {
      cat("→ Geographic patterns reflect environmental gradients (supports nepheloid layer hypothesis)\n")
    } else {
      cat("→ True spatial autocorrelation detected (dispersal limitation or unmeasured factors)\n")
    }
  }
}

cat("\n✓ All results and plots saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("✓ Check main comparison panel for publication-ready figure\n")
cat("✓ Analysis follows same framework as metabarcoding study\n")

cat("\nNEPHELOID LAYER HYPOTHESIS ASSESSMENT:\n")
cat("- Depth + turbidity effects on recruitment communities\n") 
cat("- Environmental vs spatial driver comparison\n")
cat("- Conditional tests for mechanistic insights\n")
cat("- Biplots show variable relationships with community structure\n")
```

#---------------- dbRDA RESULTS EXCEL TABLE EXPORTS -------------
COMPREHENSIVE dbRDA SUMMARY TABLE EXPORT FOR CORALNET DATA
Creates multi-panel Excel summary for recruitment phyla analysis
```{r}
# Load required libraries
#library(openxlsx)
#library(dplyr)
#library(vegan)

# Explicitly handle namespace conflicts
if("dplyr" %in% (.packages())) {
  cat("dplyr loaded successfully\n")
} else {
  library(dplyr)
  cat("dplyr loaded\n")
}

# Function to create comprehensive CoralNet dbRDA summary table
create_coralnet_dbrda_summary_table <- function(analysis_results_CN, output_file_CN = "CoralNet_Recruitment_Phyla_dbRDA_summary.xlsx") {
  
  cat("Creating comprehensive CoralNet dbRDA summary table...\n")
  
  # Extract components
  results_CN <- analysis_results_CN$results
  models_CN <- analysis_results_CN$models
  metadata_CN <- analysis_results_CN$metadata
  community_CN <- analysis_results_CN$community
  
  # ============ PANEL A: VARIANCE PARTITIONING SUMMARY =============
  
  cat("Creating Panel A: Variance Partitioning Summary...\n")
  
  # Key models for variance partitioning
  key_analyses_CN <- c("environmental", "spatial", "env_spatial_combined", "site_only")
  
  panel_a_CN <- results_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% key_analyses_CN) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, Adj_R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Adj_Variance_Percent = round(Adj_R2 * 100, 1),
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999,
      Sample_Size = nrow(community_CN),
      Num_Phyla = ncol(community_CN)  # Changed from Num_Orders to Num_Phyla
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(match(Analysis, key_analyses_CN))
  
  # Calculate residual variance
  max_explained_CN <- max(panel_a_CN$Variance_Percent, na.rm = TRUE)
  residual_variance_CN <- 100 - max_explained_CN
  
  # Add residual row
  residual_row_CN <- data.frame(
    Analysis = "residual",
    R2 = residual_variance_CN/100,
    Adj_R2 = NA,
    F_statistic = NA,
    p_value = NA,
    significance = "",
    Variance_Percent = residual_variance_CN,
    Adj_Variance_Percent = NA,
    p_value_formatted = "N/A",
    Test_Method = "N/A",
    Permutations = NA,
    Sample_Size = nrow(community_CN),
    Num_Phyla = ncol(community_CN)
  )
  
  panel_a_CN <- rbind(panel_a_CN, residual_row_CN)
  
  # Clean up analysis names
  panel_a_CN$Analysis_Name <- case_when(
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "environmental" ~ "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "spatial" ~ "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)", 
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "env_spatial_combined" ~ "Environmental + Spatial Combined",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "site_only" ~ "Site Identity Effects",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "residual" ~ "Residual (Unexplained)",
    TRUE ~ panel_a_CN$Analysis
  )
  
  # ============= PANEL B: INDIVIDUAL ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE CONTRIBUTIONS ==============
  
  cat("Creating Panel B: Individual Variable Contributions...\n")
  
  # Marginal effects (variables alone)
  marginal_analyses_CN <- c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone")
  
  marginal_effects_CN <- results_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% marginal_analyses_CN) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "depth_alone" ~ "Depth",
        Analysis == "turbidity_alone" ~ "Turbidity",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Marginal_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Marginal"
    )
  
  # Conditional effects (variables added last)
  conditional_analyses_CN <- c("turbidity_after_depth", "spatial_after_env")
  
  conditional_effects_CN <- results_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% conditional_analyses_CN) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "turbidity_after_depth" ~ "Turbidity|Depth",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_env" ~ "Spatial|Environmental",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Conditional_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Conditional"
    )
  
  # Combine marginal and conditional
  panel_b_CN <- dplyr::full_join(
    marginal_effects_CN %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Marginal_Variance_Percent, F_statistic, p_value, significance),
    conditional_effects_CN %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Conditional_Variance_Percent),
    by = "Variable"
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        is.na(p_value) ~ "N/A",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Degrees_Freedom = 1,  # Assuming single variables
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999
    )
  
  # ========== PANEL C: dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION ===========
  
  cat("Creating Panel C: dbRDA Axis Information...\n")
  
  # Extract axis information from main environmental model
  panel_c_CN <- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    model_CN <- models_CN[["environmental"]]
    eigenvals_CN <- eigenvals(model_CN)
    total_inertia_CN <- sum(eigenvals_CN)
    
    # Create axis summary
    for (i in 1:min(length(eigenvals_CN), 4)) {  # Up to 4 axes
      axis_row_CN <- data.frame(
        Axis = paste0("dbRDA", i),
        Eigenvalue = round(eigenvals_CN[i], 4),
        Variance_Percent = round((eigenvals_CN[i] / total_inertia_CN) * 100, 1),
        Cumulative_Percent = round((sum(eigenvals_CN[1:i]) / total_inertia_CN) * 100, 1)
      )
      panel_c_CN <- rbind(panel_c_CN, axis_row_CN)
    }
    
    # Add axis significance (if available)
    try({
      axis_test_CN <- anova(model_CN, by = "axis", permutations = 999)
      if (nrow(axis_test_CN) >= nrow(panel_c_CN)) {
        panel_c_CN$F_statistic <- round(axis_test_CN$F[1:nrow(panel_c_CN)], 2)
        panel_c_CN$p_value <- axis_test_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:nrow(panel_c_CN)]
        panel_c_CN$p_value_formatted <- case_when(
          panel_c_CN$p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
          is.na(panel_c_CN$p_value) ~ "N/A",
          TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", panel_c_CN$p_value)
        )
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ========== PANEL D: ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE LOADINGS ============
  
  cat("Creating Panel D: Environmental Variable Loadings...\n")
  
  panel_d_CN <- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    model_CN <- models_CN[["environmental"]]
    
    try({
      # Extract biplot scores (environmental loadings)
      bp_scores_CN <- scores(model_CN, display = "bp")
      
      if (!is.null(bp_scores_CN) && length(bp_scores_CN) > 0) {
        
        if (is.vector(bp_scores_CN)) {
          panel_d_CN <- data.frame(
            Variable = names(bp_scores_CN),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores_CN,
            dbRDA2_loading = 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        } else {
          panel_d_CN <- data.frame(
            Variable = rownames(bp_scores_CN),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores_CN[, 1],
            dbRDA2_loading = if(ncol(bp_scores_CN) > 1) bp_scores_CN[, 2] else 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        }
        
        # Calculate vector length (correlation strength)
        panel_d_CN$Vector_Length <- sqrt(panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading^2 + panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading^2)
        
        # Clean variable names
        panel_d_CN$Variable_Name <- case_when(
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "temp_mean" ~ "Temperature",
          TRUE ~ panel_d_CN$Variable
        )
        
        # Round values
        panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading <- round(panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading, 3)
        panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading <- round(panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading, 3)
        panel_d_CN$Vector_Length <- round(panel_d_CN$Vector_Length, 3)
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
# ============ PANEL E: ANOVA BY TERMS ============
	  
	cat("Creating Panel E: ANOVA by Terms...\n")
	  
	panel_e_CN <- data.frame()
	  
	if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
	  # Environmental model term-by-term ANOVA
	  env_model_CN <- models_CN[["environmental"]]
	  try({
	    cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Environmental model...\n")
	    env_terms_CN <- anova(env_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
	    
	    # Print the full results for inspection
	    cat("Environmental model ANOVA results:\n")
	    print(env_terms_CN)
	    
	    if (!is.null(env_terms_CN)) {
	      # Get residual info (will be excluded from the table but used for calculations)
	      total_inertia <- sum(env_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
	      
	      # Create data frame with results
	      env_terms_df_CN <- data.frame(
	        Model = "Environmental",
	        Variable = rownames(env_terms_CN),
	        Df = env_terms_CN$Df,
	        SumOfSqs = env_terms_CN$SumOfSqs,
	        MeanSqs = env_terms_CN$MeanSqs,
	        F_statistic = round(env_terms_CN$F, 2),
	        p_value = env_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`,  # Corrected syntax
	        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
	      )
	      
	      # Add R² calculations
	      env_terms_df_CN <- env_terms_df_CN %>%
	        mutate(
	          R2 = round(SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4),
	          Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
	          p_formatted = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_value)),
	          significance = case_when(
	            p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
	            p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
	            p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
	            p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
	            TRUE ~ ""
	          )
	        )
	      
	      # Only keep the terms (exclude Residual) for the main table
	      env_terms_filtered_CN <- env_terms_df_CN %>% 
	        filter(Variable != "Residual")
	      
	      panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, env_terms_filtered_CN)
	      
	      cat("✓ Environmental model ANOVA processed\n")
	    }
	  }, silent = FALSE)  # Changed to FALSE to see any errors
	}
	
	if ("spatial" %in% names(models_CN)) {
	  # Spatial model term-by-term ANOVA
	  spatial_model_CN <- models_CN[["spatial"]]
	  try({
	    cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Spatial model...\n")
	    spatial_terms_CN <- anova(spatial_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
	    
	    # Print the full results for inspection
	    cat("Spatial model ANOVA results:\n")
	    print(spatial_terms_CN)
	    
	    if (!is.null(spatial_terms_CN)) {
	      # Get residual info (will be excluded from the table but used for calculations)
	      total_inertia <- sum(spatial_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
	      
	      # Create data frame with results
	      spatial_terms_df_CN <- data.frame(
	        Model = "Spatial",
	        Variable = rownames(spatial_terms_CN),
	        Df = spatial_terms_CN$Df,
	        SumOfSqs = spatial_terms_CN$SumOfSqs,
	        MeanSqs = spatial_terms_CN$MeanSqs,
	        F_statistic = round(spatial_terms_CN$F, 2),
	        p_value = spatial_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`,  # Corrected syntax
	        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
	      )
	      
	      # Add R² calculations
	      spatial_terms_df_CN <- spatial_terms_df_CN %>%
	        mutate(
	          R2 = round(SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4),
	          Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
	          p_formatted = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_value)),
	          significance = case_when(
	            p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
	            p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
	            p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
	            p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
	            TRUE ~ ""
	          )
	        )
	      
	      # Only keep the terms (exclude Residual) for the main table
	      spatial_terms_filtered_CN <- spatial_terms_df_CN %>% 
	        filter(Variable != "Residual")
	      
	      panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, spatial_terms_filtered_CN)
	      
	      cat("✓ Spatial model ANOVA processed\n")
	    }
	  }, silent = FALSE)  # Changed to FALSE to see any errors
	}
	
	# Add combined model if it exists
	if ("env_spatial_combined" %in% names(models_CN)) {
	  # Combined model term-by-term ANOVA
	  combined_model_CN <- models_CN[["env_spatial_combined"]]
	  try({
	    cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Combined model...\n")
	    combined_terms_CN <- anova(combined_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
	    
	    # Print the full results for inspection
	    cat("Combined model ANOVA results:\n")
	    print(combined_terms_CN)
	    
	    if (!is.null(combined_terms_CN)) {
	      # Get residual info (will be excluded from the table but used for calculations)
	      total_inertia <- sum(combined_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
	      
	      # Create data frame with results
	      combined_terms_df_CN <- data.frame(
	        Model = "Combined",
	        Variable = rownames(combined_terms_CN),
	        Df = combined_terms_CN$Df,
	        SumOfSqs = combined_terms_CN$SumOfSqs,
	        MeanSqs = combined_terms_CN$MeanSqs,
	        F_statistic = round(combined_terms_CN$F, 2),
	        p_value = combined_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`,  # Corrected syntax
	        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
	      )
	      
	      # Add R² calculations
	      combined_terms_df_CN <- combined_terms_df_CN %>%
	        mutate(
	          R2 = round(SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4),
	          Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
	          p_formatted = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_value)),
	          significance = case_when(
	            p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
	            p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
	            p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
	            p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
	            TRUE ~ ""
	          )
	        )
	      
	      # Only keep the terms (exclude Residual) for the main table
	      combined_terms_filtered_CN <- combined_terms_df_CN %>% 
	        filter(Variable != "Residual")
	      
	      panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, combined_terms_filtered_CN)
	      
	      cat("✓ Combined model ANOVA processed\n")
	    }
	  }, silent = FALSE)  # Changed to FALSE to see any errors
	}
	
	# Finalize formatting and clean up variable names for display
	if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
	  # Clean up variable names
	  panel_e_CN$Variable_Clean <- case_when(
	    panel_e_CN$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
	    panel_e_CN$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
	    panel_e_CN$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
	    panel_e_CN$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
	    TRUE ~ panel_e_CN$Variable
	  )
	  
	  # Sort by model and variance explained
	  panel_e_CN <- panel_e_CN %>%
	    arrange(Model, desc(Variance_Percent))
	  
	  cat("Final ANOVA by terms table has", nrow(panel_e_CN), "rows\n")
	  print(head(panel_e_CN[, c("Model", "Variable_Clean", "Df", "Variance_Percent", "F_statistic", "p_formatted", "significance")]))
	}
  
  
  # ==============  EXPORT TO EXCEL ================
  
  cat("Exporting to Excel file:", output_file_CN, "\n")
  
  # Create workbook
  wb_CN <- createWorkbook()
  
  # Define styles
  header_style_CN <- createStyle(
    fontName = "Arial",
    fontSize = 12,
    fontColour = "white",
    fgFill = "#1f4e79",
    textDecoration = "bold",
    halign = "center",
    valign = "center",
    border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
    borderColour = "black"
  )
  
  data_style_CN <- createStyle(
    fontName = "Arial", 
    fontSize = 10,
    halign = "center",
    valign = "center",
    border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
    borderColour = "grey"
  )
  
  # Add worksheets and data
  
  # Panel A
  addWorksheet(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning")
  writeData(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", panel_a_CN)
  # Apply header style
  for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a_CN)) {
    addStyle(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  # Apply data style
  if (nrow(panel_a_CN) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_a_CN)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel B
  addWorksheet(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables")
  writeData(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", panel_b_CN)
  # Apply header style
  for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b_CN)) {
    addStyle(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  # Apply data style
  if (nrow(panel_b_CN) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_b_CN)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel C
  if (nrow(panel_c_CN) > 0) {
    addWorksheet(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information")
    writeData(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", panel_c_CN)
    # Apply header style
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c_CN)) {
      addStyle(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    # Apply data style
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_c_CN)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel D
  if (nrow(panel_d_CN) > 0) {
    addWorksheet(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings")
    writeData(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", panel_d_CN)
    # Apply header style
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d_CN)) {
      addStyle(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    # Apply data style
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_d_CN)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel E
  addWorksheet(wb_CN, "E_Model_Selection")
  writeData(wb_CN, "E_Model_Selection", panel_e_CN)
  # Apply header style
  for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e_CN)) {
    addStyle(wb_CN, "E_Model_Selection", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  # Apply data style
  if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_e_CN)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "E_Model_Selection", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Summary sheet
  summary_info_CN <- data.frame(
    Metric = c("Analysis Type", "Dataset", "Sample Size", "Number of Phyla", 
               "Distance Method", "Permutations", "Significance Levels"),
    Value = c("Distance-based Redundancy Analysis (dbRDA)", 
              "CoralNet Recruitment Phyla",
              nrow(community_CN), 
              ncol(community_CN),
              "Bray-Curtis", 
              "999", 
              "*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  addWorksheet(wb_CN, "Summary")
  writeData(wb_CN, "Summary", summary_info_CN)
  # Apply header style
  for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info_CN)) {
    addStyle(wb_CN, "Summary", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  # Apply data style
  if (nrow(summary_info_CN) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(summary_info_CN)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "Summary", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Auto-size columns for other sheets
  for (sheet in names(wb_CN)) {
    setColWidths(wb_CN, sheet, cols = 1:20, widths = "auto")
  }
  
  # Save workbook
  saveWorkbook(wb_CN, output_file_CN, overwrite = TRUE)
  
  cat("✓ Excel file saved successfully!\n")
  cat("✓ Sheets created:", paste(names(wb_CN), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  # Export each table to a separate CSV file
  write.csv(panel_e_CN, file = "Table_S5e_ANOVA_by_Terms.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(panel_a_CN, file = "Table_S5a_Variance_Partitioning.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(panel_b_CN, file = "Table_S5b_Individual_Variables.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(panel_c_CN, file = "Table_S5c_Axis_Information.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(panel_d_CN, file = "Table_S5d_Variable_Loadings.csv", row.names = FALSE)

  # Return list of all panels for inspection
  return(list(
    panel_a_CN = panel_a_CN,
    panel_b_CN = panel_b_CN, 
    panel_c_CN = panel_c_CN,
    panel_d_CN = panel_d_CN,
    panel_e_CN = panel_e_CN,
    summary_CN = summary_info_CN,
    file_path_CN = output_file_CN
  ))
}


# ========== EXECUTE THE CORALNET EXPORT ================

# Run the export function (assumes recruitment_analysis exists from your previous code)
if (exists("recruitment_analysis")) {
  
  cat("Creating comprehensive CoralNet dbRDA summary table...\n")
  
  # Create the summary table with CN suffix
  summary_export_CN <- create_coralnet_dbrda_summary_table(
    analysis_results_CN = recruitment_analysis,
    output_file_CN = file.path("/Users/nicolepittoors/Documents/Documents - biscaya/Bioinformatics/CoralNet/CN_dbRDA_4thRoot", "Table_S2_CoralNet_Recruitment_Phyla_dbRDA_Summary.xlsx")
  )
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("CORALNET EXPORT COMPLETE\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  cat("File saved as:", summary_export_CN$file_path_CN, "\n")
  cat("Panels included:\n")
  cat("  A. Variance Partitioning Summary\n")
  cat("  B. Individual Variable Contributions\n") 
  cat("  C. dbRDA Axis Information\n")
  cat("  D. Environmental Variable Loadings\n")
  cat("  E. Model Selection Results\n")
  cat("  Summary: Analysis metadata\n")
  
  # Display preview of Panel A
  cat("\nPreview of Panel A (Variance Partitioning):\n")
  print(summary_export_CN$panel_a_CN %>% 
        dplyr::select(Analysis_Name, Variance_Percent, p_value_formatted, significance) %>%
        head())
  
} else {
  cat("Error: recruitment_analysis object not found. Please run the CoralNet dbRDA analysis first.\n")
}

# ============== OPTIONAL: CREATE TABLE ================

# Function to create a clean table for CoralNet
create_coralnet_publication_table <- function(summary_export_CN) {
  
  # Extract key results
  pub_table_CN <- summary_export_CN$panel_a_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis != "residual") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      `Variance Component` = Analysis_Name,
      `R² (%)` = paste0(Variance_Percent, "%"),
      `F-statistic` = F_statistic,
      `p-value` = paste0(p_value_formatted, " ", significance),
      `Sample size` = Sample_Size,
      `Phyla` = Num_Phyla
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(`Variance Component`, `R² (%)`, `F-statistic`, `p-value`)
  
  return(pub_table_CN)
}

# Create publication version for CoralNet
if (exists("summary_export_CN")) {
  pub_table_CN <- create_coralnet_publication_table(summary_export_CN)
  
  cat("\nCoralNet publication-ready table:\n")
  print(pub_table_CN)
  
  # Save as CSV for easy copying to manuscripts
  write.csv(pub_table_CN, 
            file.path("/Users/nicolepittoors/Documents/Documents - biscaya/Bioinformatics/CoralNet/CN_dbRDA_4thRoot", "Table_S2_CoralNet_Publication_Ready.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("\n✓ CoralNet publication-ready CSV saved\n")
}


```

Create comprehensize CoralNet dbRDA summary table
```{r}
# Function to create comprehensive CoralNet dbRDA summary table
create_coralnet_dbrda_summary_table <- function(analysis_results_CN, output_file_CN = "CoralNet_Recruitment_Phyla_dbRDA_summary.xlsx") {
  
  cat("Creating comprehensive CoralNet dbRDA summary table...\n")
  
  # Extract components
  results_CN <- analysis_results_CN$results
  models_CN <- analysis_results_CN$models
  metadata_CN <- analysis_results_CN$metadata
  community_CN <- analysis_results_CN$community
  
  # Get the output directory from the Excel file path
  output_dir <- dirname(output_file_CN)
  
  # =========== PANEL A: VARIANCE PARTITIONING SUMMARY =============
  
  cat("Creating Panel A: Variance Partitioning Summary...\n")
  
  # Key models for variance partitioning
  key_analyses_CN <- c("environmental", "spatial", "env_spatial_combined", "site_only")
  
  # Use safer subset approach to avoid potential issues
  panel_a_CN <- results_CN[results_CN$Analysis %in% key_analyses_CN, ] %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, Adj_R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Adj_Variance_Percent = round(Adj_R2 * 100, 1),
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999,
      Sample_Size = nrow(community_CN),
      Num_Phyla = ncol(community_CN)
    )
  
  # Calculate residual variance
  max_explained_CN <- max(panel_a_CN$Variance_Percent, na.rm = TRUE)
  residual_variance_CN <- 100 - max_explained_CN
  
  # Add residual row
  residual_row_CN <- data.frame(
    Analysis = "residual",
    R2 = residual_variance_CN/100,
    Adj_R2 = NA,
    F_statistic = NA,
    p_value = NA,
    significance = "",
    Variance_Percent = residual_variance_CN,
    Adj_Variance_Percent = NA,
    p_value_formatted = "N/A",
    Test_Method = "N/A",
    Permutations = NA,
    Sample_Size = nrow(community_CN),
    Num_Phyla = ncol(community_CN)
  )
  
  panel_a_CN <- rbind(panel_a_CN, residual_row_CN)
  
  # Clean up analysis names
  panel_a_CN$Analysis_Name <- case_when(
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "environmental" ~ "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "spatial" ~ "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)", 
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "env_spatial_combined" ~ "Environmental + Spatial Combined",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "site_only" ~ "Site Identity Effects",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "residual" ~ "Residual (Unexplained)",
    TRUE ~ panel_a_CN$Analysis
  )
  
  # ========== PANEL B: INDIVIDUAL ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE CONTRIBUTIONS ===========
  
  cat("Creating Panel B: Individual Variable Contributions...\n")
  
  # Marginal effects (variables alone)
  marginal_analyses_CN <- c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone")
  
  marginal_effects_CN <- results_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% marginal_analyses_CN) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "depth_alone" ~ "Depth",
        Analysis == "turbidity_alone" ~ "Turbidity",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Marginal_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Marginal"
    )
  
  # Conditional effects (variables added last)
  conditional_analyses_CN <- c("turbidity_after_depth", "spatial_after_env")
  
  conditional_effects_CN <- results_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% conditional_analyses_CN) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "turbidity_after_depth" ~ "Turbidity|Depth",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_env" ~ "Spatial|Environmental",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Conditional_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Conditional"
    )
  
  # Combine marginal and conditional
  panel_b_CN <- dplyr::full_join(
    marginal_effects_CN %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Marginal_Variance_Percent, F_statistic, p_value, significance),
    conditional_effects_CN %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Conditional_Variance_Percent),
    by = "Variable"
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        is.na(p_value) ~ "N/A",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Degrees_Freedom = 1,  # Assuming single variables
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999
    )
  
  # ============ PANEL C: dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION ================
  
  cat("Creating Panel C: dbRDA Axis Information...\n")
  
  # Extract axis information from main environmental model
  panel_c_CN <- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    model_CN <- models_CN[["environmental"]]
    eigenvals_CN <- eigenvals(model_CN)
    total_inertia_CN <- sum(eigenvals_CN)
    
    # Create axis summary
    for (i in 1:min(length(eigenvals_CN), 4)) {  # Up to 4 axes
      axis_row_CN <- data.frame(
        Axis = paste0("dbRDA", i),
        Eigenvalue = round(eigenvals_CN[i], 4),
        Variance_Percent = round((eigenvals_CN[i] / total_inertia_CN) * 100, 1),
        Cumulative_Percent = round((sum(eigenvals_CN[1:i]) / total_inertia_CN) * 100, 1)
      )
      panel_c_CN <- rbind(panel_c_CN, axis_row_CN)
    }
    
    # Add axis significance (if available)
    try({
      axis_test_CN <- anova(model_CN, by = "axis", permutations = 999)
      if (nrow(axis_test_CN) >= nrow(panel_c_CN)) {
        panel_c_CN$F_statistic <- round(axis_test_CN$F[1:nrow(panel_c_CN)], 2)
        panel_c_CN$p_value <- axis_test_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:nrow(panel_c_CN)]
        panel_c_CN$p_value_formatted <- case_when(
          panel_c_CN$p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
          is.na(panel_c_CN$p_value) ~ "N/A",
          TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", panel_c_CN$p_value)
        )
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ============ PANEL D: ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE LOADINGS ==============
  
  cat("Creating Panel D: Environmental Variable Loadings...\n")
  
  panel_d_CN <- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    model_CN <- models_CN[["environmental"]]
    
    try({
      # Extract biplot scores (environmental loadings)
      bp_scores_CN <- scores(model_CN, display = "bp")
      
      if (!is.null(bp_scores_CN) && length(bp_scores_CN) > 0) {
        
        if (is.vector(bp_scores_CN)) {
          panel_d_CN <- data.frame(
            Variable = names(bp_scores_CN),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores_CN,
            dbRDA2_loading = 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        } else {
          panel_d_CN <- data.frame(
            Variable = rownames(bp_scores_CN),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores_CN[, 1],
            dbRDA2_loading = if(ncol(bp_scores_CN) > 1) bp_scores_CN[, 2] else 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        }
        
        # Calculate vector length (correlation strength)
        panel_d_CN$Vector_Length <- sqrt(panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading^2 + panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading^2)
        
        # Clean variable names
        panel_d_CN$Variable_Name <- case_when(
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "temp_mean" ~ "Temperature",
          TRUE ~ panel_d_CN$Variable
        )
        
        # Round values
        panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading <- round(panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading, 3)
        panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading <- round(panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading, 3)
        panel_d_CN$Vector_Length <- round(panel_d_CN$Vector_Length, 3)
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ============= PANEL E: ANOVA BY TERMS ===============

  cat("Creating Panel E: ANOVA by Terms...\n")

  panel_e_CN <- data.frame()

  if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    # Environmental model term-by-term ANOVA
    env_model_CN <- models_CN[["environmental"]]
    try({
      cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Environmental model...\n")
      env_terms_CN <- anova(env_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
    
      # Print the full results for inspection
      cat("Environmental model ANOVA results:\n")
      print(env_terms_CN)
    
      if (!is.null(env_terms_CN)) {
        # Create a properly sized dataframe
        n_terms <- nrow(env_terms_CN) - 1  # Exclude residual row
      
        # Create data frame with consistent sizing
        env_df <- data.frame(
         Model = rep("Environmental", n_terms),
         Variable = rownames(env_terms_CN)[1:n_terms],
          Df = env_terms_CN$Df[1:n_terms],
         SumOfSqs = env_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[1:n_terms],
         MeanSqs = env_terms_CN$MeanSqs[1:n_terms],
         F_statistic = round(env_terms_CN$F[1:n_terms], 2),
         p_value = env_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:n_terms],
         stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      
        # Get total inertia for calculations
        total_inertia <- sum(env_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
      
        # Add additional columns
        env_df$R2 <- round(env_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
        env_df$Variance_Percent <- round(env_df$R2 * 100, 1)
        env_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(env_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", env_df$p_value))
        env_df$significance <- case_when(
          env_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
          env_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
          env_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
          env_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
          TRUE ~ ""
       )
      
      # Add to main table
        panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, env_df)
       cat("✓ Environmental model ANOVA processed\n")
     }
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }

  if ("spatial" %in% names(models_CN)) {
   # Spatial model term-by-term ANOVA
   spatial_model_CN <- models_CN[["spatial"]]
    try({
      cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Spatial model...\n")
      spatial_terms_CN <- anova(spatial_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
    
     # Print the full results for inspection
      cat("Spatial model ANOVA results:\n")
     print(spatial_terms_CN)
    
     if (!is.null(spatial_terms_CN)) {
       # Create a properly sized dataframe
       n_terms <- nrow(spatial_terms_CN) - 1  # Exclude residual row
      
        # Create data frame with consistent sizing
        spatial_df <- data.frame(
         Model = rep("Spatial", n_terms),
         Variable = rownames(spatial_terms_CN)[1:n_terms],
         Df = spatial_terms_CN$Df[1:n_terms],
         SumOfSqs = spatial_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[1:n_terms],
         MeanSqs = spatial_terms_CN$MeanSqs[1:n_terms],
         F_statistic = round(spatial_terms_CN$F[1:n_terms], 2),
          p_value = spatial_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:n_terms],
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
       )
      
        # Get total inertia for calculations
        total_inertia <- sum(spatial_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
      
        # Add additional columns
       spatial_df$R2 <- round(spatial_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
        spatial_df$Variance_Percent <- round(spatial_df$R2 * 100, 1)
        spatial_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(spatial_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", spatial_df$p_value))
        spatial_df$significance <- case_when(
          spatial_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
          spatial_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
          spatial_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
          spatial_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
          TRUE ~ ""
        )
      
      # Add to main table
        panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, spatial_df)
        cat("✓ Spatial model ANOVA processed\n")
      }
   }, silent = FALSE)
  }

# Add combined model if it exists
  if ("env_spatial_combined" %in% names(models_CN)) {
   # Combined model term-by-term ANOVA
   combined_model_CN <- models_CN[["env_spatial_combined"]]
   try({
     cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Combined model...\n")
     combined_terms_CN <- anova(combined_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
    
    # Print the full results for inspection
     cat("Combined model ANOVA results:\n")
      print(combined_terms_CN)
    
      if (!is.null(combined_terms_CN)) {
      # Create a properly sized dataframe
        n_terms <- nrow(combined_terms_CN) - 1  # Exclude residual row
      
      # Create data frame with consistent sizing
       combined_df <- data.frame(
         Model = rep("Combined", n_terms),
          Variable = rownames(combined_terms_CN)[1:n_terms],
          Df = combined_terms_CN$Df[1:n_terms],
          SumOfSqs = combined_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[1:n_terms],
          MeanSqs = combined_terms_CN$MeanSqs[1:n_terms],
          F_statistic = round(combined_terms_CN$F[1:n_terms], 2),
         p_value = combined_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:n_terms],
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
       )
      
      # Get total inertia for calculations
       total_inertia <- sum(combined_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
      
      # Add additional columns
        combined_df$R2 <- round(combined_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
        combined_df$Variance_Percent <- round(combined_df$R2 * 100, 1)
        combined_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(combined_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", combined_df$p_value))
        combined_df$significance <- case_when(
          combined_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
         combined_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
         combined_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
         combined_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
         TRUE ~ ""
        )
      
      # Add to main table
        panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, combined_df)
        cat("✓ Combined model ANOVA processed\n")
      }
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }

# Finalize formatting and clean up variable names for display
  if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
  # Clean up variable names
   panel_e_CN$Variable_Clean <- case_when(
     panel_e_CN$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
     panel_e_CN$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
     panel_e_CN$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
     panel_e_CN$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
     TRUE ~ panel_e_CN$Variable
   )
  
  # Sort by model and variance explained
    panel_e_CN <- panel_e_CN %>%
      arrange(Model, desc(Variance_Percent))
  
   cat("Final ANOVA by terms table has", nrow(panel_e_CN), "rows\n")
    print(head(panel_e_CN[, c("Model", "Variable_Clean", "Df", "Variance_Percent", "F_statistic", "p_formatted", "significance")]))
  } else {
    cat("WARNING: No rows in panel_e_CN! Check the ANOVA section for errors.\n")
  }
  
  # ===========  EXPORT TO CSV FILES FIRST (MORE RELIABLE THAN EXCEL) ============
  
  cat("\nExporting tables to CSV files...\n")
  
  # Create directories if needed
  csv_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "csv_tables")
  dir.create(csv_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Export each panel to CSV
  csv_files <- list()
  
  # Panel A
  csv_files$panel_a <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5a_Variance_Partitioning.csv")
  tryCatch({
    write.csv(panel_a_CN, file = csv_files$panel_a, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("✓ Exported Panel A to:", csv_files$panel_a, "\n")
    cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_a_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_a_CN), "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("ERROR exporting Panel A:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
  
  # Panel B
  csv_files$panel_b <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5b_Individual_Variables.csv")
  tryCatch({
    write.csv(panel_b_CN, file = csv_files$panel_b, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("✓ Exported Panel B to:", csv_files$panel_b, "\n")
    cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_b_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_b_CN), "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("ERROR exporting Panel B:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
  
  # Panel C
  if (nrow(panel_c_CN) > 0) {
    csv_files$panel_c <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5c_Axis_Information.csv")
    tryCatch({
      write.csv(panel_c_CN, file = csv_files$panel_c, row.names = FALSE)
      cat("✓ Exported Panel C to:", csv_files$panel_c, "\n")
      cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_c_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_c_CN), "\n")
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR exporting Panel C:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    })
  }
  
  # Panel D
  if (nrow(panel_d_CN) > 0) {
    csv_files$panel_d <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5d_Variable_Loadings.csv")
    tryCatch({
      write.csv(panel_d_CN, file = csv_files$panel_d, row.names = FALSE)
      cat("✓ Exported Panel D to:", csv_files$panel_d, "\n")
      cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_d_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_d_CN), "\n")
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR exporting Panel D:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    })
  }
  
  # Panel E
  if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
    csv_files$panel_e <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5e_ANOVA_by_Terms.csv")
    tryCatch({
      write.csv(panel_e_CN, file = csv_files$panel_e, row.names = FALSE)
      cat("✓ Exported Panel E to:", csv_files$panel_e, "\n")
      cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_e_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_e_CN), "\n")
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR exporting Panel E:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    })
  }
  
  # ============ EXPORT TO EXCEL (AFTER CSV BACKUP) ================
  
  cat("\nExporting to Excel file:", output_file_CN, "\n")
  
  # Create workbook
  tryCatch({
    wb_CN <- createWorkbook()
    
    # Define styles
    header_style_CN <- createStyle(
      fontName = "Arial",
      fontSize = 12,
      fontColour = "white",
      fgFill = "#1f4e79",
      textDecoration = "bold",
      halign = "center",
      valign = "center",
      border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
      borderColour = "black"
    )
    
    data_style_CN <- createStyle(
      fontName = "Arial", 
      fontSize = 10,
      halign = "center",
      valign = "center",
      border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
      borderColour = "grey"
    )
    
    # Panel A
    addWorksheet(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning")
    writeData(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", panel_a_CN)
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a_CN)) {
      addStyle(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    if (nrow(panel_a_CN) > 0) {
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_a_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Panel B
    addWorksheet(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables")
    writeData(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", panel_b_CN)
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b_CN)) {
      addStyle(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    if (nrow(panel_b_CN) > 0) {
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_b_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Panel C
    if (nrow(panel_c_CN) > 0) {
      addWorksheet(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information")
      writeData(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", panel_c_CN)
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
      }
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_c_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Panel D
    if (nrow(panel_d_CN) > 0) {
      addWorksheet(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings")
      writeData(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", panel_d_CN)
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
      }
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_d_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Panel E (renamed from Model_Selection to ANOVA_by_Terms)
    if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
      addWorksheet(wb_CN, "E_ANOVA_by_Terms")
      writeData(wb_CN, "E_ANOVA_by_Terms", panel_e_CN)
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "E_ANOVA_by_Terms", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
      }
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_e_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "E_ANOVA_by_Terms", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Summary sheet
    summary_info_CN <- data.frame(
      Metric = c("Analysis Type", "Dataset", "Sample Size", "Number of Phyla", 
                "Distance Method", "Permutations", "Significance Levels"),
      Value = c("Distance-based Redundancy Analysis (dbRDA)", 
                "CoralNet Recruitment Phyla",
                nrow(community_CN), 
                ncol(community_CN),
                "Bray-Curtis", 
                "999", 
                "*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    addWorksheet(wb_CN, "Summary")
    writeData(wb_CN, "Summary", summary_info_CN)
    for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info_CN)) {
      addStyle(wb_CN, "Summary", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    if (nrow(summary_info_CN) > 0) {
      for (row in 2:(nrow(summary_info_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "Summary", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Auto-size columns
    for (sheet in names(wb_CN)) {
      setColWidths(wb_CN, sheet, cols = 1:20, widths = "auto")
    }
    
    # Save workbook with error handling
    saveWorkbook(wb_CN, output_file_CN, overwrite = TRUE)
    cat("✓ Excel file saved successfully:", output_file_CN, "\n")
    cat("✓ Sheets created:", paste(names(wb_CN), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("ERROR creating Excel file:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    cat("CSV files have been saved as backup.\n")
  })
  
  # Return list of all panels and file paths
  return(list(
    panel_a_CN = panel_a_CN,
    panel_b_CN = panel_b_CN, 
    panel_c_CN = panel_c_CN,
    panel_d_CN = panel_d_CN,
    panel_e_CN = panel_e_CN,
    summary_CN = summary_info_CN,
    excel_path = output_file_CN,
    csv_paths = csv_files
  ))
}
```

#Function with ANOVA PANEL E
```{r}
# Function to create comprehensive CoralNet dbRDA summary table
create_coralnet_dbrda_summary_table <- function(analysis_results_CN, output_file_CN = "CoralNet_Recruitment_Phyla_dbRDA_summary.xlsx") {
  
  cat("Creating comprehensive CoralNet dbRDA summary table...\n")
  
  # Extract components and assign to global environment
  results_CN <<- analysis_results_CN$results
  models_CN <<- analysis_results_CN$models
  metadata_CN <<- analysis_results_CN$metadata
  community_CN <<- analysis_results_CN$community
  
  # Get the output directory from the Excel file path
  output_dir <- dirname(output_file_CN)
  
  # ================= PANEL A: VARIANCE PARTITIONING SUMMARY ===============
  
  cat("Creating Panel A: Variance Partitioning Summary...\n")
  
  # Key models for variance partitioning
  key_analyses_CN <- c("environmental", "spatial", "env_spatial_combined", "site_only")
  
  panel_a_CN <<- results_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% key_analyses_CN) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, Adj_R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Adj_Variance_Percent = round(Adj_R2 * 100, 1),
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999,
      Sample_Size = nrow(community_CN),
      Num_Phyla = ncol(community_CN)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(match(Analysis, key_analyses_CN))
  
  # Calculate residual variance
  max_explained_CN <- max(panel_a_CN$Variance_Percent, na.rm = TRUE)
  residual_variance_CN <- 100 - max_explained_CN
  
  # Add residual row
  residual_row_CN <- data.frame(
    Analysis = "residual",
    R2 = residual_variance_CN/100,
    Adj_R2 = NA,
    F_statistic = NA,
    p_value = NA,
    significance = "",
    Variance_Percent = residual_variance_CN,
    Adj_Variance_Percent = NA,
    p_value_formatted = "N/A",
    Test_Method = "N/A",
    Permutations = NA,
    Sample_Size = nrow(community_CN),
    Num_Phyla = ncol(community_CN)
  )
  
  panel_a_CN <<- rbind(panel_a_CN, residual_row_CN)
  
  # Clean up analysis names
  panel_a_CN$Analysis_Name <- case_when(
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "environmental" ~ "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "spatial" ~ "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)", 
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "env_spatial_combined" ~ "Environmental + Spatial Combined",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "site_only" ~ "Site Identity Effects",
    panel_a_CN$Analysis == "residual" ~ "Residual (Unexplained)",
    TRUE ~ panel_a_CN$Analysis
  )
  
  # ========== PANEL B: INDIVIDUAL ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE CONTRIBUTIONS =============
  
  cat("Creating Panel B: Individual Variable Contributions...\n")
  
  # Marginal effects (variables alone)
  marginal_analyses_CN <- c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone")
  
  marginal_effects_CN <<- results_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% marginal_analyses_CN) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "depth_alone" ~ "Depth",
        Analysis == "turbidity_alone" ~ "Turbidity",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Marginal_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Marginal"
    )
  
  # Conditional effects (variables added last)
  conditional_analyses_CN <- c("turbidity_after_depth", "spatial_after_env")
  
  conditional_effects_CN <<- results_CN %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% conditional_analyses_CN) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "turbidity_after_depth" ~ "Turbidity|Depth",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_env" ~ "Spatial|Environmental",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Conditional_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Conditional"
    )
  
  # Combine marginal and conditional
  panel_b_CN <<- dplyr::full_join(
    marginal_effects_CN %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Marginal_Variance_Percent, F_statistic, p_value, significance),
    conditional_effects_CN %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Conditional_Variance_Percent),
    by = "Variable"
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        is.na(p_value) ~ "N/A",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Degrees_Freedom = 1,  # Assuming single variables
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999
    )
  
  # ===========  PANEL C: dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION =============
  
  cat("Creating Panel C: dbRDA Axis Information...\n")
  
  # Extract axis information from main environmental model
  panel_c_CN <<- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    model_CN <- models_CN[["environmental"]]
    eigenvals_CN <<- eigenvals(model_CN)
    total_inertia_CN <<- sum(eigenvals_CN)
    
    # Create axis summary
    for (i in 1:min(length(eigenvals_CN), 4)) {  # Up to 4 axes
      axis_row_CN <- data.frame(
        Axis = paste0("dbRDA", i),
        Eigenvalue = round(eigenvals_CN[i], 4),
        Variance_Percent = round((eigenvals_CN[i] / total_inertia_CN) * 100, 1),
        Cumulative_Percent = round((sum(eigenvals_CN[1:i]) / total_inertia_CN) * 100, 1)
      )
      panel_c_CN <<- rbind(panel_c_CN, axis_row_CN)
    }
    
    # Add axis significance (if available)
    try({
      axis_test_CN <<- anova(model_CN, by = "axis", permutations = 999)
      if (nrow(axis_test_CN) >= nrow(panel_c_CN)) {
        panel_c_CN$F_statistic <- round(axis_test_CN$F[1:nrow(panel_c_CN)], 2)
        panel_c_CN$p_value <- axis_test_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:nrow(panel_c_CN)]
        panel_c_CN$p_value_formatted <- case_when(
          panel_c_CN$p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
          is.na(panel_c_CN$p_value) ~ "N/A",
          TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", panel_c_CN$p_value)
        )
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ===========  PANEL D: ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE LOADINGS ==============
  
  cat("Creating Panel D: Environmental Variable Loadings...\n")
  
  panel_d_CN <<- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    model_CN <- models_CN[["environmental"]]
    
    try({
      # Extract biplot scores (environmental loadings)
      bp_scores_CN <<- scores(model_CN, display = "bp")
      
      if (!is.null(bp_scores_CN) && length(bp_scores_CN) > 0) {
        
        if (is.vector(bp_scores_CN)) {
          panel_d_CN <<- data.frame(
            Variable = names(bp_scores_CN),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores_CN,
            dbRDA2_loading = 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        } else {
          panel_d_CN <<- data.frame(
            Variable = rownames(bp_scores_CN),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores_CN[, 1],
            dbRDA2_loading = if(ncol(bp_scores_CN) > 1) bp_scores_CN[, 2] else 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        }
        
        # Calculate vector length (correlation strength)
        panel_d_CN$Vector_Length <- sqrt(panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading^2 + panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading^2)
        
        # Clean variable names
        panel_d_CN$Variable_Name <- case_when(
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
          panel_d_CN$Variable == "temp_mean" ~ "Temperature",
          TRUE ~ panel_d_CN$Variable
        )
        
        # Round values
        panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading <- round(panel_d_CN$dbRDA1_loading, 3)
        panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading <- round(panel_d_CN$dbRDA2_loading, 3)
        panel_d_CN$Vector_Length <- round(panel_d_CN$Vector_Length, 3)
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ===========  PANEL E: ANOVA BY TERMS ==================
  
  cat("Creating Panel E: ANOVA by Terms...\n")
  
  panel_e_CN <<- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    # Environmental model term-by-term ANOVA
    env_model_CN <<- models_CN[["environmental"]]
    try({
      cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Environmental model...\n")
      env_terms_CN <<- anova(env_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
      
      # Print the full results for inspection
      cat("Environmental model ANOVA results:\n")
      print(env_terms_CN)
      
      if (!is.null(env_terms_CN)) {
        # Create a properly sized dataframe
        n_terms <- nrow(env_terms_CN) - 1  # Exclude residual row
        
        # Create data frame with consistent sizing
        env_df <- data.frame(
          Model = rep("Environmental", n_terms),
          Variable = rownames(env_terms_CN)[1:n_terms],
          Df = env_terms_CN$Df[1:n_terms],
          SumOfSqs = env_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[1:n_terms],
          MeanSqs = env_terms_CN$MeanSqs[1:n_terms],
          F_statistic = round(env_terms_CN$F[1:n_terms], 2),
          p_value = env_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:n_terms],
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        
        # Get total inertia for calculations
        total_inertia <- sum(env_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
        
        # Add additional columns
        env_df$R2 <- round(env_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
        env_df$Variance_Percent <- round(env_df$R2 * 100, 1)
        env_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(env_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", env_df$p_value))
        env_df$significance <- case_when(
          env_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
          env_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
          env_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
          env_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
          TRUE ~ ""
        )
        
        # Save to global environment
        env_terms_df_CN <<- env_df
        
        # Add to main table
        panel_e_CN <<- rbind(panel_e_CN, env_df)
        cat("✓ Environmental model ANOVA processed\n")
      }
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
  
  if ("spatial" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    # Spatial model term-by-term ANOVA
    spatial_model_CN <<- models_CN[["spatial"]]
    try({
      cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Spatial model...\n")
      spatial_terms_CN <<- anova(spatial_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
      
      # Print the full results for inspection
      cat("Spatial model ANOVA results:\n")
      print(spatial_terms_CN)
      
      if (!is.null(spatial_terms_CN)) {
        # Create a properly sized dataframe
        n_terms <- nrow(spatial_terms_CN) - 1  # Exclude residual row
        
        # Create data frame with consistent sizing
        spatial_df <- data.frame(
          Model = rep("Spatial", n_terms),
          Variable = rownames(spatial_terms_CN)[1:n_terms],
          Df = spatial_terms_CN$Df[1:n_terms],
          SumOfSqs = spatial_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[1:n_terms],
          MeanSqs = spatial_terms_CN$MeanSqs[1:n_terms],
          F_statistic = round(spatial_terms_CN$F[1:n_terms], 2),
          p_value = spatial_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:n_terms],
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        
        # Get total inertia for calculations
        total_inertia <- sum(spatial_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
        
        # Add additional columns
        spatial_df$R2 <- round(spatial_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
        spatial_df$Variance_Percent <- round(spatial_df$R2 * 100, 1)
        spatial_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(spatial_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", spatial_df$p_value))
        spatial_df$significance <- case_when(
          spatial_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
          spatial_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
          spatial_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
          spatial_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
          TRUE ~ ""
        )
        
        # Save to global environment
        spatial_terms_df_CN <<- spatial_df
        
        # Add to main table
        panel_e_CN <<- rbind(panel_e_CN, spatial_df)
        cat("✓ Spatial model ANOVA processed\n")
      }
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Add combined model if it exists
  if ("env_spatial_combined" %in% names(models_CN)) {
    # Combined model term-by-term ANOVA
    combined_model_CN <<- models_CN[["env_spatial_combined"]]
    try({
      cat("\nRunning term-by-term ANOVA for Combined model...\n")
```
