```{r}
      combined_terms_CN <<- anova(combined_model_CN, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
      
      # Print the full results for inspection
      cat("Combined model ANOVA results:\n")
      print(combined_terms_CN)
      
      if (!is.null(combined_terms_CN)) {
        # Create a properly sized dataframe
        n_terms <- nrow(combined_terms_CN) - 1  # Exclude residual row
        
        # Create data frame with consistent sizing
        combined_df <- data.frame(
          Model = rep("Combined", n_terms),
          Variable = rownames(combined_terms_CN)[1:n_terms],
          Df = combined_terms_CN$Df[1:n_terms],
          SumOfSqs = combined_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[1:n_terms],
          MeanSqs = combined_terms_CN$MeanSqs[1:n_terms],
          F_statistic = round(combined_terms_CN$F[1:n_terms], 2),
          p_value = combined_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[1:n_terms],
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        
        # Get total inertia for calculations
        total_inertia <- sum(combined_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
        
        # Add additional columns
        combined_df$R2 <- round(combined_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
        combined_df$Variance_Percent <- round(combined_df$R2 * 100, 1)
        combined_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(combined_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", combined_df$p_value))
        combined_df$significance <- case_when(
          combined_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
          combined_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
          combined_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
          combined_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
          TRUE ~ ""
        )
        
        # Save to global environment
        combined_terms_df_CN <<- combined_df
        
        # Add to main table
        panel_e_CN <<- rbind(panel_e_CN, combined_df)
        cat("✓ Combined model ANOVA processed\n")
      }
    }, silent = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Finalize formatting and clean up variable names for display
  if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
    # Clean up variable names
    panel_e_CN$Variable_Clean <- case_when(
      panel_e_CN$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
      panel_e_CN$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
      panel_e_CN$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
      panel_e_CN$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
      TRUE ~ panel_e_CN$Variable
    )
    
    # Sort by model and variance explained
    panel_e_CN <<- panel_e_CN %>%
      arrange(Model, desc(Variance_Percent))
    
    cat("Final ANOVA by terms table has", nrow(panel_e_CN), "rows\n")
    print(head(panel_e_CN[, c("Model", "Variable_Clean", "Df", "Variance_Percent", "F_statistic", "p_formatted", "significance")]))
  } else {
    cat("WARNING: No rows in panel_e_CN! Check the ANOVA section for errors.\n")
  }
  
  # ============= EXPORT TO CSV FILES FIRST ================
  
  cat("\nExporting tables to CSV files...\n")
  
  # Create directories if needed
  csv_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "csv_tables")
  dir.create(csv_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Export each panel to CSV
  csv_files <- list()
  
  # Panel A
  csv_files$panel_a <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5a_Variance_Partitioning.csv")
  tryCatch({
    write.csv(panel_a_CN, file = csv_files$panel_a, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("✓ Exported Panel A to:", csv_files$panel_a, "\n")
    cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_a_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_a_CN), "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("ERROR exporting Panel A:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
  
  # Panel B
  csv_files$panel_b <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5b_Individual_Variables.csv")
  tryCatch({
    write.csv(panel_b_CN, file = csv_files$panel_b, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("✓ Exported Panel B to:", csv_files$panel_b, "\n")
    cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_b_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_b_CN), "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("ERROR exporting Panel B:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
  
  # Panel C
  if (nrow(panel_c_CN) > 0) {
    csv_files$panel_c <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5c_Axis_Information.csv")
    tryCatch({
      write.csv(panel_c_CN, file = csv_files$panel_c, row.names = FALSE)
      cat("✓ Exported Panel C to:", csv_files$panel_c, "\n")
      cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_c_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_c_CN), "\n")
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR exporting Panel C:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    })
  }
  
  # Panel D
  if (nrow(panel_d_CN) > 0) {
    csv_files$panel_d <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5d_Variable_Loadings.csv")
    tryCatch({
      write.csv(panel_d_CN, file = csv_files$panel_d, row.names = FALSE)
      cat("✓ Exported Panel D to:", csv_files$panel_d, "\n")
      cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_d_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_d_CN), "\n")
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR exporting Panel D:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    })
  }
  
  # Panel E
  if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
    csv_files$panel_e <- file.path(csv_dir, "Table_S5e_ANOVA_by_Terms.csv")
    tryCatch({
      write.csv(panel_e_CN, file = csv_files$panel_e, row.names = FALSE)
      cat("✓ Exported Panel E to:", csv_files$panel_e, "\n")
      cat("  Rows:", nrow(panel_e_CN), "Columns:", ncol(panel_e_CN), "\n")
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR exporting Panel E:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    })
  }
  
  # =============  EXPORT TO EXCEL ===============
  
  cat("\nExporting to Excel file:", output_file_CN, "\n")
  
  # Create workbook
  tryCatch({
    wb_CN <- createWorkbook()
    
    # Define styles
    header_style_CN <- createStyle(
      fontName = "Arial",
      fontSize = 12,
      fontColour = "white",
      fgFill = "#1f4e79",
      textDecoration = "bold",
      halign = "center",
      valign = "center",
      border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
      borderColour = "black"
    )
    
    data_style_CN <- createStyle(
      fontName = "Arial", 
      fontSize = 10,
      halign = "center",
      valign = "center",
      border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
      borderColour = "grey"
    )
    
    # Panel A
    addWorksheet(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning")
    writeData(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", panel_a_CN)
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a_CN)) {
      addStyle(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    if (nrow(panel_a_CN) > 0) {
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_a_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "A_Variance_Partitioning", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Panel B
    addWorksheet(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables")
    writeData(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", panel_b_CN)
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b_CN)) {
      addStyle(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    if (nrow(panel_b_CN) > 0) {
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_b_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "B_Individual_Variables", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Panel C
    if (nrow(panel_c_CN) > 0) {
      addWorksheet(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information")
      writeData(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", panel_c_CN)
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
      }
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_c_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "C_Axis_Information", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Panel D
    if (nrow(panel_d_CN) > 0) {
      addWorksheet(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings")
      writeData(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", panel_d_CN)
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
      }
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_d_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "D_Variable_Loadings", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Panel E
    if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
      addWorksheet(wb_CN, "E_ANOVA_by_Terms")
      writeData(wb_CN, "E_ANOVA_by_Terms", panel_e_CN)
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e_CN)) {
        addStyle(wb_CN, "E_ANOVA_by_Terms", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
      }
      for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_e_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "E_ANOVA_by_Terms", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Summary sheet
    summary_info_CN <<- data.frame(
      Metric = c("Analysis Type", "Dataset", "Sample Size", "Number of Phyla", 
                "Distance Method", "Permutations", "Significance Levels"),
      Value = c("Distance-based Redundancy Analysis (dbRDA)", 
                "CoralNet Recruitment Phyla",
                nrow(community_CN), 
                ncol(community_CN),
                "Bray-Curtis", 
                "999", 
                "*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    addWorksheet(wb_CN, "Summary")
    writeData(wb_CN, "Summary", summary_info_CN)
    for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info_CN)) {
      addStyle(wb_CN, "Summary", header_style_CN, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    if (nrow(summary_info_CN) > 0) {
      for (row in 2:(nrow(summary_info_CN)+1)) {
        for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info_CN)) {
          addStyle(wb_CN, "Summary", data_style_CN, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Auto-size columns
    for (sheet in names(wb_CN)) {
      setColWidths(wb_CN, sheet, cols = 1:20, widths = "auto")
    }
    
    # Save workbook with error handling
    saveWorkbook(wb_CN, output_file_CN, overwrite = TRUE)
    cat("✓ Excel file saved successfully:", output_file_CN, "\n")
    cat("✓ Sheets created:", paste(names(wb_CN), collapse = ", "), "\n")
    
    # Save workbook object to global environment
    wb_CN_global <<- wb_CN
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("ERROR creating Excel file:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    cat("CSV files have been saved as backup.\n")
  })
  
  # Save csv_files to global environment
  csv_files_CN <<- csv_files
  
  # Return list of all panels and file paths (for backward compatibility)
  return(list(
    panel_a_CN = panel_a_CN,
    panel_b_CN = panel_b_CN, 
    panel_c_CN = panel_c_CN,
    panel_d_CN = panel_d_CN,
    panel_e_CN = panel_e_CN,
    summary_CN = summary_info_CN,
    excel_path = output_file_CN,
    csv_paths = csv_files
  ))
}
```

# Execute function
```{r}
if (exists("recruitment_analysis")) {
  
  cat("Creating comprehensive CoralNet dbRDA summary table...\n")
  
  # Create the summary table with CN suffix
  summary_export_CN <- create_coralnet_dbrda_summary_table(
    analysis_results_CN = recruitment_analysis,
    output_file_CN = file.path("/Users/nicolepittoors/Documents/Documents - biscaya/Bioinformatics/CoralNet/CN_dbRDA_4thRoot", "Table_S2_CoralNet_Recruitment_Phyla_dbRDA_Summary.xlsx")
  )
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("CORALNET EXPORT COMPLETE\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  cat("File saved as:", summary_export_CN$excel_path, "\n") # Updated from file_path_CN to excel_path
  cat("Panels included:\n")
  cat("  A. Variance Partitioning Summary\n")
  cat("  B. Individual Variable Contributions\n") 
  cat("  C. dbRDA Axis Information\n")
  cat("  D. Environmental Variable Loadings\n")
  cat("  E. ANOVA by Terms\n") # Updated from "Model Selection Results" to "ANOVA by Terms"
  cat("  Summary: Analysis metadata\n")
  
  # Display preview of Panel A
  cat("\nPreview of Panel A (Variance Partitioning):\n")
  print(summary_export_CN$panel_a_CN %>% 
        dplyr::select(Analysis_Name, Variance_Percent, p_value_formatted, significance) %>%
        head())
  
  # You can now also access all objects directly in the console
  cat("\nAll objects are now available in the global environment.\n")
  cat("Examples:\n")
  cat("- panel_e_CN: The ANOVA by Terms table\n")
  cat("- env_terms_CN: The environmental model ANOVA results\n")
  cat("- models_CN: All the dbRDA models\n")
  
} else {
  cat("Error: recruitment_analysis object not found. Please run the CoralNet dbRDA analysis first.\n")
}
```


```{r}
# More direct fix for panel_e_CN
fix_panel_e_direct <- function() {
  panel_e_CN <- data.frame()
  
  # Check Environmental model
  if (exists("env_terms_CN")) {
    cat("Examining env_terms_CN structure:\n")
    print(str(env_terms_CN))
    print(env_terms_CN)
    
    cat("\nExtracting terms manually...\n")
    
    # Get all row and column names
    all_rows <- rownames(env_terms_CN)
    all_cols <- names(env_terms_CN)
    
    cat("Row names:", paste(all_rows, collapse=", "), "\n")
    cat("Column names:", paste(all_cols, collapse=", "), "\n")
    
    # Manually extract environmental terms
    env_terms <- all_rows[all_rows != "Residual"]
    
    # Create data frame for environmental terms
    for (term in env_terms) {
      cat("Processing term:", term, "\n")
      
      # Get row index
      row_idx <- which(all_rows == term)
      
      # Create record for this term
      term_df <- data.frame(
        Model = "Environmental",
        Variable = term,
        Df = env_terms_CN$Df[row_idx],
        SumOfSqs = env_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[row_idx],
        F_statistic = round(env_terms_CN$F[row_idx], 2),
        p_value = env_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[row_idx],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      # Calculate percent variance
      total_inertia <- sum(env_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
      term_df$R2 <- round(term_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
      term_df$Variance_Percent <- round(term_df$R2 * 100, 1)
      term_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(term_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", term_df$p_value))
      term_df$significance <- case_when(
        term_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        term_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
        term_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        term_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
      
      # Add to results
      panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, term_df)
    }
  }
  
  # Process Spatial model
  if (exists("spatial_terms_CN")) {
    cat("\nExamining spatial_terms_CN structure:\n")
    print(str(spatial_terms_CN))
    print(spatial_terms_CN)
    
    # Get all row and column names
    all_rows <- rownames(spatial_terms_CN)
    
    # Manually extract spatial terms
    spatial_terms <- all_rows[all_rows != "Residual"]
    
    # Create data frame for spatial terms
    for (term in spatial_terms) {
      cat("Processing term:", term, "\n")
      
      # Get row index
      row_idx <- which(all_rows == term)
      
      # Create record for this term
      term_df <- data.frame(
        Model = "Spatial",
        Variable = term,
        Df = spatial_terms_CN$Df[row_idx],
        SumOfSqs = spatial_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[row_idx],
        F_statistic = round(spatial_terms_CN$F[row_idx], 2),
        p_value = spatial_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[row_idx],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      # Calculate percent variance
      total_inertia <- sum(spatial_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
      term_df$R2 <- round(term_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
      term_df$Variance_Percent <- round(term_df$R2 * 100, 1)
      term_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(term_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", term_df$p_value))
      term_df$significance <- case_when(
        term_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        term_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
        term_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        term_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
      
      # Add to results
      panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, term_df)
    }
  }
  
  # Process Combined model
  if (exists("combined_terms_CN")) {
    cat("\nExamining combined_terms_CN structure:\n")
    print(str(combined_terms_CN))
    print(combined_terms_CN)
    
    # Get all row and column names
    all_rows <- rownames(combined_terms_CN)
    
    # Manually extract combined terms
    combined_terms <- all_rows[all_rows != "Residual"]
    
    # Create data frame for combined terms
    for (term in combined_terms) {
      cat("Processing term:", term, "\n")
      
      # Get row index
      row_idx <- which(all_rows == term)
      
      # Create record for this term
      term_df <- data.frame(
        Model = "Combined",
        Variable = term,
        Df = combined_terms_CN$Df[row_idx],
        SumOfSqs = combined_terms_CN$SumOfSqs[row_idx],
        F_statistic = round(combined_terms_CN$F[row_idx], 2),
        p_value = combined_terms_CN$`Pr(>F)`[row_idx],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      # Calculate percent variance
      total_inertia <- sum(combined_terms_CN$SumOfSqs)
      term_df$R2 <- round(term_df$SumOfSqs / total_inertia, 4)
      term_df$Variance_Percent <- round(term_df$R2 * 100, 1)
      term_df$p_formatted <- ifelse(term_df$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", term_df$p_value))
      term_df$significance <- case_when(
        term_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        term_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
        term_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        term_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
      
      # Add to results
      panel_e_CN <- rbind(panel_e_CN, term_df)
    }
  }
  
  # Add variable clean names and sort
  if (nrow(panel_e_CN) > 0) {
    # Clean up variable names
    panel_e_CN$Variable_Clean <- case_when(
      panel_e_CN$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
      panel_e_CN$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
      panel_e_CN$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
      panel_e_CN$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
      TRUE ~ panel_e_CN$Variable
    )
    
    # Sort by model and variance explained
    panel_e_CN <- panel_e_CN %>%
      arrange(Model, desc(Variance_Percent))
  }
  
  # Print results
  cat("\nFinal ANOVA by terms table has", nrow(panel_e_CN), "rows\n")
  print(panel_e_CN[, c("Model", "Variable_Clean", "Df", "Variance_Percent", "F_statistic", "p_formatted", "significance")])
  
  # Export to CSV
  output_dir <- dirname(getwd())  # Adjust as needed
  csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, "Table_S5e_ANOVA_by_Terms.csv")
  write.csv(panel_e_CN, file = csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("\n✓ Exported fixed Panel E to:", csv_path, "\n")
  
  # Return the fixed panel
  return(panel_e_CN)
}

# Run the direct fix
panel_e_CN <- fix_panel_e_direct()
```


#--------------- SIMPER ANALYSIS -------------------
Step 1: Creates environmental groups (binary & 3-category) for all variables
Step 2: Creates geographic regions for spatial controls
Step 3: Runs SIMPER analyses on all groupings
Step 4: Extracts and corrects 3-category turbidity results properly
Step 5: Applies FDR correction for multiple testing
Step 6: Exports all results to CSV files
Step 7: Provides clear interpretation for manuscript

# Simper Prep: load libraries, create directory, creat fundction definitions
```{r}

# REQUIRED LIBRARIES AND SETUP

# library(vegan)
# library(dplyr)
# library(tidyr)

# Create output directory
output_dir <- "Final_SIMPER_Results"
if(!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
  cat("Created output directory:", output_dir, "\n")
}

# FUNCTION DEFINITIONS

# Function to create environmental groups using k-means clustering
create_environmental_groups <- function(env_data, community_data, variable_name, 
                                      method = "kmeans", n_groups = 2) {
  
  env_variable <- env_data[[variable_name]]
  
  if(is.null(env_variable)) {
    stop(paste("Variable", variable_name, "not found in environmental data"))
  }
  
  complete_cases <- !is.na(env_variable)
  env_clean <- env_variable[complete_cases]
  community_clean <- community_data[complete_cases, ]
  
  cat("Creating", n_groups, "groups for:", variable_name, "\n")
  cat("Range:", round(min(env_clean), 3), "to", round(max(env_clean), 3), "\n")
  
  if(method == "kmeans") {
    k_result <- kmeans(env_clean, centers = n_groups, nstart = 25)
    
    # Fix label assignment based on actual environmental values
    cluster_means <- tapply(env_clean, k_result$cluster, mean)
    cluster_order <- order(cluster_means)  # Order by actual environmental values
    
    if(n_groups == 2) {
      group_labels <- c("Low", "High")
    } else if(n_groups == 3) {
      group_labels <- c("Low", "Medium", "High")
    } else {
      group_labels <- paste0("Group_", 1:n_groups)
    }
    
    # Create a mapping from old cluster numbers to new labels
    cluster_to_label <- group_labels[rank(cluster_means)]
    groups <- factor(cluster_to_label[k_result$cluster])
    
    # Calculate group statistics with correct labels
    group_stats <- data.frame(
      Group = group_labels,
      Count = as.numeric(table(groups)[group_labels]),
      Mean = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, mean)[group_labels], 3),
      Range_Min = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, min)[group_labels], 3),
      Range_Max = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, max)[group_labels], 3)
    )
  }
  
  cat("\nGroup Summary:\n")
  print(group_stats)
  
  # Return full-length vector (with NAs for excluded cases)
  full_groups <- rep(NA, length(env_variable))
  full_groups[complete_cases] <- as.character(groups)
  full_groups <- factor(full_groups)
  
  return(list(
    groups = full_groups,
    statistics = group_stats,
    method = method,
    variable = variable_name,
    complete_cases = complete_cases
  ))
}

# Function to run SIMPER analyses with sample size checking
run_simper_analyses <- function(community_data, group_list, min_group_size = 3) {
  
  simper_results <- list()
  
  for(group_name in names(group_list)) {
    groups <- group_list[[group_name]]
    
    group_counts <- table(groups, useNA = "no")
    if(length(group_counts) < 2 || min(group_counts) < min_group_size) {
      cat("Skipping", group_name, "- insufficient sample sizes\n")
      next
    }
    
    cat("Running SIMPER for:", group_name, "\n")
    cat("Groups:", paste(names(group_counts), collapse = ", "), "\n")
    cat("Sample sizes:", paste(group_counts, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
    
    complete_cases <- !is.na(groups)
    community_subset <- community_data[complete_cases, ]
    groups_subset <- groups[complete_cases]
    
    simper_result <- simper(community_subset, groups_subset)
    simper_results[[group_name]] <- simper_result
  }
  
  return(simper_results)
}

# Function to extract SIMPER results for 2-group comparisons
extract_simper_summary <- function(simper_result, comparison_name, top_n = 10) {
  simper_summary <- summary(simper_result)
  comparison_data <- simper_summary[[1]]
  top_taxa <- head(comparison_data, top_n)
  
  data.frame(
    Comparison = rep(comparison_name, nrow(top_taxa)),
    Taxon = rownames(top_taxa),
    Average_Contribution = round(top_taxa$average, 4),
    Cumulative_Contribution = round(top_taxa$cumsum, 3),
    P_value = top_taxa$p,
    Significance = case_when(
      top_taxa$p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      top_taxa$p < 0.01 ~ "**",
      top_taxa$p < 0.05 ~ "*",
      top_taxa$p < 0.1 ~ ".",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Function to extract 3-category SIMPER results (all pairwise comparisons)
extract_3category_simper <- function(simper_result, variable_name, top_n = 10) {
  simper_summary <- summary(simper_result)
  
  all_comparisons <- list()
  
  for(comp_name in names(simper_summary)) {
    comparison_data <- simper_summary[[comp_name]]
    top_taxa <- head(comparison_data, top_n)
    
    comparison_df <- data.frame(
      Variable = variable_name,
      Comparison = comp_name,
      Taxon = rownames(top_taxa),
      Average_Contribution = round(top_taxa$average, 4),
      Cumulative_Contribution = round(top_taxa$cumsum, 3),
      P_value = top_taxa$p,
      Group_A_Mean = round(top_taxa$ava, 4),
      Group_B_Mean = round(top_taxa$avb, 4),
      Significance = case_when(
        top_taxa$p < 0.001 ~ "***",
        top_taxa$p < 0.01 ~ "**",
        top_taxa$p < 0.05 ~ "*",
        top_taxa$p < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    all_comparisons[[comp_name]] <- comparison_df
  }
  
  # Combine all comparisons
  combined_results <- do.call(rbind, all_comparisons)
  return(combined_results)
}

# Function to apply FDR correction
apply_fdr_correction <- function(simper_summary_df) {
  corrected_results <- simper_summary_df %>%
    group_by(Comparison) %>%
    mutate(
      P_value_FDR = p.adjust(P_value, method = "fdr"),
      Significance_FDR = case_when(
        P_value_FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
        P_value_FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
        P_value_FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
        P_value_FDR < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  return(corrected_results)
}
```

# Step 1: Create Environmental Groups
Uses k-means clustering to create biologically meaningful groups from continuous environmental data
Converts gradients into categorical groups needed for SIMPER analysis
Output: Binary (high/low) and 3-category (high/medium/low) groups for each environmental variable
```{r}
# Variables to analyze
variables <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank", "latitude", "longitude")
env_groups <- list()

# Create binary and 3-category groups for each variable
for(var in variables) {
  cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
  
  # Binary groups
  binary_result <- create_environmental_groups(env_vars_depth_turb, CN_pcover_combined, var, 
                                              method = "kmeans", n_groups = 2)
  env_groups[[paste0(var, "_binary")]] <- binary_result$groups
  
  # 3-category groups  
  tertiary_result <- create_environmental_groups(env_vars_depth_turb, CN_pcover_combined, var,
                                                method = "kmeans", n_groups = 3)
  env_groups[[paste0(var, "_tertiary")]] <- tertiary_result$groups
}

# Verify the turbidity groups are correctly assigned
cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("VERIFYING TURBIDITY GROUP ASSIGNMENTS\n")

turbidity_verification <- env_vars_depth_turb %>%
  mutate(Group = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    Count = n(),
    Mean_Turbidity = round(mean(turbidity_std_rank), 3),
    Min_Turbidity = round(min(turbidity_std_rank), 3),
    Max_Turbidity = round(max(turbidity_std_rank), 3)
  )

cat("Turbidity group assignments:\n")
print(turbidity_verification)
cat("✓ Low = Clear water, Medium = Intermediate, High = Turbid water\n")
```

# STEP 2: CREATE GEOGRAPHIC REGIONS
Creates spatial control groups using latitude (north/south) and longitude (west/central/east)
Tests whether patterns are due to environmental factors vs. pure geographic/dispersal effects
Output: Geographic groupings independent of environmental variables
```{r}
# Check lat/long ranges
cat("Latitude range:", round(min(env_vars_depth_turb$latitude), 3), "to", 
    round(max(env_vars_depth_turb$latitude), 3), "\n")
cat("Longitude range:", round(min(env_vars_depth_turb$longitude), 3), "to", 
    round(max(env_vars_depth_turb$longitude), 3), "\n")

# Create latitude regions (North/South)
lat_median <- median(env_vars_depth_turb$latitude)
env_groups$lat_region <- ifelse(env_vars_depth_turb$latitude >= lat_median, "North", "South")

# Create longitude regions (West/Central/East)
long_terciles <- quantile(env_vars_depth_turb$longitude, probs = c(0, 0.33, 0.67, 1))
env_groups$long_region <- cut(env_vars_depth_turb$longitude, 
                              breaks = long_terciles, 
                              labels = c("West", "Central", "East"),
                              include.lowest = TRUE)

# Display geographic groupings
cat("\nLatitude regions:\n")
print(table(env_groups$lat_region, useNA = "ifany"))
cat("\nLongitude regions:\n") 
print(table(env_groups$long_region, useNA = "ifany"))
```

# STEP 3: RUN SIMPER ANALYSES
Runs SIMPER on all group combinations, checking sample sizes to ensure statistical validity
Identifies which specific taxa contribute most to community differences between groups
Output: SIMPER objects containing contribution and significance data for each taxon
```{r}

simper_results <- run_simper_analyses(CN_pcover_combined, env_groups)
```

# STEP 4: EXTRACT AND ANALYZE RESULTS
Extracts results from SIMPER objects and fixes mislabeled groups from k-means clustering
Makes results interpretable and corrects algorithmic labeling errors
Output: Clean data frames with proper group labels and effect directions
```{r}
# Extract binary comparison results
turbidity_binary <- extract_simper_summary(simper_results$turbidity_std_rank_binary, "Turbidity_Binary")
depth_binary <- extract_simper_summary(simper_results$depth_binary, "Depth_Binary")
lat_binary <- extract_simper_summary(simper_results$lat_region, "North_South_Latitude")
long_binary <- extract_simper_summary(simper_results$long_region, "West_Central_East_Longitude")

# Extract 3-category turbidity results (all pairwise comparisons)
cat("Extracting 3-category turbidity results...\n")
turbidity_3cat <- extract_3category_simper(simper_results$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary, "Turbidity_3Category")

cat("Using original turbidity groups (which are correct):\n")
cat("- Low = Clear water (mean ~3.0)\n")
cat("- Medium = Intermediate water (mean ~6.4)\n") 
cat("- High = Turbid water (mean ~11.4)\n")
```

# STEP 5 : APPLYING FOR CORRECTION FOR MULTIPLE TESTING
Applies FDR correction to control for false discoveries when testing many taxa
Maintains statistical rigor required for high-impact publication
Output: Corrected p-values and updated significance levels
```{r}
# Apply FDR correction to all results
turbidity_binary_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(turbidity_binary)
depth_binary_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(depth_binary)
lat_binary_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(lat_binary)
long_binary_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(long_binary)
turbidity_3cat_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(turbidity_3cat)
```

# STEP 6: EXPORT RESULTS
Saves all results to organized CSV files with clear naming
Creates publication-ready data tables and supplementary materials
Output: 7 CSV files covering all analyses and a manuscript-ready summary
```{r}
# Export binary results
write.csv(turbidity_binary, file.path(output_dir, "01_Turbidity_Binary_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(turbidity_binary_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "01_Turbidity_Binary_Results_FDR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(depth_binary, file.path(output_dir, "02_Depth_Binary_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(depth_binary_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "02_Depth_Binary_Results_FDR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Export 3-category turbidity results (MAIN RESULTS)
write.csv(turbidity_3cat, file.path(output_dir, "03_Turbidity_3Category_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(turbidity_3cat_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "03_Turbidity_3Category_Results_FDR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Export geographic controls
write.csv(lat_binary, file.path(output_dir, "04_Latitude_Geographic_Control.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(lat_binary_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "04_Latitude_Geographic_Control_FDR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(long_binary, file.path(output_dir, "05_Longitude_Geographic_Control.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(long_binary_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "05_Longitude_Geographic_Control_FDR.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Export group assignments for supplementary data
group_assignments <- data.frame(
  ARMS_ID = rownames(CN_pcover_combined),
  Turbidity_Binary = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_binary,
  Turbidity_3Category = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary,
  Depth_Binary = env_groups$depth_binary,
  Latitude_Region = env_groups$lat_region,
  Longitude_Region = env_groups$long_region,
  Latitude_Value = env_vars_depth_turb$latitude,
  Longitude_Value = env_vars_depth_turb$longitude,
  Depth_Value = env_vars_depth_turb$depth,
  Turbidity_Value = env_vars_depth_turb$turbidity_std_rank
)
write.csv(group_assignments, file.path(output_dir, "06_Sample_Group_Assignments.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Create manuscript-ready summary (significant results only)
manuscript_ready <- turbidity_3cat_fdr %>%
  filter(P_value_FDR < 0.1 & Comparison == "Low_High") %>%  # Low (clear) vs High (turbid)
  arrange(P_value_FDR) %>%
  select(Taxon, Average_Contribution, P_value, P_value_FDR, Significance_FDR, 
         Group_A_Mean, Group_B_Mean) %>%
  rename(
    Clear_Water_Mean = Group_A_Mean,    # Low turbidity group
    Turbid_Water_Mean = Group_B_Mean    # High turbidity group
  )

write.csv(manuscript_ready, file.path(output_dir, "07_Manuscript_Key_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```




#----------- SIMPER ANALYSES WITH 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA -----------------------
```{r}
#Create output directory
output_dir <- "CoralNet_SIMPER_Results_4thRoot"
if(!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
  cat("Created output directory:", output_dir, "\n")
}

# FUNCTION DEFINITIONS

# Function to create environmental groups using k-means clustering
create_environmental_groups <- function(env_data, community_data, variable_name, 
                                      method = "kmeans", n_groups = 2) {
  
  env_variable <- env_data[[variable_name]]
  
  if(is.null(env_variable)) {
    stop(paste("Variable", variable_name, "not found in environmental data"))
  }
  
  complete_cases <- !is.na(env_variable)
  env_clean <- env_variable[complete_cases]
  community_clean <- community_data[complete_cases, ]
  
  cat("Creating", n_groups, "groups for:", variable_name, "\n")
  cat("Range:", round(min(env_clean), 3), "to", round(max(env_clean), 3), "\n")
  
  if(method == "kmeans") {
    k_result <- kmeans(env_clean, centers = n_groups, nstart = 25)
    
    # Fix label assignment based on actual environmental values
    cluster_means <- tapply(env_clean, k_result$cluster, mean)
    cluster_order <- order(cluster_means)  # Order by actual environmental values
    
    if(n_groups == 2) {
      group_labels <- c("Low", "High")
    } else if(n_groups == 3) {
      group_labels <- c("Low", "Medium", "High")
    } else {
      group_labels <- paste0("Group_", 1:n_groups)
    }
    
    # Create a mapping from old cluster numbers to new labels
    cluster_to_label <- group_labels[rank(cluster_means)]
    groups <- factor(cluster_to_label[k_result$cluster])
    
    # Calculate group statistics with correct labels
    group_stats <- data.frame(
      Group = group_labels,
      Count = as.numeric(table(groups)[group_labels]),
      Mean = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, mean)[group_labels], 3),
      Range_Min = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, min)[group_labels], 3),
      Range_Max = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, max)[group_labels], 3)
    )
  }
  
  cat("\nGroup Summary:\n")
  print(group_stats)
  
  # Return full-length vector (with NAs for excluded cases)
  full_groups <- rep(NA, length(env_variable))
  full_groups[complete_cases] <- as.character(groups)
  full_groups <- factor(full_groups)
  
  return(list(
    groups = full_groups,
    statistics = group_stats,
    method = method,
    variable = variable_name,
    complete_cases = complete_cases
  ))
}

# Function to run SIMPER analyses with sample size checking
run_simper_analyses <- function(community_data, group_list, min_group_size = 3) {
  
  simper_results <- list()
  
  for(group_name in names(group_list)) {
    groups <- group_list[[group_name]]
    
    group_counts <- table(groups, useNA = "no")
    if(length(group_counts) < 2 || min(group_counts) < min_group_size) {
      cat("Skipping", group_name, "- insufficient sample sizes\n")
      next
    }
    
    cat("Running SIMPER for:", group_name, "\n")
    cat("Groups:", paste(names(group_counts), collapse = ", "), "\n")
    cat("Sample sizes:", paste(group_counts, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
    
    complete_cases <- !is.na(groups)
    community_subset <- community_data[complete_cases, ]
    groups_subset <- groups[complete_cases]
    
    simper_result <- simper(community_subset, groups_subset)
    simper_results[[group_name]] <- simper_result
  }
  
  return(simper_results)
}

# Function to extract SIMPER results for 2-group comparisons
extract_simper_summary <- function(simper_result, comparison_name, top_n = 10) {
  simper_summary <- summary(simper_result)
  comparison_data <- simper_summary[[1]]
  top_taxa <- head(comparison_data, top_n)
  
  data.frame(
    Comparison = rep(comparison_name, nrow(top_taxa)),
    Taxon = rownames(top_taxa),
    Average_Contribution = round(top_taxa$average, 4),
    Cumulative_Contribution = round(top_taxa$cumsum, 3),
    P_value = top_taxa$p,
    Significance = case_when(
      top_taxa$p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      top_taxa$p < 0.01 ~ "**",
      top_taxa$p < 0.05 ~ "*",
      top_taxa$p < 0.1 ~ ".",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Function to extract 3-category SIMPER results (all pairwise comparisons)
extract_3category_simper <- function(simper_result, variable_name, top_n = 10) {
  simper_summary <- summary(simper_result)
  
  all_comparisons <- list()
  
  for(comp_name in names(simper_summary)) {
    comparison_data <- simper_summary[[comp_name]]
    top_taxa <- head(comparison_data, top_n)
    
    comparison_df <- data.frame(
      Variable = variable_name,
      Comparison = comp_name,
      Taxon = rownames(top_taxa),
      Average_Contribution = round(top_taxa$average, 4),
      Cumulative_Contribution = round(top_taxa$cumsum, 3),
      P_value = top_taxa$p,
      Group_A_Mean = round(top_taxa$ava, 4),
      Group_B_Mean = round(top_taxa$avb, 4),
      Significance = case_when(
        top_taxa$p < 0.001 ~ "***",
        top_taxa$p < 0.01 ~ "**",
        top_taxa$p < 0.05 ~ "*",
        top_taxa$p < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    all_comparisons[[comp_name]] <- comparison_df
  }
  
  # Combine all comparisons
  combined_results <- do.call(rbind, all_comparisons)
  return(combined_results)
}

# Function to apply FDR correction
apply_fdr_correction <- function(simper_summary_df) {
  corrected_results <- simper_summary_df %>%
    group_by(Comparison) %>%
    mutate(
      P_value_FDR = p.adjust(P_value, method = "fdr"),
      Significance_FDR = case_when(
        P_value_FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
        P_value_FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
        P_value_FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
        P_value_FDR < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  return(corrected_results)
}

cat("✓ SIMPER functions loaded and output directory created\n")

# ============= CREATE ENVIRONMENTAL GROUPS FOR TURBIDITY AND DEPTH ===============

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("CREATING ENVIRONMENTAL GROUPS WITH 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Variables to analyze (focusing on turbidity and depth)
variables <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank")
env_groups <- list()

# Create binary and 3-category groups for each variable
for(var in variables) {
  cat("\n", rep("-", 40), "\n")
  cat("PROCESSING VARIABLE:", toupper(var), "\n")
  cat(rep("-", 40), "\n")
  
  # Binary groups
  cat("\nCreating BINARY groups:\n")
  binary_result <- create_environmental_groups(metadata_matched, community_4th_root, var, 
                                              method = "kmeans", n_groups = 2)
  env_groups[[paste0(var, "_binary")]] <- binary_result$groups
  
  # 3-category groups  
  cat("\nCreating 3-CATEGORY groups:\n")
  tertiary_result <- create_environmental_groups(metadata_matched, community_4th_root, var,
                                                method = "kmeans", n_groups = 3)
  env_groups[[paste0(var, "_tertiary")]] <- tertiary_result$groups
}

# Verify the turbidity groups are correctly assigned
cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("VERIFYING TURBIDITY GROUP ASSIGNMENTS\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

turbidity_verification <- metadata_matched %>%
  mutate(Group = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    Count = n(),
    Mean_Turbidity = round(mean(turbidity_std_rank, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min_Turbidity = round(min(turbidity_std_rank, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max_Turbidity = round(max(turbidity_std_rank, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

cat("Turbidity group assignments:\n")
print(turbidity_verification)
cat("✓ Low = Clear water, Medium = Intermediate, High = Turbid water\n")

# Verify depth groups
depth_verification <- metadata_matched %>%
  mutate(Group = env_groups$depth_tertiary) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    Count = n(),
    Mean_Depth = round(mean(depth, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min_Depth = round(min(depth, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max_Depth = round(max(depth, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

cat("\nDepth group assignments:\n")
print(depth_verification)

cat("\n✓ Environmental groups created successfully\n")

# ========  RUN SIMPER ANALYSES ====================

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("RUNNING SIMPER ANALYSES\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

cat("Running SIMPER on 4th root transformed community data...\n")
cat("Community data dimensions:", nrow(community_4th_root), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root), "taxa\n\n")

simper_results <- run_simper_analyses(community_4th_root, env_groups)

cat("✓ SIMPER analyses completed\n")
cat("Results available for:", paste(names(simper_results), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# =========  EXTRACT AND ANALYZE RESULTS ======================

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("EXTRACTING SIMPER RESULTS\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Extract binary comparison results
if("turbidity_std_rank_binary" %in% names(simper_results)) {
  turbidity_binary <- extract_simper_summary(simper_results$turbidity_std_rank_binary, "Turbidity_Binary")
  cat("✓ Turbidity binary results extracted\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠️ Turbidity binary analysis not available\n")
  turbidity_binary <- data.frame()
}

if("depth_binary" %in% names(simper_results)) {
  depth_binary <- extract_simper_summary(simper_results$depth_binary, "Depth_Binary")
  cat("✓ Depth binary results extracted\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠️ Depth binary analysis not available\n")
  depth_binary <- data.frame()
}

# Extract 3-category results
if("turbidity_std_rank_tertiary" %in% names(simper_results)) {
  cat("\nExtracting 3-category turbidity results...\n")
  turbidity_3cat <- extract_3category_simper(simper_results$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary, "Turbidity_3Category")
  cat("✓ Turbidity 3-category results extracted\n")
  
  cat("Available comparisons:\n")
  print(unique(turbidity_3cat$Comparison))
} else {
  cat("⚠️ Turbidity 3-category analysis not available\n")
  turbidity_3cat <- data.frame()
}

if("depth_tertiary" %in% names(simper_results)) {
  cat("\nExtracting 3-category depth results...\n")
  depth_3cat <- extract_3category_simper(simper_results$depth_tertiary, "Depth_3Category")
  cat("✓ Depth 3-category results extracted\n")
  
  cat("Available comparisons:\n")
  print(unique(depth_3cat$Comparison))
} else {
  cat("⚠️ Depth 3-category analysis not available\n")
  depth_3cat <- data.frame()
}

# ========= APPLY FDR CORRECTION FOR MULTIPLE TESTING ===============

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("APPLYING FDR CORRECTION FOR MULTIPLE TESTING\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Apply FDR correction to all results
if(nrow(turbidity_binary) > 0) {
  turbidity_binary_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(turbidity_binary)
  cat("✓ FDR correction applied to turbidity binary results\n")
} else {
  turbidity_binary_fdr <- data.frame()
}

if(nrow(depth_binary) > 0) {
  depth_binary_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(depth_binary)
  cat("✓ FDR correction applied to depth binary results\n")
} else {
  depth_binary_fdr <- data.frame()
}

if(nrow(turbidity_3cat) > 0) {
  turbidity_3cat_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(turbidity_3cat)
  cat("✓ FDR correction applied to turbidity 3-category results\n")
} else {
  turbidity_3cat_fdr <- data.frame()
}

if(nrow(depth_3cat) > 0) {
  depth_3cat_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(depth_3cat)
  cat("✓ FDR correction applied to depth 3-category results\n")
} else {
  depth_3cat_fdr <- data.frame()
}

# ============  EXPORT RESULTS ===============

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("EXPORTING RESULTS\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Export turbidity results
if(nrow(turbidity_binary) > 0) {
  write.csv(turbidity_binary, file.path(output_dir, "01_Turbidity_Binary_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(turbidity_binary_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "01_Turbidity_Binary_Results_FDR_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Turbidity binary results exported\n")
}

if(nrow(turbidity_3cat) > 0) {
  write.csv(turbidity_3cat, file.path(output_dir, "02_Turbidity_3Category_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(turbidity_3cat_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "02_Turbidity_3Category_Results_FDR_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Turbidity 3-category results exported\n")
}

# Export depth results
if(nrow(depth_binary) > 0) {
  write.csv(depth_binary, file.path(output_dir, "03_Depth_Binary_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(depth_binary_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "03_Depth_Binary_Results_FDR_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Depth binary results exported\n")
}

if(nrow(depth_3cat) > 0) {
  write.csv(depth_3cat, file.path(output_dir, "04_Depth_3Category_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(depth_3cat_fdr, file.path(output_dir, "04_Depth_3Category_Results_FDR_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Depth 3-category results exported\n")
}

# Export group assignments for supplementary data
group_assignments <- data.frame(
  ARMS_ID = rownames(community_4th_root),
  Turbidity_Binary = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_binary,
  Turbidity_3Category = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary,
  Depth_Binary = env_groups$depth_binary,
  Depth_3Category = env_groups$depth_tertiary,
  Depth_Value = metadata_matched$depth,
  Turbidity_Value = metadata_matched$turbidity_std_rank
)
write.csv(group_assignments, file.path(output_dir, "05_Sample_Group_Assignments_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Group assignments exported\n")

# Create manuscript-ready summary (focusing on turbidity - strongest effect)
if(nrow(turbidity_3cat_fdr) > 0) {
  # Focus on Low vs High comparison (most extreme contrast)
  manuscript_ready <- turbidity_3cat_fdr %>%
    filter(P_value_FDR < 0.1) %>%  # Include marginally significant results
    filter(Comparison %in% c("Low_High", "High_Low")) %>%  # Most extreme contrast
    arrange(P_value_FDR) %>%
    select(Comparison, Taxon, Average_Contribution, P_value, P_value_FDR, Significance_FDR, 
           Group_A_Mean, Group_B_Mean) %>%
    rename(
      Group_A_Mean_Cover = Group_A_Mean,
      Group_B_Mean_Cover = Group_B_Mean
    )
  
  write.csv(manuscript_ready, file.path(output_dir, "06_Manuscript_Key_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Manuscript-ready results exported\n")
}

# ============  CHUNK 7: DISPLAY KEY FINDINGS ==============

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("KEY FINDINGS SUMMARY\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Focus on turbidity results (primary interest)
if(nrow(turbidity_3cat_fdr) > 0) {
  
  # Look for Low vs High turbidity comparison (clear vs turbid water)
  low_vs_high_turbidity <- turbidity_3cat_fdr %>%
    filter(Comparison == "Low_High" & P_value_FDR < 0.1) %>%
    arrange(P_value_FDR)
  
  cat("=== MAIN FINDING: LOW vs HIGH TURBIDITY (4th Root Transformed) ===\n")
  cat("(Low turbidity [clear] vs High turbidity [turbid])\n\n")
  
  if(nrow(low_vs_high_turbidity) > 0) {
    cat("Significant taxa after FDR correction:\n\n")
    
    for(i in 1:min(5, nrow(low_vs_high_turbidity))) {
      # Group_A_Mean = Low turbidity (clear), Group_B_Mean = High turbidity (turbid)
      clear_abundance <- low_vs_high_turbidity$Group_A_Mean[i]
      turbid_abundance <- low_vs_high_turbidity$Group_B_Mean[i]
      
      if(clear_abundance > turbid_abundance) {
        fold_change <- round(clear_abundance / turbid_abundance, 1)
        association <- "negatively associated with turbidity (prefers clear water)"
      } else {
        fold_change <- round(turbid_abundance / clear_abundance, 1)
        association <- "positively associated with turbidity (prefers turbid water)"
      }
      
      cat(sprintf("%d. %s (%s):\n", i, low_vs_high_turbidity$Taxon[i], association))
      cat(sprintf("   Clear water: %.3f%% cover\n", clear_abundance * 100))
      cat(sprintf("   Turbid water: %.3f%% cover\n", turbid_abundance * 100))
      cat(sprintf("   Fold difference: %.1fx\n", fold_change))
      cat(sprintf("   p-value (FDR): %.3f %s\n\n", 
                  low_vs_high_turbidity$P_value_FDR[i], low_vs_high_turbidity$Significance_FDR[i]))
    }
  } else {
    cat("No taxa significant after FDR correction (p < 0.1)\n")
    
    # Show top taxa even if not FDR significant
    top_turbidity <- turbidity_3cat_fdr %>%
      filter(Comparison == "Low_High") %>%
      arrange(P_value) %>%
      head(3)
    
    if(nrow(top_turbidity) > 0) {
      cat("\nTop taxa by raw p-value:\n")
      for(i in 1:nrow(top_turbidity)) {
        cat(sprintf("%d. %s: p = %.3f (FDR p = %.3f)\n", 
                    i, top_turbidity$Taxon[i], top_turbidity$P_value[i], top_turbidity$P_value_FDR[i]))
      }
    }
  }
} else {
  cat("No turbidity 3-category results available\n")
}

# Summary for depth
if(nrow(depth_3cat_fdr) > 0) {
  depth_significant <- depth_3cat_fdr %>%
    filter(P_value_FDR < 0.1) %>%
    nrow()
  
  cat("=== DEPTH RESULTS ===\n")
  cat(sprintf("Significant taxa in depth comparisons: %d\n", depth_significant))
} else {
  cat("=== DEPTH RESULTS ===\n")
  cat("No depth 3-category results available\n")
}

cat("\n=== FILES EXPORTED ===\n")
cat("All results saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("1. Turbidity binary and 3-category results\n")
cat("2. Depth binary and 3-category results\n") 
cat("3. Group assignments for each sample\n")
cat("4. Manuscript-ready significant results\n")
cat("   (All files available with and without FDR correction)\n")

if(nrow(low_vs_high_turbidity) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== RECOMMENDATION FOR MANUSCRIPT ===\n")
  cat("✓ STRONG SUPPORT for turbidity-mediated environmental filtering\n")
  cat("✓ Use Low vs High turbidity comparison as main result\n")
  cat("✓ Multiple taxa show significant responses to turbidity gradient\n")
  cat("✓ 4th root transformation revealed cleaner patterns\n")
} else {
  cat("\n=== RECOMMENDATION FOR MANUSCRIPT ===\n")
  cat("⚠️ Limited statistical support after FDR correction\n")
  cat("✓ Focus on effect sizes and biological interpretation\n")
  cat("✓ 4th root transformation may have reduced noise but also signal\n")
}

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("SIMPER ANALYSIS COMPLETE!\n")
cat("Check the", output_dir, "directory for all results files.\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")
```
